Arbeitsort: Homeoffice

title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer (m/f/*)
description:
**About Peregrine**



Based in Berlin, we're leveraging the power of AI to transform cameras into intelligent devices, enhancing road safety and urban mobility on a global scale, while preserving privacy at all times.



At Peregrine, diversity and international collaboration fuel innovation. We unite the brightest minds with strong academic backgrounds and rich industry experience in robotics and machine learning, spanning from the tech hubs of Silicon Valley to the engineering powerhouses of Europe. Our team boasts alumni from leading automotive giants like Bosch, Volkswagen, IAV, and TomTom and institutions such as the ETH in Zurich. We're on the hunt for brilliant, dynamic, and passionate individuals eager to tackle challenging problems and make a tangible impact.


**Tasks**
---------


**The Role**



As a Senior Machine Learning Engineer, you will own the design, training, and on\-device deployment of the computer vision models at the heart of our product. You will work at the intersection of research and production, turning state\-of\-the\-art vision techniques into reliable systems that run within strict latency and privacy constraints on resource\-constrained edge hardware. Your key tasks will include:


* Design, train, and optimize deep learning models for object detection, semantic segmentation, pose estimation, and tracking.
* Port and deploy models to resource\-constrained edge hardware, achieving single\-digit millisecond latency without cloud dependencies.
* Build and maintain robust vision pipelines from data ingestion through training to production inference.
* Apply model compression techniques such as quantization, pruning, knowledge distillation, and neural architecture search to meet strict performance budgets.
* Develop synthetic data and domain adaptation pipelines to close the sim\-to\-real gap.
* Profile inference pipelines end\-to\-end to identify and eliminate bottlenecks on target silicon.
* Translate cutting\-edge academic research into highly reliable, production\-grade systems.
* Collaborate closely with hardware, product, and research colleagues to shape our privacy\-by\-design architecture.

**Requirements**
----------------


**Your Profile**


**Core Competencies: Computer Vision \& Edge AI**


* Edge AI \& On\-Device Inference: Expertise in porting, deploying, and optimizing complex deep learning models for local, resource\-constrained hardware without cloud dependencies.
* Advanced Computer Vision: Deep knowledge of developing vision pipelines for object detection, semantic segmentation, pose estimation, and tracking.
* Hardware\-Aware Architecture Design: Ability to custom\-build network topologies tailored to specific sensors and strict latency budgets, rather than relying on off\-the\-shelf APIs.
* Synthetic Data \& Domain Adaptation: Proven experience in building simulation pipelines for synthetic data generation and closing the “sim\-to\-real” gap using Domain Randomization and GANs.


**Technical Stack \& Tools**


* Languages: Advanced proficiency in C\+\+ (for production\-grade edge deployment) and Python (for training, research, and data analysis).
* AI/ML Frameworks: Extensive hands\-on experience with PyTorch, and TensorFlow / Keras.
* Optimization \& Deployment: Mastery of inference acceleration and model conversion using TensorRT, ONNX, and OpenVINO.
* Model Compression: Practical application of quantization, pruning, knowledge distillation, and neural architecture search.


**System Architecture \& Compliance**


* Privacy\-by\-Design Architecture: Designing robust, local AI systems that guarantee data sovereignty and strict GDPR compliance without cloud roundtrips.
* Performance Profiling: Deep\-dive auditing of inference pipelines to identify bottlenecks and achieve single\-digit millisecond latency on target silicon.


**Research, Strategy \& Leadership**


* Research\-to\-Production (R2P): The ability to translate complex, state\-of\-the\-art academic research into highly reliable systems that work in the real world.
* AI Strategy \& Assessment: Capability to conduct feasibility studies, ROI analysis, and privacy\-first architecture blueprinting.


**Mindset**


* Comfort with ambiguity, a problem\-solving mindset, and adaptability to rapid change.
* Entrepreneurial drive, a strong sense of responsibility, high ambition, and a collaborative approach to achieving goals.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English and the ability to effectively collaborate with various stakeholders.
* Having work experience in a startup or venture capital is a plus.


*We don’t expect anyone to check all these boxes mentioned above! If a few of these points apply to you, we want to talk!*


**Benefits**
------------


**Our offering**


* The opportunity to significantly contribute to the company's growth and success.
* A competitive salary.
* An evolving role that grows with our company's journey.
* We have flexible working hours and a need\-based work\-from\-home policy; all processes are being set up for remote first.
* A diverse and inclusive work environment as well as a flat organizational structure, fast decision making within the team, disagree \& commit.
* We foster a culture where we all learn from each other and value new ideas.
* We hold fun team events throughout the year.
* We contribute to your monthly public transport ticket.
* Free drinks, snacks, and coffee.

title: Machine Learning Consultant (f/m/d)
description:
#### **About the role**


FRAMEN is one of Europe’s fastest\-growing Digital Outdoor Media networks, with 50\+ employees working with leading brands and advertising agencies globally. We combine premium indoor environments, strong content context, and technology to deliver high\-attention advertising experiences.  

Our engineering and MLOps team designs and scales the infrastructure behind FRAMEN’s products. To complement their strengths, we are looking for a freelance specialist with deep mathematical and theoretical expertise in machine learning. You will focus on the conceptual and mathematical foundations of our models, while the engineering team takes care of implementation, deployment and infrastructure. This is an initial project term of three months at approximately 20 hours per week, with the option to extend by mutual agreement depending on the scope and progress of the project.#### **Key Responsibilities**

* Develop the mathematical logic and optimization methods behind our machine learning models, providing the conceptual blueprint that the engineering team implements.
* Assess models in development for structural or mathematical weaknesses and recommend improvements.
* Lead in\-person working sessions that translate complex algorithmic concepts into clear, actionable logic the engineering team can build on.
* Follow relevant developments in AI research, evaluate their mathematical foundations, and advise how new methods could strengthen our products.

#### **Your profile**

* A strong theoretical foundation in machine learning, ideally supported by an advanced degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Physics, Computer Science or a related field.
* Deep knowledge of linear algebra, probability and optimisation.
* The ability to communicate complex mathematical concepts clearly to engineers and other technical colleagues.
* Working proficiency in Python (e.g. NumPy, PyTorch, JAX) to prototype and share your ideas.
* A collaborative approach and enjoyment of solving problems together with the team in person.
* A collaborative approach and a readiness to work on\-site at FRAMEN's Berlin headquarters, where the consultancy project will be delivered and rolled out.

#### **What’s in it for you?**

* Compensation of €4,166 per month for the 20 consultancy hours per week.
* Be part of a well\-funded, ambitious start\-up with a motivated and fast\-growing team, united by the goal of making FRAMEN the most innovative out\-of\-home advertising company and a market leader across multiple segments.
* Trust is one of our core values: you’ll be given independence and responsibility from day one.

#### **About us**


FRAMEN is an intelligent content and DOOH platform that transforms screens in premium locations into dynamic environments. Our media tech enables playback on all standard screens in commercially used spaces. Venue partners can easily manage their screens and content while advertisers use our technology to effortlessly launch and manage targeted campaigns. Our technology delivers relevant advertising, real\-time information, and curated content to audiences in coworking spaces, gyms, and hotels, making public media impactful and effortless.

*FRAMEN is an Equal Opportunity Employer. There shall be no discrimination on the basis of age, disability, sex, race, religion or belief, gender reassignment, marriage/civil partnership, pregnancy/maternity, or sexual orientation.*

title: Sr. Applied Scientist, Community Data & Science
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Join Amazon's Community Feedback organization and help transform how billions of customers make purchase decisions. As an Applied Scientist on our team, you'll build intelligent systems that understand, curate, and surface insights from billions of ratings and reviews. You'll drive innovation in multimodal ML, NLP, and agentic AI systems that power core Amazon experiences like review highlights, product insights, and Rufus, directly influencing unregretted purchase decisions for customers worldwide.  

  

* Work with one of Amazon's largest and most diverse customer feedback corpora, applying advanced ML to real\-world problems at unprecedented scale
* Collaborate with a senior, high\-performing science team split between Berlin and Barcelona, with opportunities to mentor and grow
* Shape the future of customer trust through research in corpus understanding, content quality, and intelligent surfacing systems
* Partner with teams across Amazon (Search, Rufus, Personalization) to multiply your impact across the shopping journey

  

Key job responsibilities  

* Design, develop, and deploy machine learning models for corpus understanding, including entity extraction, multimodal content analysis (text, images, videos), and structured insight generation at billion\-scale
* Build and optimize ML systems for content quality assessment, moderation, ranking, and personalized surfacing that directly impact customer experience
* Drive end\-to\-end ownership of scientific initiatives from research and experimentation through production deployment and measurement
* Collaborate with product and engineering teams to translate complex ML solutions into scalable, reliable customer experiences
* Mentor junior scientists and engineers, providing technical guidance and fostering scientific excellence across the team

  

A day in the life  

The Community Data \& Science team focuses on understanding, shaping, structuring, presenting and vending Community Feedback to help customers use the wisdom of the community to make unregretted purchase decisions. We build and own ML solutions that help with i) shaping the community content corpus both in terms of quantity and quality, ii) converting the content into structured data and iii) presenting raw content and structured data to shoppers to inform unregretted purchase decisions. Today, our ML models support experiences like review solicitation and submission, content moderation, rating aggregation, review ranking and review summarization.**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Statistics, or related quantitative field, or Master's degree with 5\+ years of applied research experience
* 3\+ years of experience building and deploying machine learning models in production environments

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* 5\+ years of experience developing and deploying ML systems at scale, processing billions of data points

  

Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.  

  

m/w/d  

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

title: Principal Game Programmer (f/m/x)
description:
**Our Story:**



At DECK 13 Interactive, we’re more than just a game development studio—we’re a diverse, passionate community of creators dedicated to crafting unforgettable gaming experiences. Since our founding in 2001, in the heart of Frankfurt, Germany, we’ve been pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in PC and console games. Now part of the PulluP Entertainment group, our team of around 100 talented professionals continues to shape the future of gaming.  

We’re the minds behind titles like *Lords of the Fallen* , *The Surge* series, and *Atlas Fallen* , known for their rich worlds and immersive gameplay. But we believe the best games are still ahead of us, and that’s where you come in.


**Your Quest:**



As our **Principal Game Programmer (f/m/x)**, you will be the most senior individual contributor on the programming team. Your mission includes setting the technical bar across Unreal Engine, our development tools, and gameplay. Additionally, you will own the hardest technical problems and drive architecture in close collaboration with the Technical Director. Mentoring senior, regular, and junior programmers is a core, formal part of the role.


**Your Mission Includes:**


* Drive technical and architectural decisions across major systems.
* Take ownership of the most technically demanding work: deep optimization, cross\-system refactors, and high\-risk areas of the codebase.
* Set and uphold technical standards and best practices.
* Mentor programmers of all levels through pairing, code reviews, and technical guidance, fostering growth and unblocking complex problems.
* Own documentation and knowledge\-sharing for the systems and domains you know best.
* Identify, evaluate, and prototype new tools and workflows to improve the team's output.
* Contribute to hiring through technical interviews and onboarding.


**Your Toolkit:**


* 10\+ years of experience in the game development industry
* Expert\-level proficiency in C\+\+, with a deep understanding of programming principles, system design, and large\-scale architectures
* Extensive experience in game programming across engine\-level work and tools development
* Deep knowledge of Unreal Engine internals and major subsystems
* A proven track record of shipping AA/AAA titles with significant ownership over core systems
* Strong debugging, profiling, and optimization skills across CPU and GPU, including platform\-specific work
* Demonstrated mentorship experience: growing other programmers through pair programming, code reviews, and technical coaching
* Excellent communication and documentation skills, with the ability to explain complex concepts to both engineers and non\-engineers
* Sound judgment on when to build, when to refactor, and when to ship as\-is
* 2\+ years of console programming experience (PlayStation, Xbox)


**You Get Extra XP for:**


* Deep specialization in a particular domain (gameplay, tools, rendering, animation, or AI)
* Prior experience on a Principal/Staff IC track at another studio
* Console certification work (PlayStation, Xbox)
* Having shipped at least one AA/AAA game


Power\-Ups You Receive:



At DECK 13 Interactive, our people are at the heart of everything we do. We believe in creating an environment where you feel valued, supported, and empowered to do your best work. Here’s what we offer to make that happen:


* A modern, centrally located office in Frankfurt, Germany (near Messe)
* Free language courses to help you expand your skills
* Monthly allowances for remote working and gym memberships
* A monthly allowance for the Deutschlandticket to ease your commute
* Tax\-free Probonio vouchers available every month
* Free access to an online mental health platform (Bloom) to support your well\-being
* Opportunities for career growth with a yearly learning \& development budget
* 28 days of paid vacation, plus the 24th and 31st of December off


**Our Commitment to Inclusivity:**



DECK 13 Interactive is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We welcome applications from all individuals regardless of gender, race, ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other characteristic that makes you unique.  

We believe that diverse teams create the best games, and we’re dedicated to building a workplace where everyone can thrive.

title: Internship R&D
description:
**Date:** Jul 15, 2026


**Location:** Olen, BE, 2250


**Company:** Belden Inc



**Innovation Starts With You**

  

  

Propel your career at Belden, where innovation creates possibilities—for our people, our customers, and the communities we serve. We connect people, information, and ideas to solve the world’s most complex connectivity challenges, turning curiosity into meaningful impact. Here, you’ll take on work that challenges you, supports your growth, and empowers you to shape what’s next. You’ll collaborate with global teams, gain diverse perspectives, and contribute to solutions that extend beyond our business—creating value in the world around us.

  

Together, we are shaping the future of digitization and paving the way for the next generation of innovation.

  

**About the role:**


Are you passionate about innovation, technology, and solving real\-world problems? We are looking for motivated and curious students to join our R\&D team in Belgium as part of a regional internship program.


This is a unique opportunity to gain hands\-on experience while being part of a broader community of interns across the region, with access to training sessions, networking opportunities, and collaborative learning experiences.

  

**You will make a difference in the following ways:**


As an R\&D Intern, you will work on meaningful projects aligned with your academic background and interests. Depending on your profile, you may contribute to:


* Electrical engineering projects
* IT and systems\-related initiatives
* Data analysis, including AI\-related topics
* Development of dashboards and reporting tools
* Embedded Linux development (C/C\+\+)
* Data reporting and automation (Python)

Your specific responsibilities will be shaped to match your skills and learning goals, ensuring a valuable and personalized experience.

  

**What you bring:**


* Enrollment in a study programme in:
	+ Electrical Engineering
	+ Computer Science / IT
	+ Data Science, AI, or related fields
* Basic knowledge or interest in areas such as Python, C/C\+\+, data analysis, or embedded systems
* Strong analytical thinking and problem\-solving skills
* Curiosity, adaptability, and eagerness to learn
* Ability to work in an international and collaborative environment
  

**What we offer**


* A flexible and tailored internship experience
* Exposure to real R\&D projects and technologies
* Access to a regional intern community and structured learning opportunities
* Mentorship and support from experienced professionals
  

If you are looking to kick\-start your career in R\&D and explore different technical paths, we would love to hear from you. **Apply now and be part of shaping future innovations.**

  

**Let’s Create Possibilities Together.**

  

  

Join a global community shaping the future of intelligent connectivity. At Belden, you’ll help push the boundaries of technology and write the next chapter of innovation, creating possibilities for your career, your future, and the world around you.


These statements are intended to describe the general nature and level of work involved for this job. It is not an exhaustive list of all responsibilities, duties and skills required of this job.

title: Senior Talent Acquisition Specialist (3-Month Fixed-Term Contract)
description:
VECTRA International is seeking an experienced evidence\-driven Senior Talent Acquisition Specialist for  

a 3\-month fixed\-term contract. This role requires a proven track record of placing high\-performing people  

globally in remote\-first organizations, with strong retention across multiple regions within a remote\-first  

organization with high stakeholder satisfaction  

The successful candidate accelerates priority hiring, builds robust talent pipelines, strengthens selection  

quality, and ensures each appointment is capable, motivated, aligned, and positioned to succeed.


**Tasks**
---------



Manage the recruitment lifecycle from workforce planning and role calibration.  

* Define role purpose, success outcomes, essential capabilities, compensation, and retention risks to


help hiring managers.  

* Source exceptional candidates through LinkedIn Recruiter, direct headhunting, referrals, networking,


and global job boards.  

* Recruit across sales, marketing, consulting and operations roles.
* Maintain proactive talent pipelines for current and future critical hiring needs.
* Use structured interviews, scorecards, work samples, references, and role\-relevant assessments.
* Provide evidence\-based recommendations and challenge weak role design or unsuitable hiring


decisions  

* Give candidates a realistic view of VECTRA’s remote, international, fast\-moving, commercial


environment.  

* Manage offers and ensure a clear onboarding handover covering expectations and identified risks.
* Track quality\-of\-hire, retention, candidate experience, hiring\-manager satisfaction, and efficiency; use


AI responsibly.
**Requirements**
----------------


* Non\-negotiable  

	+ Minimum of 3–5 years’ experience in recruitment or talent acquisition.
	+ Evidence of strong probation, retention, performance, and hiring\-manager satisfaction outcomes.
	+ Proven ability to manage multiple vacancies across different countries and time zones.
	+ Advanced sourcing skills using LinkedIn Recruiter and other talent acquisition platforms.


* Experience using Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS), structured assessment, recruitment analytics,  

and responsible AI tools  

Preferred  

	+ Strong stakeholder management, negotiation, and influencing skills.
	+ Excellent communication, organizational, and project management abilities.
	+ Commercially minded, evidence\-driven, and independent in a fast\-paced environment.



Degree in Human Resources, Business, Psychology, or a related field.  

* Recruitment certifications (LinkedIn Recruiter, SHRM, CIPD, AIRS, or equivalent) are advantageous.
* Experience recruiting within consulting, sales, marketing, or professional services is preferred.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)  

* Fill priority vacancies within agreed service levels without compromising quality.
* Deliver high probation success and early retention.
* Achieve strong hiring\-manager and quality\-of\-hire ratings.
* Maintain qualified pipelines for critical functions.
* Meet recruitment compliance, reporting, and improvement standards.


Deliverables During the 3\-Month Contract  

* Close assigned vacancies using structured, documented selection.
* Build talent pipelines for critical and future roles.
* Provide weekly recruitment dashboards covering progress, quality, risks, and market insights.
* Deliver a practical recruitment playbook and smooth handover at the end of the contract.
* Implement role\-intake, scorecard, feedback, and onboarding\-handover tools.
* Provide weekly dashboards covering progress, quality, risks, and market insights.

**Benefits**
------------



Equal Opportunity Employer Statement: VECTRA International is an equal\-opportunity employer. We  

celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Join something  

bigger. Make a difference with VECTRA International

title: Social Media & Community Specialist
description:
We are looking for a Social Media \& Community Specialist to lead VECTRA’s organic social presence,  

thought leadership distribution, community engagement, and social media performance .This role is ideal for  

someone who understands B2B social media, executive branding, content adaptation, audience  

engagement, and social analytics. The role goes beyond posting content and focuses on building authority,  

increasing visibility, and strengthening VECTRA’s market positioning.  

This is a strategic and tactical role that requires both creative thinking and analytical rigor. You'll work closely  

with the content, creative, and SEO teams to amplify VECTRA's messaging, establish industry  

authority,marketplace growth and generate qualified leads for the sales team.


**Tasks**
---------



Social Media Strategy \& Planning  

* Develop and execute comprehensive social media strategy and publishing calendar
* Define content pillars, messaging frameworks, and platform specific strategies (LinkedIn, Twitter/X,


YouTube, Instagram)  

* Set quarterly social media goals, KPIs, and success metrics
* Conduct competitive analysis and industry benchmarking to identify opportunities
* Identify emerging trends and opportunities to position VECTRA as a thought leader
* Schedule, publish, monitor, and optimize content across all platforms.


Content Development \& Curation  

* Create original, engaging social content (posts, captions, threads, reels, videos) that drive


engagement and lead generation  

* Curate industry news, research, and insights that position VECTRA as an authority
* Translate complex supply chain, resilience, and business topics into accessible, engaging social


narratives  

* Collaborate with the creative team to develop visually compelling assets and multimedia content
* Repurpose long\-form content (webinars, reports, case studies) into social\-optimized formats
* Develop thought leadership content for executive team members to share and amplify reach


Community Management \& Engagement  

* Monitor comments, mentions, conversations, and engagement opportunities.
* Build and nurture an engaged community of supply chain professionals, sustainability leaders, and


enterprise decision\-makers  

* Support employee advocacy and internal content amplification initiatives.
* Identify and engage with key influencers, industry leaders, and potential partners
* Manage crisis communication and brand reputation on social channels


Campaign Execution \& Promotion  

* Plan and execute integrated social media campaigns supporting product launches, webinars, events,


and thought leadership initiatives  

* Maintain content calendars, publishing schedules, and content trackers.
* Promote webinars, reports, case studies, and other marketing assets to drive registrations
* Coordinate with content, design, website, email, and Marketplace teams.
* Create campaign\-specific landing pages, email sequences, and promotional materials
* Track campaign performance and optimize in real\-time based on engagement and conversion data


Analytics \& Performance Measurement  

* Track and report on key social media metrics: reach, impressions, engagement rate, click\-through


rate, follower growth, lead generation and other metrics  

* Support UTM usage and attribution tracking across social channels.
* Conduct monthly and weekly performance reviews and provide insights and recommendations
* Use data to optimize content strategy, posting schedule, and platform allocation
* Create dashboards and reports for leadership visibility into social media performance
* Benchmark performance against competitors and industry standards


Platform Management \& Optimization  

* Manage all VECTRA social media accounts (LinkedIn, Twitter/X, YouTube, Instagram, etc.)
* Optimize profile bios, headers, and descriptions to reflect VECTRA's repositioning
* Test new features, formats, and platforms to stay ahead of trends
* Ensure brand consistency across all social channels
* Manage social media tools, scheduling software, and analytics platforms
* Stay current with platform algorithm changes and best practices


Collaboration \& Cross\-Functional Alignment  

* Work closely with content team to align social strategy with content marketing initiatives
* Collaborate with creative team on visual assets, video content, and multimedia production
* Support sales team with social selling resources, battle cards, and competitive intelligence
* Coordinate with SEO team to ensure social content supports organic search strategy
* Participate in marketing team meetings and contribute to overall marketing strategy
* Communicate social insights and opportunities to leadership


Thought Leadership \& Industry Authority  

* Develop and promote executive thought leadership across LinkedIn and relevant channels.
* Identify speaking opportunities, industry events, and partnership opportunities
* Build relationships with journalists, industry analysts, and media outlets
* Industry conversations and position VECTRA as a voice in business transformation

**Requirements**
----------------



Requirements  

* 3\-5 years of professional experience in Social Media or Content Marketing
* Proven ability to develop and execute a comprehensive B2B social media strategy aligned with


business objectives, driving engaged communities and measurable business results.  

* Strong writing, storytelling, and content adaptation skills to create authentic content tailored for


various audience personas.  

* Proficiency with social media analytics tools and demonstrated ability to interpret performance


metrics, making data\-driven decisions.  

* Experience managing content calendars and proficiency with social media management tools
* Familiarity with thought leadership and executive branding strategies, while managing multiple social


platforms (LinkedIn, Twitter/X, YouTube, Instagram).  

* Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a remote environment while managing


simultaneous campaigns and comfortable with new platforms/trends.  

* Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or related field (or equivalent


professional experience
**Benefits**
------------



Equal Opportunity Employer Statement: VECTRA International is an equal\-opportunity employer. We  

celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Join something  

bigger. Make a difference with VECTRA International.



Nice to Have  

* Experience with LinkedIn as a primary platform for B2B marketing
* Background in supply chain, operations, sustainability, or enterprise transformation
* Experience with social media advertising (LinkedIn Ads, Twitter Ads, etc.)
* Familiarity with AI\-powered tools and their applications in marketing
* Experience with video content creation and optimization
* Knowledge of thought leadership and personal branding strategies
* Experience in a fast\-growing, mission\-driven organization
* Certification in social media marketing or related field

title: Video Editor
description:
As a Freelance Video Editor, you will produce high\-quality video content for VECTRA's marketing channels.  

You will work closely with our Creative Lead to transform raw footage, webinar recordings, interviews, and  

other source material into compelling short\-form and long\-form video content optimized for social media,  

website, and marketing campaigns.  

This role requires both traditional video editing expertise and proficiency with AI\-powered video tools to  

maximize efficiency and creative quality. You'll manage multiple projects simultaneously, meet tight  

deadlines, and maintain consistent brand quality across all deliverables.


**Tasks**
---------



Short\-Form Video Production  

* Edit engaging reels, shorts, and social media videos (15\-60 seconds) for LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok,


YouTube Shorts  

* Create visually compelling short\-form content from webinars, interviews, case studies, and thought


leadership material  

* Optimize videos for platform\-specific requirements (aspect ratios, captions, thumbnails, etc.)
* Maintain consistent pacing, transitions, and visual style aligned with VECTRA brand guidelines
* Produce 12\-16 short\-form videos per month


Long\-Form Video Editing  

* Edit webinar recordings, interviews, educational content, and campaign videos (5\-30 minutes)
* Add graphics, lower thirds, callouts, and visual enhancements to improve clarity and engagement
* Incorporate B\-roll, stock footage, and motion graphics to enhance storytelling
* Color grade and audio mix for professional quality output
* Produce 4\-6 long\-form videos per month


AI\-Powered Video Production \& Optimization  

* Utilize AI video editing tools (Descript, Opus Clip, Synthesia, Runway, etc.) to accelerate production


and enhance creativity  

* Use AI for automated transcription, subtitle generation, and caption optimization
* Leverage AI tools for background removal, scene detection, and intelligent editing
* Create video thumbnails, promotional graphics, transcripts, and captions
* Experiment with AI\-generated graphics, animations, and visual effects while balancing efficiency with


authenticity  

* Stay current with emerging AI video tools and capabilities


Video Asset Management \& Quality Assurance  

* Organize and manage video files, footage, and assets in a centralized system
* Create and maintain video editing templates for consistency and efficiency
* Ensure all videos meet technical specifications and quality standards
* Review videos for consistency with brand guidelines, messaging, and tone
* Test videos across multiple platforms and devices
* Optimize video file sizes and formats for web delivery
* Maintain version control and backup systems for all projects


Collaboration \& Continuous Improvement  

* Work closely with Creative Lead on project briefs and creative direction
* Communicate project status, timelines, and blockers proactively
* Incorporate feedback and revisions efficiently
* Collaborate with content team to understand messaging and storytelling objectives
* Stay current with video editing trends, techniques, and best practices
* Propose creative ideas and innovations to enhance VECTRA's video content
* Track video performance metrics and provide insights on what works

**Requirements**
----------------



Minimum 2\+ years of professional video editing experience  

* Proven portfolio of short\-form and long form video content (reels, shorts, webinars,


interviews,educational videos)  

* Proficiency with professional video editing software (Adobe Premiere Pro, Adobe Creative Suite


(Photoshop, After Effects), Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or equivalent)  

* Strong understanding of video formats, codecs, frame rates, and resolution standards
* Proficiency with color grading and audio editing
* Experience with AI\-powered video editing tools (Descript, Opus Clip, or similar)
* Familiarity with AI transcription and subtitle generation tools
* Willingness to learn and experiment with new AI video tools
* Strong visual storytelling and creative sensibility
* Attention to detail and commitment to quality
* Ability to work independently and manage time effectively
* Strong communication and collaboration skills
* Ability to meet tight deadlines and manage multiple projects simultaneously
* Formal training in video editing, film production, or related field (degree, bootcamp, or equivalent


professional experience)
**Benefits**
------------



Role Overview  

Equal Opportunity Employer Statement: VECTRA International is an equal\-opportunity employer. We  

celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Join something  

bigger. Make a difference with VECTRA International.



Nice to Have  

* Experience with B2B SaaS, enterprise software, or professional services video marketing
* Background in supply chain, operations, sustainability, or enterprise transformation topics
* Experience creating thought leadership or educational video content

* Proficiency with multiple video editing platforms
* Experience with live streaming or webinar production
* Knowledge of SEO for video content and YouTube optimization
* Experience with video analytics and performance tracking
* Familiarity with marketing automation and CRM tools
* Certifications in video editing software or AI tools

title: PreSales Consultant Cybersecurity – Benelux (H/F)
description:
Description :

**Votre mission**
En tant que véritable expert technique avant\-vente, vous accompagnez les équipes commerciales tout au long du cycle de vente.


Vous analysez les besoins des clients, concevez les architectures techniques adaptées et démontrez la valeur des solutions de cybersécurité proposées.

**Vos principales responsabilités****Accompagnement avant\-vente*** Accompagner les équipes commerciales lors des rendez\-vous clients.
* Comprendre les besoins métiers et techniques des prospects.
* Réaliser les phases de découverte et d'analyse des environnements clients.
* Concevoir des architectures techniques adaptées aux cas d'usage.
* Présenter les solutions auprès d'interlocuteurs techniques et décisionnaires.
* Participer aux démonstrations techniques et Proof of Concept (PoC).
* Assurer un support technique pendant tout le cycle de vente.

**Expertise technique**
Vous interviendrez sur des solutions de :

* Protection des données.
* Chiffrement.
* Gestion des clés cryptographiques.
* Hardware Security Modules (HSM).
* Public Key Infrastructure (PKI).
* Data Security.
* Cloud Security.
* Key Management.


Vous serez également amené à :

* Configurer les solutions.
* Réaliser certaines personnalisations.
* Accompagner les intégrations avec des applications tierces.
* Travailler sur des API et interfaces de sécurité.
* Résoudre des problématiques techniques complexes.


Réponse aux appels d'offres* Rédiger des réponses techniques aux RFI et RFP.
* Produire des documents techniques.
* Rédiger des rapports de tests.
* Participer aux soutenances techniques.

**Les technologies recherchées**
Une solide expérience est attendue sur plusieurs des technologies suivantes :


Cybersécurité* Cryptographie.
* PKI.
* Certificats numériques.
* Digital Signatures.
* TLS.
* Chiffrement.
* Hashing.
* Gestion des clés.
* HSM.


APIs et bibliothèques* PKCS \#11\.
* Microsoft CSP/CNG.
* OpenSSL.
* Java JCA/JCE.


Virtualisation et Cloud* VMware.
* Hyper\-V.
* Xen.
* KVM.
* Docker.
* Cloud Foundry.
* Amazon AWS.
* Microsoft Azure.
* IBM Cloud.


Bases de données* Oracle.
* Microsoft SQL Server.
* IBM DB.
* MySQL.
* PostgreSQL.


Une expérience dans le domaine de l'audit ou de la supervision des bases de données est appréciée.


Scripting et développement* Développement ou scripting sous Windows.
* Développement ou scripting sous Linux.


SIEM / SOAR
Une connaissance des solutions suivantes constitue un réel atout :

* SIEM.
* SOAR.
* Incident Response.
* Security Monitoring.


Paiement sécurisé
Des connaissances dans les domaines suivants sont appréciées :

* EMV.
* PCI DSS.
* Payment Tokenization.
* 3D Secure 2\.0\.
* ANSI TR31\.
* ANSI TR34\.
* ANSI TR39\.
* ANSI X9\.24\.
* MEPS.
* APACS.
* ZKA.

  

Profil recherché :

**Profil recherché**
Vous justifiez d'au moins **5 années d'expérience** dans une fonction mêlant expertise technique et relation client dans le domaine de l'IT ou de la cybersécurité.


Vous êtes diplômé(e) d'une formation supérieure en :

* Informatique.
* Ingénierie.
* Systèmes d'information.
* Mathématiques.
* Ou domaine technique équivalent.


Une expérience équivalente pourra également être étudiée.

**Les critères indispensables*** Minimum 5 ans d'expérience en environnement IT ou cybersécurité.
* Solides connaissances en cryptographie et protection des données.
* Expérience Cloud et virtualisation.
* Connaissances des bases de données.
* Maîtrise des environnements Windows et Linux.
* Expérience de présentation auprès de clients.
* Capacité à rédiger une documentation technique.
* Goût pour les environnements techniques complexes.

**Langues**
Vous maîtrisez :

* Anglais courant (C1\) indispensable.
* Néerlandais professionnel (B1/B2\).
* Français professionnel (B1/B2\).


L'anglais sera utilisé quotidiennement.

**Les qualités recherchées**
Vous êtes reconnu pour :

* Votre curiosité technique.
* Votre excellent relationnel.
* Votre capacité à vulgariser des sujets complexes.
* Votre autonomie.
* Votre sens du service client.
* Votre capacité d'analyse.
* Votre esprit d'équipe.
* Votre goût pour les nouvelles technologies.
* Votre capacité d'apprentissage rapide.

**Organisation*** CDI.
* Basé en Belgique ou aux Pays\-Bas.
* Télétravail à 100 %.
* Déplacements jusqu'à 50 % du temps sur le Benelux.
* Aucun management.
* Intégration avec un parcours d'accompagnement 30 / 60 / 90 jours.
* Nombreuses certifications techniques internes.
* Horaires flexibles autour d'une journée de 8 heures.

**Rémunération et avantages*** Salaire annuel compris entre **60 000 € et 100 000 €** selon votre expérience.
* Véhicule de fonction.
* Carte carburant.
* Télétravail intégral.
* Tickets restaurant.
* Assurance santé.
* 12 jours de congés additionnels.
* Intéressement lié aux performances commerciales pouvant atteindre **36 000 €**.
* Équipements informatiques fournis.

**Pourquoi rejoindre cette opportunité ?*** Des projets internationaux à forte valeur technologique.
* Un environnement centré sur l'innovation et la cybersécurité.
* Une forte autonomie dans l'organisation du travail.
* Une exposition à des technologies de pointe en cryptographie, Cloud et protection des données.
* Un accompagnement structuré dès votre arrivée.
* Une équipe d'experts passionnés évoluant dans un contexte international.

**Processus de recrutement**
Le processus comprend plusieurs étapes :

* Échanges avec des consultants avant\-vente.
* Rencontre avec le management technique.
* Entretien avec le management commercial.
* Rencontre avec la Direction.
* Entretien RH.
* Mise en situation technique.
* Présentation commerciale (role play).


Vous souhaitez intervenir sur des projets stratégiques de cybersécurité et accompagner des clients dans la protection de leurs données critiques ? Cette opportunité vous permettra de mettre votre expertise technique au service d'un environnement international en pleine croissance.

title: Senior Manager, Marketing Operations, Data Intelligence & Automation (Remote based out of Europe)
description:
**Imagine yourself…**

* Growing your expertise in a global, innovative organization and leading transformational projects with real business impact
* Driving the future of Marketing Operations through data, technology and AI
* Building a high\-performing global team \& contributing to a more sustainable future

**About Esko**


Esko, a Veralto company, is a global leader in software and hardware solutions that help packaging and label companies bring products to market faster and more efficiently.


We are looking for a **Senior Manager, Marketing Operations, Data Intelligence \& Automation** to lead and evolve our global Marketing Operations function.


Reporting to the **Director of Digital Marketing**, you will lead a global team of six specialists across Marketing Operations, Automation and Analytics. You will play a key role in shaping our marketing technology landscape, data strategy, performance measurement, and AI\-driven transformation initiatives.

**What you'll do**

* Lead and develop Esko's global Marketing Operations, Automation, and Analytics team while driving the overall Marketing Operations strategy.
* Partner with marketing leadership to improve business performance through data\-driven decision\-making, operational excellence, and best practices.
* Own marketing analytics, reporting, dashboards, and business intelligence, translating data into actionable insights and recommendations.
* Drive marketing attribution, funnel performance, lead management, and ROI measurement to support pipeline growth and revenue generation.
* Lead the development and optimization of Esko's global marketing technology ecosystem, including key integrations and transformation initiatives.
* Ensure data quality, governance, and alignment across systems, with Salesforce as the trusted source of truth for marketing and sales performance.
* Accelerate Esko's AI\-driven marketing transformation by implementing innovative solutions that enhance automation, personalization, forecasting, reporting, and overall business impact.

**What we're looking for**

* Min of 2\+ years of proven leadership experience in Marketing Operations, Revenue Operations or Marketing Technology and 5\+ years relevant marketing experience
* Strong expertise in marketing automation, analytics, attribution and funnel management
* Experience managing complex MarTech ecosystems and technology integrations
* Strong knowledge of Salesforce and marketing data architecture
* Excellent analytical, reporting and data visualization skills
* Ability to translate complex data into clear business recommendations
* Experience driving large\-scale transformation and AI\-enabled initiatives in a global environment

**Why join Esko?**


Esko is part of **Veralto (NYSE: VLTO)**, a global organization with more than 17,000 associates dedicated to ensuring access to clean water, safe food, medicine and trusted essential goods.


When you join Esko, you'll have the opportunity to influence how marketing operates globally, work with cutting\-edge technologies, and help shape the future of data\-driven and AI\-enabled marketing.

**Together, we're Safeguarding the World's Most Vital Resources™ while building rewarding careers along the way.**

**Unsolicited Assistance**


We do not accept unsolicited assistance from any headhunters or recruitment firms for any of our job openings. All resumes or profiles submitted by search firms to any employee at any of the Veralto companies, in any form without a valid, signed search agreement in place for the specific position, approved by Talent Acquisition, will be deemed the sole property of Veralto and its companies. No fee will be paid in the event the candidate is hired by Veralto and its companies because of the unsolicited referral.


At Veralto, we value diversity and the existence of similarities and differences, both visible and not, found in our workforce, workplace and throughout the markets we serve. Our associates, customers and shareholders contribute unique and different perspectives as a result of these diverse attributes.

 **Unsolicited Assistance**


We do not accept unsolicited assistance from any headhunters or recruitment firms for any of our job openings. All resumes or profiles submitted by search firms to any employee at any of the Veralto companies, in any form without a valid, signed search agreement in place for the specific position, approved by Talent Acquisition, will be deemed the sole property of Veralto and its companies. No fee will be paid in the event the candidate is hired by Veralto and its companies because of the unsolicited referral.

title: Project Manager
description:
**The Opportunity:**

An effective project requires a manager who is passionate about guiding it through the complexities of its lifecycle. It requires someone who is dedicated to identifying challenges, mitigating risks, and supporting a team with vision and focus. That’s why we need you, a seasoned project manager who can ensure the customer's transformational efforts are successful.


The Project Manager oversees the performance of the team, ensuring alignment across all project phases and workstrands . This role is responsible for tracking progress, resolving challenges, and serving as the primary liaison with the Government lead and workstrand owners. The Project Manager drives organizational effectiveness by integrating strategic planning, performance management, and stakeholder engagement, ensuring that all objectives are met and that the team operates cohesively.  

  



**How You'll Contribute:**

* Lead and coordinate cross\-functional teams to deliver project objectives , ensuring alignment across phases and workstrands
* Manage the project’s scope, schedule, and cost to ensure all deliverables are completed on time, within budget, and in alignment with defined objectives
* Track project progress, identify risks, and resolve challenges proactively
* Serve as the primary point of contact for the Government lead and workstrand owners, facilitating communication and collaboration
* Develop and implement strategic plans, monitor performance metrics, and drive continuous improvement
* Foster stakeholder engagement through regular updates, feedback sessions, and collaborative problem\-solving
* Ensure compliance with organizational policies, procedures, and security requirements
* Prepare and deliver clear, actionable reports and presentations to senior leadership
* Leverage skills in p rogram and project management in complex, multinational or joint environments, c ross\-functional collaboration and team leadership, s takeholder engagement and relationship management, p erformance management and process optimization, and strategic planning and execution

Join us. The world can't wait.

  

**You Have:**

* 10\+ years of experience in program or project management
* Experience with organizational transformation, change management, or strategic planning
* Experience in Microsoft Office suite, including Outlook, Word, PowerPoint, Excel, Visio, or SharePoint
* Ability to deliver results with limited oversight and broad objectives
* Ability to travel internationally up to 25%
* Secret clearance
* Bachelor’s degree

**Nice If You Have:**

* 10\+ years of experience in program or project management in defense, government, or multinational environments preferred
* Possession of excellent verbal and written communication skills
* PMP certification preferred

**Clearance:**

Applicants selected will be subject to a security investigation and may need to meet eligibility requirements for access to classified information; Secret clearance is required.


**Compensation**

At Booz Allen, we celebrate your contributions, provide you with opportunities and choices, and support your total well\-being. Our offerings include health, life, disability, financial, and retirement benefits, as well as paid leave, professional development, tuition assistance, work\-life programs, and dependent care. Our recognition awards program acknowledges employees for exceptional performance and superior demonstration of our values. Full\-time and part\-time employees working at least 20 hours a week on a regular basis are eligible to participate in Booz Allen’s benefit programs. Individuals that do not meet the threshold are only eligible for select offerings, not inclusive of health benefits. We encourage you to learn more about our total benefits by visiting the Resource page on our Careers site and reviewing Our Employee Benefits page.


Salary at Booz Allen is determined by various factors, including but not limited to location, the individual’s particular combination of education, knowledge, skills, competencies, and experience, as well as contract\-specific affordability and organizational requirements. The projected compensation range for this position is $99,000\.00 to $225,000\.00 (annualized USD). The estimate displayed represents the typical salary range for this position and is just one component of Booz Allen’s total compensation package for employees. This posting will close within 90 days from the Posting Date.
**Identity Statement**

As part of the hiring process, we will ask you to complete an identity verification process that leverages advanced biometrics and artificial intelligence to ensure authenticity and protect against identity fraud. You are expected to be on camera during interviews and assessments. We reserve the right to take your picture to verify your identity and prevent fraud.


**Candidate AI Usage Policy**

AI is a part of our daily work at Booz Allen, and we are committed to the responsible and ethical use of AI tools. However, we want to ensure a fair candidate process based on **your** own skills and knowledge. As part of this commitment, the use of artificial intelligence (AI) or other tools to assist with responses during interviews (whether in\-person or virtual) is prohibited **unless permission is explicitly provided** .


**Work Model**  

Our people\-first culture prioritizes the benefits of collaboration, whether it occurs in person or virtually. To support engagement and effective communication, employees working virtually are generally expected to have their cameras on during meetings.


* **Remote** : If this position is listed as remote, there may still be occasions when you are required to work in person at a Booz Allen or customer facility.
* **Hybrid** : If this position is listed as hybrid, you will be expected to work from a Booz Allen facility frequently, in alignment with leadership expectations and the needs of the role. You may also be required to work from or visit a customer facility.
* **Onsite** : If this position is listed as onsite, work will primarily be performed at a Booz Allen office or customer facility, where employees will collaborate directly with colleagues and customers as required by the role.

**Commitment to Non\-Discrimination**

All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to disability, status as a protected veteran or any other status protected by applicable federal, state, local, or international law.

title: Data Engineer Python
description:
Descripción de la empresa  

Porque trabajar en Sopra Steria, también es sentir **Sopra Steria**.


Somos un reconocido líder europeo en consultoría, servicios digitales y desarrollo de software, con cerca de 56\.000 empleados en casi 30 países y más de 4\.000 en España.  

Nos enfocamos en las personas, en su formación y desarrollo profesional, lo que nos impulsa a crecer y mejorar constantemente.


Tenemos pasión por lo digital y al igual que tú, buscamos la mejor de las aventuras. Queremos que tu día a día se convierta en la mejor de tus inspiraciones. Que aprendas, aportes, te diviertas, crezcas y que, sobre todo, disfrutes al máximo.


Si quieres formar parte de un equipo “**Great Place to Work**”, ¡Sigue leyendo!

  

Descripción del empleo  

¿Qué reto proponemos?  

Data Engineer con conocimientos en Python para proyecto de desarrollo de un nuevo producto

  

Requisitos  

¿Qué buscamos?


Conocimientos de Python para analítica de datos y desarrollo de APIs (fastAPI).  

Conocimientos de git/github y desarrollo de software siguiendo metodologías modernas.  

Conocimientos de dashboarding, idealmente con el stack elasticsearch/ Kibana  

Deseable conocimiento de Machine Learning / LLMs  

Deseables conocimientos de Java y Spring boot para desarrollo de APIs/microservicios para productos de datos.  



  

Información adicional  

¿Qué tenemos para ti?

* Contrato indefinido y jornada completa
* 23 días de vacaciones
* Formación continua: competencias técnicas, transversales y de idiomas. Contamos con acceso a certificaciones, formaciones de los principales Partners Tecnológicos, plataformas online y ¡mucho más!
* Seguro de vida y de accidentes
* Posibilidad de acogerte a nuestra retribución flexible (seguro médico, cheques guarderías, transporte, comida y formación)
* Acceso a Privilege Club, donde encontrarás descuentos interesantes en las principales marcas
* Onboarding personalizado y detallado. Te acompañamos en todo momento para que te sientas \#soprano desde el primer momento.
* Oficina con espacios reservados al ocio. ¡Trabajo y diversión unido!
* Compañerismo y buen ambiente, el poder de la unión lo tenemos presente.


Y lo más importante…Tienes la posibilidad de desarrollar tu carrera profesional con nosotros: Crearemos juntos un plan de carrera personalizado. Te formarás, marcaremos objetivos y llevaremos a cabo un seguimiento para asegurarnos de que lo conseguimos juntos. Escuchamos tus prioridades y luchamos por ellas.


¡Aquí tu voz importa! ¡Únete a nosotros y sé parte de algo más!

**The world is how we shape it**

  

En Sopra Steria estamos comprometidos con la creación de un entorno diverso e inclusivo, evaluando cada candidatura de forma objetiva, en base a sus competencias y experiencia. Creemos firmemente que la diversidad de experiencias y perspectivas es lo que impulsa nuestra innovación.

title: Structural Simulation Engineer for R&T projects
description:
**Job Description:**

Airbus Helicopters, a division of Airbus, is a global leader in the civil and military rotorcraft market.


Its mission is to provide civil and military helicopter solutions to its customers who serve and protect citizens, save lives and safely carry passengers in highly demanding environments.


Airbus Helicopters masters the complete helicopter value chain, from design and development, to industrialisation, production and support and services. It aims to ensure safety, quality, competitiveness and mission availability.


Airbus Helicopters España S.A. (AHE) integrates the Rotorcraft activities in Spain being a tractor company of other Spanish entities that participate in the Rotatory wing Aircraft Industry.


EBSTIF perform Design and Stress activities participating in all the phases of the product, from specification to customer in\-service support: conceptual and detail design, support to production (non\-conformity assessment, generation of documentation needed for manufacturing, etc.), support to testing activities, generation of evidences for certification/qualification purposes and costumer support.


We are seeking a Structural Simulation Engineer to join our dynamic team to perform advanced Research \& Technology (R\&T) activities participating in the conceptual phases of product and technology development.
 

In this role, you will bridge the gap between advanced structural mechanics and data science, developing next\-generation methodologies for composite, metallic, and thermoplastic structures. You will perform highly specialized FEA/FEM simulation activities and lead the digital transformation of our structural department by implementing Python programming to automate, accelerate, and simplify calculation methods.


**The ideal candidate will have the following skills and aptitudes:**

* An innovative mindset and a natural curiosity about new technology
* The ability to challenge and improve traditional stress and structural calculation processes and propose disruptive solutions.
* A real affinity for digital topics and a hands\-on approach to advanced simulation and coding toolsets.
* Deep understanding of advanced structural mechanics, non\-linear structural behavior, vibrations/dynamics and failure modes.
* Expertise in high\-velocity dynamics, impact physics, and damage tolerance.
* Strong programming and automation skills (Python).
* High tolerance for ambiguity: Ability to work with open\-ended problems and undefined requirements typical of early\-stage research.
* Proactive in identifying emerging industry trends (AI, advanced materials)
* Very good communication and presentation skills to lead discussions on issues, simulation results, innovative ideas, and status of work.
* Ability to work in a fast\-paced environment with changing priorities and requirements.
* Rigor, analytical thinking, and high organization skills.

**As a Structural Simulation Engineer you will develop the challenging tasks and activities:**

* **Advanced FEA Simulation:** Perform complex linear, non\-linear (material, geometric, and contact), and dynamic structural simulations utilizing the Altair HyperWorks suite (HyperMesh, HyperCrash, HyperGraph).
* **High\-Velocity Dynamics \& Impact Analysis:** Lead highly specialized simulation tasks including ballistic impact, bird strike analysis, and transient dynamic events using RADIOSS.
* **Vibrations Analysis:** Conduct advanced dynamic analysis, including modal, harmonic, and random vibration simulations (frequency response analysis) to ensure structural integrity under dynamic environments using OptiStruct / RADIOSS.
* **Test\-to\-Analysis Correlation:** Design and execute model correlation workflows to match FEM simulation results with physical test data (e.g., coupon tests, vibration tests, impact tests), updating and validating the FE models for certification.
* **Damage Tolerance \& Materials:** Conduct structural analysis for crack growth propagation in both composite and metallic structures, as well as simulation of specialized joints, specifically thermoplastic welded joints.
* **Process Automation \& Software Best Practices:** Develop, optimize, and maintain automated workflows, pre/post\-processing scripts, and analytical calculation tools using Python.
* **Cross\-functional Collaboration:** Contribute actively in close collaboration with all involved stakeholders (design, testing, manufacturing engineering, and quality) to ensure structural compliance and certification readiness.
* Identify and support local improvement initiatives to increase team efficiency through process, methods and tools improvements.

**Qualified experience and training:**

* **Education:** Master’s degree in Aeronautical, Aerospace, Mechanical, or Industrial Engineer (or similar discipline with a strong focus on structural mechanics and computational methods).
* **Experience level:** Minimum 5–8 years of proven experience in advanced structural simulation (FEM) using Altair HyperWorks, with strong demonstrated experience in Python development
* **Desirable:**

Experience in test data processing and comparison with FEA models.


Experience in AI \& Machine Learning Integration would be a plus: Implementation of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning methodologies (such as Surrogate Models / Metamodels or Physics\-Informed Neural Networks) to automate complex calculation methods, simplify repetitive tasks, and optimize structural designs via OptiStruct.


* **Languages:** Advanced level of English Language.

This job requires an awareness of any potential compliance risks and a commitment to act with integrity, as the foundation for the Company’s success, reputation and sustainable growth.


**Company:**

Airbus Helicopters España, SA
**Employment Type:**

Permanent
\-


**Experience Level:**

Professional
**Job Family:**

Structure \& Dynamic Systems Analysis \<JF\-EN\-EN\>
By submitting your CV or application you are consenting to Airbus using and storing information about you for monitoring purposes relating to your application or future employment. This information will only be used by Airbus.
  

Airbus is committed to achieving workforce diversity and creating an inclusive working environment. We welcome all applications irrespective of social and cultural background, age, gender, disability, sexual orientation or religious belief.


Airbus is, and always has been, committed to equal opportunities for all. As such, we will never ask for any type of monetary exchange in the frame of a recruitment process. Any impersonation of Airbus to do so should be reported to emsom@airbus.com .


At Airbus, we support you to work, connect and collaborate more easily and flexibly. Wherever possible, we foster flexible working arrangements to stimulate innovative thinking.

Schwarz Digits creates the technological foundation for digital sovereignty in Europe. As the IT and digital division of the Schwarz Group, we develop and manage the IT infrastructures for the retail divisions Lidl and Kaufland, as well as Schwarz Production and PreZero. At the same time, we operate as an independent provider in the external market to support companies across Europe in their digital transformation. We bundle our core services in the areas of Cloud, Cyber Security, Data \& AI, Communication, and Workspace.
  

  

Join us and contribute to digital sovereignty in Europe. With us, you will work at the intersection of agility and security: You will benefit from fast decision\-making processes, enjoy genuine creative freedom in your projects, and be able to build upon the stable foundation of the Schwarz Group.
### **Your tasks**


* We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Data Engineer to join our team. In this role, you will be involved in building scalable data solutions, driving data operations, and developing statistical and machine learning algorithms that deliver real business value.
* This is an exciting opportunity for someone who thrives in dynamic, agile environments and is passionate about using data to solve complex problems.
* Design, build, and maintain batch and real\-time data pipelines.
* Conduct data operations, including exploration, provisioning, cleaning, testing, and ALM.
* Develop and implement algorithms in statistics and machine learning.
* Collaborate closely with business stakeholders to translate requirements into technical solutions.
* Ensure data integrity, quality, and availability across all systems.
* Extract actionable business insights.
### **Your profile**


* Must\-have: Programming languages: Python, SQL.
* Must\-have: Experience with Big Data frameworks such as Spark, Kafka, Kubernetes, Hive.
* Must\-have: Familiarity with relational (e.g., SQL Server) and non\-relational databases (e.g., MongoDB, ELK, Cassandra).
* Agile methodology experience.
* Nice\-to\-have: Knowledge of Machine Learning tools: Scikit\-Learn, Pandas, Spark ML, MLflow.
* Nice\-to\-have: Knowledge of deploying infrastructure and devops.
* Nice\-to\-have: Experience in .NET.
* Passion for continuous learning and staying up to date with emerging technologies.
* Creative, innovative thinker with a proactive mindset.
* Strong problem\-solving skills and ability to adapt quickly to change.
* Collaborative spirit with excellent communication skills.
* Comfortable working in a multi\-cultural environment with fluency in English.

title: Data Scientist
description:
**About HappyRobot**
--------------------


HappyRobot is the infrastructure for enterprises to build and orchestrate AI workforces. Our AI workers don't just communicate \- they make decisions, take action, and run operations autonomously across voice, email, and enterprise systems. Born in Y Combinator (S23\) and backed by a16z and Base10 with over $60M raised, we power critical operations for global enterprises worldwide.

  

Our platform is battle\-tested in the most demanding environments \- where AI has real consequences. We started in logistics, built our own voice stack, models, and orchestration layer from the ground up, and are now bringing that infrastructure to every enterprise that runs the real economy. Learn more about our vision in our manifesto.

**About the Role**
------------------


You’ll help make data a core part of how we build and improve HappyRobot’s products.


You’ll work closely with Product, Engineering, and Machine Learning teams to measure how changes to our models, agents, and product features affect real\-world performance. You’ll define meaningful metrics, design experiments, and conduct deeper analyses to understand how our agents create value for clients.


Your work will range from evaluating A/B tests and model changes to analyzing millions of conversations and workflows. You’ll turn complex data into clear insights that influence our product and ML roadmaps.

**What You’ll Do**
------------------

* Define and track product, feature, and agent\-level metrics.
* Design, run, and interpret A/B tests for model changes, prompts, agent behavior, workflows, and product features.
* Measure how the performance of our agents affects client outcomes, such as task completion, operational efficiency, response quality, and automation rates.
* Connect offline model evaluations with production performance and real\-world customer impact.
* Conduct deep analyses across conversations, workflows, and product usage to identify opportunities and explain differences in performance.
* Investigate anomalies and regressions, perform root\-cause analyses, and recommend improvements.
* Build statistical models, simulations, and analytical frameworks to support product and ML decisions.
* Partner with Engineering to improve instrumentation, data quality, experimentation systems, and analytical data models.
* Build dashboards and self\-serve tools that help teams understand product and agent performance.
* Communicate findings and recommendations clearly to technical and non\-technical stakeholders.

**Must Have**
-------------

* 4\+ years of experience in Data Science, Product Analytics, or another highly quantitative product role.
* Strong experience with experimental design, A/B testing, statistics, causal inference, and hypothesis\-driven analysis.
* Advanced proficiency in SQL and Python.
* Experience defining and operationalizing product and feature metrics.
* Ability to translate ambiguous product questions into rigorous analyses and actionable recommendations.
* Strong product instincts and the ability to distinguish statistical significance from meaningful product or customer impact.
* Experience partnering closely with Product, Engineering, or Machine Learning teams.
* Strong written and verbal communication skills.
* High attention to detail and commitment to analytical accuracy.
* Founder mindset: ownership, independence, curiosity, and willingness to go deep.

**Nice to Have**
----------------

* Experience working with large language models, AI agents, generative AI, or other probabilistic ML products.
* Experience measuring the production impact of model, prompt, retrieval, or orchestration changes.
* Familiarity with ML evaluation systems and the relationship between offline evaluations and online metrics.
* Experience analyzing conversational, NLP, speech, or other unstructured data.
* Experience with enterprise or B2B products.
* Experience combining quantitative analysis with qualitative methods such as conversation reviews, customer feedback, surveys, or user research.
* Familiarity with modern analytics infrastructure, data warehouses, experimentation platforms, and business intelligence tools.
* Prior experience in a fast\-growing startup or other highly ambiguous environment.

**Why join us?**
----------------

* Opportunity to work at a **high\-growth AI startup**, backed by top investors.
* **Rapidly growing and backed by top investors including a16z, Y Combinator, and Base10\.**
* **Ownership \& Autonomy** \- Take full ownership of projects and ship fast.
* **Top\-Tier Compensation** \- Competitive **salary \+ equity** in a high\-growth startup.
* **Comprehensive Benefits** \- **Healthcare, dental, vision** coverage.
* **Work With the Best** \- Join a world\-class team of engineers and builders

 **Our Operating Principles**

 ***Extreme Ownership***

We take full responsibility for our work, outcomes, and team success. No excuses, no blame\-shifting — if something needs fixing, we own it and make it better. This means stepping up, even when it’s not “your job.” If a ball is dropped, we pick it up. If a customer is unhappy, we fix it. If a process is broken, we redesign it. We don’t wait for someone else to solve it — we lead with accountability and expect the same from those around us.

  

***Craftsmanship***

Putting care and intention into every task, striving for excellence, and taking deep ownership of the quality and outcome of your work. Craftsmanship means never settling for “just fine.” We sweat the details because details compound. Whether it’s a product feature, an internal doc, or a sales call — we treat it as a reflection of our standards. We aim to deliver jaw\-dropping customer experiences by being curious, meticulous, and proud of what we build — even when nobody’s watching.

  

***We are “majos”***  

Be friendly \& have fun with your coworkers. Always be genuine \& honest, but kind. “Majo” is our way of saying: be a good human. Be approachable, helpful, and warm. We’re building something ambitious, and it’s easier (and more fun) when we enjoy the ride together. We give feedback with kindness, challenge each other with respect, and celebrate wins together without ego.

  

***Urgency with Focus***  

Create the highest impact in the shortest amount of time. Move fast, but in the right direction. We operate with speed because time is our most limited resource. But speed without focus is chaos. We prioritize ruthlessly, act decisively, and stay aligned. We aim for high leverage: the biggest results from the simplest, smartest actions. We’re running a high\-speed marathon — not a sprint with no strategy.

  

***Talent Density and Meritocracy***  

Hire only people who can raise the average; ‘exceptional performance is the passing grade.’ Ability trumps seniority. We believe the best teams are built on talent density — every hire should raise the bar. We reward contribution, not titles or tenure. We give ownership to those who earn it, and we all hold each other to a high standard. A\-players want to work with other A\-players — that’s how we win.

  

***First\-Principles Thinking***  

Strip a problem to physics\-level facts, ignore industry dogma, rebuild the solution from scratch. We don’t copy\-paste solutions. We go back to basics, ask why things are the way they are, and rebuild from the ground up if needed. This mindset pushes us to innovate, challenge stale assumptions, and move faster than incumbents. It’s how we build what others think is impossible.

 *The personal data provided in your application and during the selection process will be processed by HappyRobot, Inc., acting as Data Controller.*

*By sending us your CV, you consent to the processing of your personal data for the purpose of evaluating and selecting you as a candidate for the position. Your personal data will be treated confidentially and will only be used for the recruitment process of the selected job offer.*

*In relation to the period of conservation of your personal data, these will be eliminated after three months of inactivity in compliance with the GDPR and legislation on the protection of personal data.*

*If you wish to exercise your rights of access, rectification, deletion, portability or opposition in relation to your personal data, you can do so through security@happyrobot.ai subject to the GDPR.*

*For more information, visit* *https://www.happyrobot.ai/privacy\-policy*

*By submitting your request, you confirm that you have read and understood this clause and that you agree to the processing of your personal data as described.*
