title: Senior Software Engineer - Cloud Partner Integrations
description:
### **About ClickHouse**



Recognized on the 2025 Forbes Cloud 100 list, ClickHouse is one of the most innovative and fast\-growing private cloud companies. With more than 3,000 customers and ARR that has grown over 250 percent year over year, ClickHouse leads the market in real\-time analytics, data warehousing, observability, and AI workloads.



The company's sustained, accelerating momentum was recently validated by a $400M Series D financing round. Over the past three months, customers including Capital One, Lovable, Decagon, Polymarket, and Airwallex have adopted the platform or expanded existing deployments. These customers join an established base of AI innovators and global brands such as Meta, Cursor, Sony, and Tesla.



We're on a mission to transform how companies use data. Come be a part of our journey!

**About the team**
------------------



Most providers make customers migrate their data to them. We're doing the opposite: bringing ClickHouse Cloud into the environments our customers already trust, so their data stays useful right where it lives.



Those environments come in a few shapes. Some are major cloud data platforms that run ClickHouse as a native service, so customers get it without leaving the tool they already use. Some are BI and visualization tools that need ClickHouse to show up as a fast, first\-class data source behind their dashboards. And some are developer and data platforms we connect through marketplaces and identity federation with a couple of clicks to link an account. The goal is the same every time: ClickHouse should feel like a first\-class citizen in every environment.



As the founding backend engineer, you'll set the technical defaults for this team. You'll have end\-to\-end ownership, but you'll also work inside the constraints of platforms you don't own: thin documentation, unfamiliar deployment topologies, and timelines governed by partner approval cycles. A lot of the challenge is engineering across trust boundaries you don't fully control. You won't be doing it alone. You'll work closely with the team's engineering manager and a small founding group that will grow around you, but you'll be the one setting the technical direction. If that sounds like your kind of challenge, let's talk.


**What you'll do**
------------------



You'll own an integration end to end: the design, the code, and the production system that keeps running after launch. You're setting the technical defaults a growing team will inherit, so the early decisions matter.



Day to day, that looks like:


* Owning the architecture: auth and identity flows, multi\-tenancy, how data moves and where it's allowed to live, performance, and what happens in production
* Running what you build. You'll be on\-call for your own work from early on, before there's a dedicated platform to lean on, which means owning the infrastructure, CI, deployment, and observability behind it
* Working on top of external platforms you can't change, and being straight about which risks are yours to manage and which aren't
* Partnering closely with the internal teams whose services you depend on: asking clearly, agreeing on interfaces, and finding ways to keep moving instead of waiting around to be unblocked


We'd also expect you to have opinions about where this should go, and to write them down. A lot of what shapes the team's direction starts as a doc.


**About you**
-------------



You don't need to have experience of every single point, but these are the attributes of someone who will perform well in this role:


* 5\+ years building software, with a good chunk of it on data\-heavy or integration\-flavored systems
* Solid backend and systems instincts. You can reason about deployment topology, multi\-tenancy, and data movement, and you're comfortable owning architectural tradeoffs you'll have to live with later
* You've worked with modern auth protocols, service principals, and identity federation, and you know how to get it right across a trust boundary
* You've built on someone else's platform and know what that's actually like: incomplete docs, unintended breaking changes, etc.
* You're comfortable in ambiguity. You can ship before the spec is finished, make sensible calls under uncertainty, and flag the decisions that'll be hard to undo instead of quietly baking them in.
* You're good with other engineers. Much of the work runs through teams you don't own, and you earn their trust by how you think, not just what you commit.
* You're mainly a backend engineer, but you're comfortable enough in JavaScript / TypeScript to jump in when it helps
* You use AI tools well and honestly. Reach for Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, or whatever helps, and be clear about where you did and didn't
* You write well. Most of how we coordinate happens in design docs, PRs, and RFCs

**Nice to have**
----------------



None of these are required, but any of them would be a bonus:


* Familiarity with a major cloud data or analytics platform ecosystem
* Real depth in auth and identity federation, or experience shipping through a partner marketplace or certification process
* Experience designing multi\-tenant SaaS platforms, or the isolation and deployment topology behind them
* Working knowledge of ClickHouse, or another columnar / OLAP engine

### **Compensation**



For roles based in the **United States**, the typical starting salary range for this position is listed above. In certain locations, such as the San Francisco Bay Area and the New York City Metro Area, a premium market range may apply, as listed.



These salary ranges reflect what we reasonably and in good faith believe to be the minimum and maximum pay for this role at the time of posting. The actual compensation may be higher or lower than the amounts listed, and the ranges may be subject to future adjustments.



An individual's placement within the range will depend on various factors, including (but not limited to) education, qualifications, certifications, experience, skills, location, performance, and the needs of the business or organization.



If you have any questions or comments about compensation as a candidate, please get in touch with us at paytransparency@clickhouse.com.


### **Perks**


* **Flexible work environment** \- ClickHouse is a globally distributed company and remote\-friendly. We currently operate in over 20 countries.
* **Healthcare** \- Employer contributions towards your healthcare.
* **Equity in the company** \- Every new team member who joins our company receives stock options.
* **Time off** \- Flexible time off in the US, generous entitlement in other countries.
* **A $500 Home office setup** if you're a remote employee.
* **Global Gatherings** – We believe in the power of in\-person connection and offer opportunities to engage with colleagues at company\-wide offsites.


**Culture \- We All Shape It**



As part of a rapidly scaling start up, you will be instrumental in shaping our culture.



Are you interested in finding out more about our culture? Learn more about our values here. Check out our blog posts or follow us on LinkedIn to find out more about what's happening at ClickHouse.


**Equal Opportunity \& Privacy**



ClickHouse provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type based on factors such as race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws.



Please see here for our Privacy Statement.

Schwarz Digits schafft das technologische Fundament für digitale Entscheidungsfreiheit in Europa. Als IT\- und Digitalsparte der Schwarz Gruppe entwickeln und verantworten wir einerseits die IT\-Infrastrukturen für die Handelssparten Lidl und Kaufland sowie die Schwarz Produktion und PreZero. Gleichzeitig agieren wir als unabhängiger Anbieter am externen Markt, um Unternehmen in ganz Europa bei ihrer digitalen Transformation zu unterstützen. Unsere Kernleistungen bündeln wir in den Bereichen Cloud, Cyber Security, Data \& AI, Communication und Workspace. Trage auch du zur digitalen Entscheidungsfreiheit in Europa bei.
  

  

Bei uns arbeitest du an der Schnittstelle zwischen Agilität und Sicherheit: Du profitierst von den schnellen Entscheidungswegen, genießt echte Gestaltungsspielräume in deinen Projekten und baust dabei auf das stabile Fundament der Schwarz Gruppe.


### **Deine Aufgaben**


* Design und Infrastruktur: Du konzipierst und implementierst skalierbare Lösungen, um unseren Kunden Kubernetes\-Dienste bereitzustellen, und übernimmst dabei die Verantwortung für die gesamte umliegende Infrastruktur (Compute, Netzwerk, Storage und APIs)
* Betrieb \& Problemlösung: Du stellst den reibungslosen Betrieb des Dienstes sicher, indem Du komplexe technische Probleme analysierst, gründliche Ursachenanalysen (Root\-Cause\-Analysen) durchführst und nachhaltige Lösungen implementierst
* Sicherheit \& Compliance: Du treibst die Clustersicherheit und \-compliance voran, entwickelst robuste Richtlinien (wie RBAC, Network Policies und Kyverno) und implementierst fortgeschrittene Sicherheitsmaßnahmen (u. a. Falco, Image\-Scanning und Audit\-Logging)
* Operator\-Entwicklung \& Automatisierung: Du erweiterst und automatisierst die Kubernetes\-Plattform, indem Du maßgeschneiderte Operator, Controller und Custom Resource Definitions (CRDs) in Go entwickelst und gleichzeitig die Plattformbereitstellung über GitOps\-Workflows optimierst
* Teamarbeit \& Dokumentation: Du arbeitest eng mit funktionsübergreifenden Experten zusammen und pflegst eine klare, lückenlose Dokumentation, um die Abstimmung im Team und einen nahtlosen Wissenstransfer zu gewährleisten
### **Dein Profil**


* Softwareentwicklung \& Go: Mehrjährige Erfahrung in der Softwareentwicklung, mit fundierten Kenntnissen in Go (Golang) und nachweislicher Erfahrung in der Entwicklung von benutzerdefinierten Kubernetes\-Operatoren, Controllern und CRDs
* Plattform\-Architektur \& Betrieb: Eine „You Build It – You Run It!“\-Mentalität, gestützt auf praktische Erfahrung im Betrieb von Linux\-Servern und der Administration von Kubernetes\-Clustern von Grund auf. Du besitzt ein tiefes Verständnis der K8s\-Internals, von Cloud\-Networking, Storage und API\-Design
* Kubernetes\-Orchestrierung: Vertrautheit mit Orchestrierungswerkzeugen des K8s\-Ökosystems – vorzugsweise Gardener oder ClusterAPI –, um Multi\-Cluster\-Umgebungen effektiv zu verwalten und zu skalieren
* Open\-Source\-Zusammenarbeit: Erfahrung mit oder starkes Interesse an der aktiven Mitarbeit in der Open\-Source\-Community sowie der Übernahme von Verantwortung für Features und der Abstimmung von Entwicklungen mit anderen Community\-Mitgliedern
* Kommunikation \& Sprachen: Hervorragende Englischkenntnisse für eine erfolgreiche Zusammenarbeit in unseren internationalen, agilen Teams; Deutschkenntnisse sind ein wertvolles Plus

**Dein Ansprechpartner**
------------------------


### **Tim Kübler**


Recruiter


* E\-Mail:recruiting@mail.schwarz
**Dein Bewerbungsprozess im Überblick**
---------------------------------------


1
### **Bewerbung**


Wir lieben die Einfachheit. Bewirb dich schnell und unkompliziert digital, gerne auch ohne Registrierung.
2
### **Checkup**


Gemeinsam mit dem zuständigen Fachbereich werfen wir einen Blick in deine Unterlagen.
3
### **Kennenlernen**


Bei einem ersten Kennenlernen liegt der Fokus sowohl auf deiner Persönlichkeit als auch auf deiner fachlichen Eignung.
4
### **Vertragsangebot**


Haben wir uns gegenseitig überzeugt? Dann ist dein Arbeitsvertrag digital per Mail auf dem Weg zu dir.
5
### **Willkommen**


Dein erster Arbeitstag bei uns steht an und dein individuelles Onboarding im Team startet. Wir freuen uns auf dich!

title: Senior Kubernetes Engineer (m/f/d)
description:
* **Location**
------------


Am Campus 1
  

74177 Bad Friedrichshall
* **Employment Area**
-------------------


IT \- Cloud Services
* **Level**
---------


Experienced professional
* **Working Model**
-----------------


Full\-time
* **Reference ID**
----------------


4121
Schwarz Digits creates the technological foundation for digital sovereignty in Europe. As the IT and digital division of the Schwarz Group, we develop and manage the IT infrastructures for the retail divisions Lidl and Kaufland, as well as Schwarz Production and PreZero. At the same time, we operate as an independent provider in the external market to support companies across Europe in their digital transformation. We bundle our core services in the areas of Cloud, Cyber Security, Data \& AI, Communication, and Workspace.
  

  

Join us and contribute to digital sovereignty in Europe. With us, you will work at the intersection of agility and security: You will benefit from fast decision\-making processes, enjoy genuine creative freedom in your projects, and be able to build upon the stable foundation of the Schwarz Group.


### **Your Tasks**


* Design and Infrastructure: Architect and implement scalable solutions that bring Kubernetes services to our customers, taking ownership of the surrounding infrastructure landscape (compute, networking, storage, and APIs)
* Operations \& Problem Solving: Ensure the smooth operation of the service by analyzing complex technical issues, performing thorough root\-cause analysis, and implementing lasting solutions
* Security \& Compliance: Drive cluster security and compliance, developing robust policies (such as RBAC, Network Policies, and Kyverno) and implementing advanced measures (including Falco, image scanning, and audit logging)
* Operator Development \& Automation: Extend and automate the Kubernetes platform by designing and developing custom operators, controllers, and Custom Resource Definitions (CRDs) in Go, while streamlining platform delivery via GitOps workflows
* Teamwork \& Documentation: Partner closely with cross\-functional experts and maintain clear, thorough documentation to ensure team alignment and seamless knowledge sharing
### **Your Profile**


* Software Development \& Go: Several years of experience in software engineering, with a strong proficiency in Go (Golang) and a proven track record of developing custom Kubernetes operators, controllers, and CRDs
* Platform Architecture \& Operations: A "You Build It \- You Run It!" mindset backed by hands\-on experience operating Linux servers and administering Kubernetes clusters from scratch. You possess a deep understanding of K8s internals, cloud networking, storage, and API design
* Kubernetes Orchestration: Familiarity with ecosystem orchestrators \- preferably Gardener or ClusterAPI \- to effectively manage and scale multi\-cluster environments
* Open Source Collaboration: Experience with or a strong interest in actively contributing to the open\-source community, taking ownership of features, and coordinating developments with other community members
* Communication \& Languages: Excellent English skills to ensure successful collaboration within our international, agile teams; working knowledge of German is a valuable plus

Recruiter

title: Senior GenAI Engineer (m/f/d) – with salary details
description:
We are Covestro. We are curious. We are courageous. We are colorful. We refine chemical material solutions with game\-changing products. Let us empower you to push boundaries. Join us and our 18\.000 colleagues now and together we will make the world a brighter place.

**Are you ready to take ownership of AI solutions at scale – not just build them?**


In our agile **AI, Advanced Analytics \& Autonomy** team, you will develop, deploy and operate our agentic AI platform at Covestro, with direct influence on the technical direction of our AI capabilities.


You will work in an interdisciplinary environment with interfaces to R\&D, manufacturing, supply chain and internal support functions as well as external partners, vendors and research institutions.


In addition to our wide range of benefits, a full\-time position offers an attractive starting salary between **€104,800/year and €127,100/year** plus a variable component. The starting salary depends on your qualifications and professional experience.

**What you will do in detail:**

* You lead the technical delivery of large\-scale Generative \& Agentic AI products, guiding a team of engineers through the full software development lifecycle – from architecture decisions and prototyping all the way to production and long\-term operations
* Complex product goals are broken down by you into well\-scoped technical increments, making smart trade\-offs between technical excellence, feature delivery and speed
* You own the architecture and technical standards of the products you work on, making deliberate decisions about how the system evolves and ensuring consistency and quality across the entire codebase
* Closely collaborating with stakeholders, you translate complex requirements into technically sound, user\-facing solutions that create real impact
* You evaluate and drive the adoption of new technologies, frameworks and approaches, keeping both the product and the team at the cutting edge of what is possible in Generative \& Agentic AI

**What you bring:**

* You hold a completed university degree in computer science, data science or a related field
* Extensive hands\-on experience in software engineering with strong proficiency in TypeScript and AWS, combined with deep expertise in Generative \& Agentic AI – including foundation models, agentic frameworks and runtimes; experience with LangGraph is a strong plus
* Proven ability to provide technical leadership within an engineering team, driving quality and delivery across the full SDLC, is part of your track record
* Strong product instincts enable you to break down a large vision into meaningful increments and make smart trade\-offs between technical debt, functionality and time to delivery
* You have a proven track record of building and operating complex AI products in production environments
* You communicate confidently with both technical teams and non\-technical stakeholders, translating between business needs and technical realities
* Fluency in written and spoken English completes your profile


This position is principally a full\-time role. Interested in part\-time? Feel free to apply and indicate your preferred percentage.


For initial questions, please contact Chris Rziha (chris.rziha@covestro.com). Please do not use this email address to send your application or CV. To apply, please click the "Apply" button. Applications submitted by email will not be considered.


\#LI\-Hybrid**Perfection? Not required!**


The requirements are not met 100%, but you are still interested in the position? Are you curious, courageous and colorful as we are? No problem!


We'll tackle this together \- as a team! With proper onboarding and tailored development opportunities.

**Apply now!**


We look forward to receive your application! Become \#1ofUs!


Anyone who wants to contribute to a better world with Covestro can also expect a lot.


We want you to feel at home at Covestro. To feel you’re treated fairly and transparently. That means financial security, a healthy work\-life balance and generous benefits.


Specifically, it means for us: flexible working hours, the compatibility of family and work, active health promotion and the ability to convert part of your salary into long\-term or retirement savings. And that's not all.


Sounds exciting? Find out more about Covestro and our benefits here:


https://www.career.covestro.de/de/about\-covestro/covestro\-as\-an\-employer/employee\-benefits


Contact Us

  

Covestro welcomes applications from all individuals, regardless of racial or ethnic origin, skin color, nationality, religion, philosophy, gender, age, physical characteristics, marital status, disability, appearance, sexual orientation and sexual identity. We are committed to treating all applicants fairly and avoiding discrimination.

title: Netzwerk Techniker (L1)
description:
Make an impact with NTT DATA
  
Join a company that is pushing the boundaries of what is possible. We are renowned for our technical excellence and leading innovations, and for making a difference to our clients and society. Our workplace embraces diversity and inclusion – it’s a place where you can grow, belong and thrive.
  
  

Der MS Engineer (L1\) ist verantwortlich für die Bereitstellung eines Dienstes für Kunden, um sicherzustellen, dass ihre IT\-Infrastruktur und \-Systeme betriebsbereit bleiben, indem technische Vorfälle und Probleme identifiziert, untersucht und gelöst werden und der Dienst für Kunden durch die Bearbeitung und Dokumentation von Störung bis zur Lösung wiederhergestellt wird. Das Hauptziel dieser Rolle ist es, sicherzustellen, dass keine Service Level Agreement (SLA)\-Bedingungen verpasst werden. Diese Rolle konzentriert sich auf den First\-Line\-Support für Standard\- und weniger komplexe Vorfälle und Serviceanfragen.
  
Diese Rolle kann auch bei Bedarf zu Projektarbeiten beitragen oder diese unterstützen.
  
Der Service wird am Kundenstandort erbracht.
  
  

**Stellenbeschreibung:**  

**Wichtige Rollen und Verantwortlichkeiten:**  

* Untersucht zugewiesene First\-Line\-Vorfälle und identifiziert die Ursache von Vorfällen und Problemen
* Erfüllt genehmigte Requests gemäß den vereinbarten Verfahren
* Führt genehmigte Wartungsaktivitäten einschließlich Patching und Konfigurationsänderungen durch
* Befolgt die erforderlichen Übergabeverfahren für Schichtwechsel, um die Servicekontinuität sicherzustellen
* Meldet und eskaliert Vorfälle, wenn nötig
* Stellt die effiziente und umfassende Lösung von Vorfällen und Anfragen sicher
* Identifiziert proaktiv Möglichkeiten zur Arbeitsoptimierung
* Aktualisiert bestehende Wissensartikel oder erstellt neue
* Kann auch bei Bedarf zu Projektarbeiten beitragen oder diese unterstützen


**Kenntnisse, Fähigkeiten und Attribute:**  

* Fließende Deutsch\- und Englischkenntnisse
* Kenntnisse in strukturierter Verkabelung, Netzwerktechnik (Cisco, Aruba), Konfiguration, Installation, Racking, Patching
* Allgemeine Kenntnisse der MS Office\-Produkte (Excel, Visio, Word, PowerPoint, Outlook)
* Fähigkeit, über verschiedene Kulturen und soziale Gruppen hinweg zu kommunizieren und zu arbeiten
* Fähigkeit, Aktivitäten und Projekte im Voraus gut zu planen und mögliche sich ändernde Umstände zu berücksichtigen
* Fähigkeit, eine positive Einstellung bei der Arbeit zu bewahren


**Akademische Qualifikationen und Zertifizierungen:**  

* CCNA


**Erforderliche Erfahrung:**  

* Erste Erfahrungen mit der Fehlerbehebung und Bereitstellung des erforderlichen Vor\-Ort\-Supports in Netzwerk\-/Rechenzentrums\-/System\- und Überwachungsdiensten innerhalb einer mittelgroßen bis großen ICT\-Organisation
* Grundkenntnisse der Produkte im unterstützten technischen Bereich (z. B. Netzwerk, Rechenzentrum, Wireless)


**Benefits:**  

* Betriebliche Altersvorsorge
* Bitkom Mitarbeiterrabatte
* Home\-Office Option
* JobRad Leasing Option
* Mitarbeiter\-Technikprogramm (MTP)
* Familienservice
* Referral Bonus
* Sonderurlaubstage
* Gruppen\-Unfallversicherung
* Jubiläumszuwendung
* Weiterbildungsmöglichkeiten
* Rufbereitschaft wird vergütet


**Workplace type:** On\-site Working
  
  

About NTT DATA
  
NTT DATA is a $30 billion business and technology services leader, serving 75% of the Fortune
  
  

Global 100\. We are committed to accelerating client success and positively impacting society through
  
  

responsible innovation. We are one of the world’s leading AI and digital infrastructure providers, with
  
  

unmatched capabilities in enterprise\-scale AI, cloud, security, connectivity, data centers and
  
  

application services. Our consulting and industry solutions help organizations and society move
  
  

confidently and sustainably into the digital future. As a Global Top Employer, we have experts in more
  
  

than 70 countries. We also offer clients access to a robust ecosystem of innovation centers as well as
  
  

established and start\-up partners. NTT DATA is part of NTT Group, which invests over $3 billion each
  
  

year in RD.
  
  

Equal Opportunity Employer
  
NTT DATA is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer with a global culture that embraces diversity. We are committed to providing an environment free of unfair discrimination and harassment. We do not discriminate based on age, race, colour, gender, sexual orientation, religion, nationality, disability, pregnancy, marital status, veteran status, or any other protected category. Join our growing global team and accelerate your career with us. Apply today.
  
  

Third parties fraudulently posing as NTT DATA recruiters
  
  

NTT DATA recruiters will never ask job seekers or candidates for payment or banking information during the recruitment process, for any reason. Please remain vigilant of third parties who may attempt to impersonate NTT DATA recruiters whether in writing or by phone in order to deceptively obtain personal data or money from you. All email communications from an NTT DATA recruiter will come from an nttdata.com email address. If you suspect any fraudulent activity, please contact us.

title: Analytics Engineer
description:
**About Qargo**
===============


Qargo is a cloud\-based (SaaS) Transport Management Platform. We are a scale\-up based in London and Ghent (Belgium), rapidly expanding across Europe. The platform is an ‘all\-in\-one system’, handling everything from initial order entry to final invoicing. It optimises planning and has a built\-in AI feature that automates lengthy manual tasks. Qargo is designed to help modern logistics operations run more efficiently, while increasing profitability and sustainability.


We’re looking for an **Analytics Engineer** to join our team in Ghent. If you’re looking to work in an international company in a role that offers autonomy, ownership and impact, this is the role for you!

**About the Role**
------------------


As an Analytics Engineer, you will play a key role in shaping Qargo's data landscape. You'll build and maintain reliable data models, develop impactful dashboards, and turn complex datasets into actionable insights that support decision\-making across the organisation.


This role offers plenty of variety and impact. You'll collaborate with product, engineering, sales, account management, finance, and customer onboarding teams to help make data a strategic asset for Qargo.


You'll contribute to both internal and customer\-facing dashboards, help scale our data infrastructure, and support the continued growth of our analytics capabilities as Qargo expands.

**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------

* Build, maintain and improve Qargo's data models and data pipelines, ensuring reliable and high\-quality data.
* Maintain, extend and optimise our in\-app Lightdash dashboards, including operational, financial, and performance insights.
* Build and refine internal BI dashboards to support data\-driven decision\-making across departments.
* Develop account management dashboards that reveal feature adoption, revenue insights, and upsell opportunities.
* Create product and engineering analytics, including feature usage dashboards using Mixpanel or custom\-built tracking solutions.
* Support integration\-related reporting by building dashboards that provide visibility into integration health, tenant usage, and performance.
* Build billing and cost\-analysis dashboards, including API call cost allocation and tenant\-level breakdowns.
* Continuously improve our analytics environment by identifying opportunities to optimise data quality, reporting, and processes.

**Skills \& Experience**
------------------------

* At least **2 years of experience** in data analytics, BI engineering, analytics engineering, or a similar role in a SaaS or data\-driven environment.
* Strong proficiency in SQL, data modelling, and dashboarding tools (Lightdash, Superset, Tableau, Looker, or Power BI).
* Experience with analytics platforms such as Mixpanel and user behaviour tracking methodologies is a plus.
* Comfortable collaborating with multidisciplinary teams including product, engineering, sales, and finance.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills, with attention to data quality and scalability.
* A background in Computer Science, Data Engineering, Statistics, or a related field.
* A proactive mindset and eagerness to learn, take ownership, and continuously improve.

**What We Offer**
-----------------

* Real impact and ownership in a growing international scale\-up.
* A supportive and collaborative team culture.
* Hybrid working setup with flexibility and trust.
* Opportunities to learn, grow, and expand your technical knowledge.
* Competitive salary and benefits package.

title: Frontend Expert
description:
Jobomschrijving:
**Frontend Expert**
-------------------

### **Samenvatting van de rol**


Als **Senior Technical Engineer/Frontend Expert** en lid van het **Software Engineering \& Automation\-team** definieer, onderhoud en ondersteun je de adoptie van software engineering\-standaarden, richtlijnen en herbruikbare werkwijzen binnen ontwikkelteams, met een sterke focus op front\-end engineering.


Je fungeert als technisch referentiepunt voor front\-endtechnologieën zoals **Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript, Stencil en Web Components**, terwijl je ook snel inzicht verwerft in bredere technische onderwerpen buiten het front\-enddomein.


Daarnaast draag je bij aan het definiëren van ontwikkelpraktijken die veilig, toegankelijk, duurzaam en onderhoudbaar zijn, en ondersteun je de verantwoorde implementatie van AI\-ondersteunde software engineering\-tools en \-praktijken.

**Belangrijkste verantwoordelijkheden**
---------------------------------------

### **Engineeringstandaarden, richtlijnen en ondersteuning bij adoptie**

* Definiëren, onderhouden en verbeteren van software engineering\-standaarden en best practices, en deze vertalen naar duidelijke richtlijnen voor ontwikkelteams.
* Nieuwe technologieën onderzoeken en evalueren, de evolutie van engineeringframeworks, herbruikbare componenten, templates, referentieapplicaties en technische documentatie stimuleren.
* Adoptie ondersteunen via documentatie, workshops en coaching, zodat teams standaarden consistent kunnen toepassen binnen hun specifieke context.
* Continu leren en kennisdeling bevorderen via interne communicatiekanalen, technische updates, nieuwsbrieven en communities of practice, in nauwe samenwerking met andere technische leads.

### **Front\-end engineering en expertise**

* Senior expertise bieden op het vlak van front\-end engineering, waaronder Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Stencil en Web Components.
* De evolutie van het front\-endecosysteem opvolgen en de relevantie, maturiteit en toepasbaarheid van nieuwe technologieën, frameworks, tools en werkwijzen beoordelen.
* Schaalbare front\-endarchitecturen ondersteunen, inclusief componentgebaseerde benaderingen, herbruikbare front\-endpatronen, gedeelde bibliotheken en micro\-frontends waar relevant.
* Secure\-by\-design\-, toegankelijke en duurzame front\-end engineering\-praktijken binnen teams stimuleren.

### **Ondersteuning over technologieën heen**

* Praktische kennis van aanvullende technologieën zoals Java, Python en .NET inzetten om efficiënt samen te werken met full\-stack\- en back\-endteams.
* Complexe technische onderwerpen helpen structureren en vertalen naar duidelijke implementatieopties.
* Inzicht hebben in de end\-to\-endwerking van applicaties voorbij de front\-endlaag, inclusief back\-endinteracties, API’s, integraties, infrastructuurafhankelijkheden en belangrijke concepten zoals micro\-frontends en microservices.

### **AI\-ondersteunde software engineering en automatisering**

* De implementatie van AI\-ondersteunde software engineering\-praktijken ondersteunen door richtlijnen voor verantwoord, veilig en effectief gebruik mee vorm te geven.
* Praktijken zoals specification\-driven development, AI\-assisted coding, geautomatiseerde documentatie, testgeneratie en ondersteuning bij code reviews integreren binnen bestaande engineeringstandaarden en workflows.
* AI\-tools evalueren binnen een snel veranderend technologielandschap en hun meerwaarde beoordelen op vlak van productiviteit, kwaliteit, onderhoudbaarheid en developer experience.

**Technische vaardigheden**
---------------------------

* Sterke ervaring als Senior Software Engineer, Front\-End Lead, Technical Lead, Solution Engineer of een vergelijkbare technische functie.
* Diepgaande kennis van front\-endontwikkeling, in het bijzonder Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML en CSS.
* Ervaring met Stencil, Web Components of componentgebaseerde architecturen is een belangrijke troef.
* Grondig inzicht in front\-endarchitectuur, herbruikbare componenten, design systems, gedeelde bibliotheken en moderne webapplicatieontwikkeling.
* Goede kennis van micro\-frontends, microservices en API’s.
* Praktische kennis van verschillende technologieën zoals Java, Python en .NET.
* Ervaring met Git\-gebaseerde ontwikkelprocessen, branchingstrategieën, pull requests en code reviews.
* Kennis van CI/CD, DevOps\-praktijken en softwareleveringsautomatisering.
* Ervaring met kwaliteits\- en beveiligingstools zoals SonarQube, dependency scanning\-tools, code\-analysetools of gelijkwaardige oplossingen.
* Inzicht in secure coding\-principes en applicatiebeveiligingsrisico’s, vooral binnen webomgevingen.
* Kennis van webtoegankelijkheid, duurzame softwareontwikkeling en performantiegerichte ontwikkeling.
* Ervaring met of sterke interesse in AI\-ondersteunde ontwikkelingstools, waaronder coding assistants, AI\-gebaseerde documentatie, testgeneratie en specification\-driven development.
* Vermogen om nieuwe technologieën te evalueren en te vertalen naar praktische aanbevelingen, standaarden en richtlijnen.
* Actieve bijdrage aan of sterke affiniteit met het open\-source\-ecosysteem is een pluspunt.

**Soft skills**
---------------

* Nieuwsgierig en in staat om zich snel nieuwe technische domeinen eigen te maken.
* In staat om complexe technische onderwerpen helder en effectief te communiceren.
* Ervaring met het schrijven van technische documentatie, richtlijnen, nieuwsbrieven en intern communicatiemateriaal.
* In staat om teams met verschillende niveaus van technische maturiteit te coachen en ondersteunen.
* Vlot in de samenwerking met ontwikkelaars, architecten, security\-experts, DevOps\-engineers, productteams en management stakeholders.
* In staat om prioriteiten te stellen en daarbij innovatie, teamadoptie, engineeringkwaliteit en leveringsdoelstellingen in evenwicht te houden.
* Comfortabel in een snel veranderende technologische omgeving.
* Vloeiend Engels; kennis van Frans en/of Nederlands is een troef.
*AXA wil een weerspiegeling zijn van de diverse samenleving waarin wij leven en voert daarom al jaren een beleid van actieve diversiteit, non\-discriminatie en gelijke kansen. In dit kader garanderen wij een gelijke behandeling en toegang tot selecties, ongeacht leeftijd, afkomst, culturele achtergrond, handicap, geslacht of seksuele geaardheid of andere kenmerken*. *Bij AXA wijzen wij alle vormen van oneerlijke of onwettige discriminatie af.* **AXA Belgium**  

Meer dan 3000 mensen werken bij ons, vanuit onze vooruitstrevende kantoren in Brussel, Antwerpen, Eupen en Luik. We werken samen met 3200 makelaars. We hebben 3 miljoen klanten en zijn nummer 1 in autoverzekeringen. Het is onze ambitie om onze relatie met al onze klanten te transformeren van betaler naar partner om ons echt te onderscheiden. **Onze fundamenten**
Onze belangrijkste leidraad zijn onze waarden: **Customer first, Integrity, Courage** **en** **One AXA**. Alles wat we doen, daar staan we als één team achter.  

Bij AXA wijzen wij alle vormen van oneerlijke of onwettige discriminatie af. Meer info in ons Diversiteits\- en Inclusiebeleid. **Wat we aanbieden** **Een mooie beloning voor je werk**
Een competitief loon, eventueel aangevuld met discretionaire persoonlijke en collectieve premies en natuurlijk ook maaltijd\- en ecocheques, een volledige terugbetaling van het openbaar vervoer en een cafetariaplan. **Alle voordelen van werken bij een verzekeraar**
Van groepsverzekering tot ambulante en hospitalisatieverzekering (ook gezinsleden kunnen daarbij aansluiten aan een voordelig tarief) en met tot 30% korting op onze andere verzekeringsproducten. **Een job die zich aanpast aan je leven en dromen**
Een flexibel rooster van 35 uur per week, 36 dagen verlof per jaar om op te laden, evenals de mogelijkheid om gedeeltelijk van thuis uit te werken.
Wij bieden sportlessen op het werk, welzijnsprogramma's voor werknemers en trainingen, om u in topvorm te houden, zowel fysiek als mentaal.

title: Frontend Expert
description:
Job Description:
**Frontend Expert**

 ***Role summary***


As Senior Technical Engineer/Frontend Expert and part of Software Engineering \& Automation team, you define, maintain and support the adoption of software engineering standards, guidelines and reusable practices across development teams, with a strong focus on front\-end engineering.


You act as a technical reference for front\-end technologies such as Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript, Stencil and Web Components, while quickly understanding broader technical topics beyond the front\-end domain.


You also contribute to defining development practices that are secure, accessible, sustainable and maintainable, and support responsible adoption of AI\-assisted software engineering tools and practices.

 ***Key responsibilities***

* **Engineering standards, guidelines and adoption support**
* Define, maintain and improve software engineering standards, best practices, and translate them into guidance for development teams.
* Explore and assess new technologies, drive the evolution of engineering frameworks, reusable components, templates, reference applications and technical documentation
* Support adoption through documentation, workshops, coaching, helping teams apply standards consistently while adapting them to their specific context.
* Promote continuous learning and knowledge sharing through internal communication channels, technical updates, newsletters and communities of practice, especially in collaboration with other technical leads.
* **Front\-end Engineering and expertise**
* Provide senior expertise in front\-end engineering, including Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Stencil and Web Components.
* Follow the evolution of the front\-end ecosystem and assess the relevance, maturity and applicability of emerging technologies, frameworks, tools and practices
* Support scalable front\-end architectures, including component\-based approaches, reusable front\-end patterns, shared libraries, and micro\-frontends where relevant.
* Drive secure\-by\-design, accessible and sustainable front\-end engineering practices across teams.
* **Cross\-technology support**
* Bring working knowledge of complementary technologies, such as Java, Python and .NET, to collaborate effectively with full\-stack and back\-end teams.
* Help structure complex technical topics and translate them into clear implementation options
* Understand how applications work end\-to\-end beyond the front\-end layer, including back\-end interactions, APIs, integrations, infrastructure dependencies and key technical concepts such as micro\-frontends and microservices.
* **AI\-assisted software engineering and automation**
* Support the adoption of AI\-assisted software engineering practices across teams by helping define responsible, secure and effective usage guidelines.
* Help integrate practices such as spec\-driven development, AI\-assisted coding, automated documentation, test generation and code review support into existing engineering standards and workflows.
* Evaluate AI tools in a fast\-evolving technology landscape, assessing their practical value for engineering productivity, quality, maintainability and developer experience

 ***Technical skills***

* Strong experience as a senior software engineer, front\-end lead, technical lead, solution engineer or similar technical role.
* Deep knowledge of front\-end development, especially **Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML and CSS**.
* Experience with **Stencil**, web components or component\-based architecture is a strong asset.
* Strong understanding of front\-end architecture, reusable components, design systems, shared libraries and modern web application development.
* Good understanding of micro\-frontends, microservices, APIs.
* Working knowledge of multiple technologies such as **Java, Python and .NET**.
* Experience with Git\-based development workflows, branching strategies, pull requests and code reviews.
* Familiarity with CI/CD, DevOps practices and software delivery automation.
* Experience with quality and security tools such as SonarQube, dependency scanning tools, code analysis tools or equivalent.
* Understanding of secure coding principles and application security risks, especially in web environments.
* Awareness of web accessibility, sustainable software engineering and performance\-oriented development.
* Experience or strong interest in AI\-assisted development tools, including coding assistants, AI\-based documentation, test generation or spec\-driven development.
* Ability to evaluate new technologies and translate them into practical recommendations, standards or guidelines.
* Active contribution to, or strong awareness of, the open\-source ecosystem is a plus.

 ***Soft skills***

* Curious and able to quickly understand new technical domains.
* Able to communicate complex technical topics clearly and effectively.
* Comfortable writing technical documentation, guidelines, newsletters and internal communication material.
* Able to coach and support teams with different levels of technical maturity.
* Comfortable working with developers, architects, security experts, DevOps engineers, product teams and management stakeholders.
* Able to prioritize effectively, balancing innovation, team adoption needs, engineering quality and delivery constraints.
* Comfortable working in a fast\-changing technology environment.
* Fluent in English; knowledge of French and/or Dutch is an asset.

 *AXA aims to be a reflection of the diverse society in which we live and has therefore been pursuing a policy of active diversity, non\-discrimination, and equal opportunities for many years. In this context, we guarantee equal treatment and access to recruitment, regardless of age, origin, cultural background, disability, gender, sexual orientation, or other characteristics**.* **AXA Belgium**  

We are more than 3000 employees, partnering with 3200 brokers, located in our modern offices in Brussels, Antwerp, Eupen, and Liège. We are serving 3 million customers, and we are proud to be the number 1 car insurer. It is our ambition to not only be a payer but rather a real partner for our customers.  

Our four core values drive us every day to give our best for our customers while collaborating effectively with our colleagues: **Customer First****,** **Integrity****,** **Courage****, and** **One AXA.**
At AXA, we reject unfair or unlawful discrimination in any form. More info in our Diversity \& Inclusion Policy. **What we offer** **A nice reward for your work**
An attractive salary, supplemented with discretionary personal and collective bonuses and of course, meal and eco vouchers, the full reimbursement of public transport, and a cafeteria plan. **The benefits of working at an insurance company**
From group to hospitalization insurance and ambulatory care (family members can also join at an advantageous rate) and with up to 30% discount on all additional insurance products. **A job that respects your personal life and dreams**
A flexible schedule of 35 hours per week, 36 days of leave per year to recharge, as well as the option to work partially from home.
You will benefit from sports classes at work, employee wellness programs and trainings, to keep you in great shape, both physically and mentally.

title: Trainee NetSec - (Internship September 2026)
description:
Les entreprises et les gouvernements comptent sur Thales pour apporter de la confiance aux milliards d’interactions numériques qu’ils établissent avec les utilisateurs. L’Activité Mondiale Identité \& Sécurité Numériques (DIS) fournit des technologies et services (des logiciels sécurisés en passant par la biométrie ou encore le cryptage), qui permettent aux entreprises ainsi qu’aux gouvernements de vérifier des identités, et de protéger les données afin qu’elles restent sûres.**Internship Opportunity**

**Network \& Cloud Security Intern**

**Department: Network Security (NetSec)**

**Location: Zaventem Belgium**

**Duration: 3–6 months (September 2026\)**

**Level: Master students / Final\-year Bachelor (Cybersecurity, IT, Engineering)**

**About the Internship**


We are offering internship opportunities within our **Network \& Cloud Security (NetSec)** team.


This internship provides hands\-on exposure to real\-world enterprise security environments, covering:

* Cloud Security
* OT / Industrial Security
* Detection \& Response
* Infrastructure as Code
* Security Innovation \& Automation


Interns will work on strategic, technical, and research\-oriented projects with the objective of producing deployable solutions, proof\-of\-concepts, comparative studies, or automation frameworks.

**Internship Topics**


Below is a non\-exhaustive list of possible subjects.

**Cloud Security**

* **Microsoft Security Copilot**
* Development of automated O365 / Azure / AWS audit tools (CIS, MS DSC, ISO frameworks)
* Zero Trust architecture implementation in AWS, Azure, and GCP
* Incident response \& digital forensics in cloud environments
* Data encryption strategies (at rest \& in transit)
* Microsoft Priva (GRC / ISG integration)

**Projects may include:**

* Automation development
* Compliance alignment
* Architecture design
* Risk analysis and mitigation

**Focus areas:**

* Pipeline automation
* Secure coding best practices
* Cloud\-native security controls

**OT \& Industrial Security**

* Creation of an OT lab (IEC104, Modbus, MQTT, DNP3, TIA Portal)
* OT solution comparison (Armis, Defender for OT, Nozomi, Trend Micro)
* Secure remote access in ICS environments (VPN, jump servers, OT PAM)
* (I)IoT device security assessment \& hardening
* OT honeypot deployment and threat analysis
* Embedded device security in industrial control systems

**Projects may involve:**

* Lab simulation
* Vulnerability assessment
* Hardening implementation
* Comparative evaluation reports

**General Cybersecurity \& Innovation**

* DLP technology comparison (Varonis, Netskope, Microsoft Purview)
* Fortinet full fabric implementation
* SYSLOG / Mini\-SIEM implementation
* AI\-driven firewall or threat detection research (inspired by Darktrace\-like models)
* Splunk architecture deployment via Terraform \& Ansible
* Puppet server automation project
* Secure deployment of local AI (ChatGPT\-like) with sandboxing \& risk mitigation
* Advanced malware analysis \& reverse engineering
* Compliance automation (GDPR, HIPAA, PCI\-DSS)
* XDR / EDR comparison (HarfangLab, Defender, Trend Micro, etc.)
* SIEM comparison (Splunk, Sentinel, QRadar, ELK, open\-source)
* MS PKI lab implementation
* Active Directory compromise \& secure migration scenario
* Gamified social engineering awareness platform
* Social engineering awareness campaign design \& execution

**What You Will Gain**

* Hands\-on experience in enterprise\-grade security environments
* Exposure to modern cloud \& OT infrastructures
* Experience in automation \& Infrastructure\-as\-Code
* Research \& comparative analysis experience
* Mentorship from experienced security engineers

**Profile Required**

* Master’s or final\-year Bachelor student in Cybersecurity, IT, Network Engineering, or related field
* Strong interest in cloud, network, and infrastructure security
* Analytical mindset and structured approach
* Ability to work independently and produce technical documentation
* Scripting skills (Python, PowerShell, Bash) are a strong plus
* Knowledge of cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, GCP) is an asset
* Familiarity with networking fundamentals (TCP/IP, firewalls, VPN, DNS)

**Important Note**


The internship subjects listed above represent a **preliminary and non\-exhaustive set of ideas**.


We strongly encourage students to propose their own internship topics, particularly those aligned with:

* Emerging cybersecurity trends
* AI\-driven security
* Cloud\-native security innovation
* Automation and scalable security services


Thales, entreprise Handi\-Engagée, reconnait tous les talents. La diversité est notre meilleur atout. Postulez et rejoignez nous !

title: Senior Solution Analyst - Integration
description:
**Senior Solution Analyst \- Integration**


Location: Avenue du Bourget, 3, 1140


Are you ready to be the analytical backbone of a high\-impact integration domain in a leading Belgian telecommunications operator?



In the role of Senior Solution Analyst, you will be a core part of our Integration domain, connecting our application landscape through API gateways, cloud\-native microservices, event platforms, process orchestration, and more. You will turn complex integration challenges into precise solution specifications that our engineering squads can build with confidence, working closely with our solution architects and enterprise architects, contributing to stack evolution and security by design.


**Your responsibilities**


* **Analysis and specification:** Translate business and application needs into precise, implementable integration specifications, API contracts, data mappings, and sequence diagrams and BPMN flows, with a clear anticipation of error conditions and edge cases.
* **Non\-functional and operational requirements:** Specify observability for integration flows, covering logging, monitoring, distributed tracing with correlation across systems, health and error signals, and alerting (including threshold and anomaly\-based detection).
* **API management and security:** Specify solutions across our API gateways, covering API management and inbound/outbound security, proxy and policy design, token handling, versioning, and consumer contract management.
* **Identity and security by design:** Specify strong authentication and authorization for application integration, covering RBAC, OAuth / JWT, SSO and federated identity, MFA, certificate lifecycle, and encryption in transit and at rest. Security is central to this role, not an afterthought.
* **Cloud\-native microservices:** Analyse and document integration contracts for Spring Boot microservices across containerised and cloud environments (OpenShift, Kubernetes / GKE, GCP) and serverless runtimes; define event\-driven and messaging patterns (GCP Pub/Sub, Kafka).
* **Architecture collaboration:** Work with the solution architects of transversal domains for the structural architecture of your functional design; work with enterprise architects to align on integration patterns, end\-to\-end journeys, and reuse across the landscape.
* **Strategic capabilities:** Participate in the evolution of our integration patterns and technology stack, and potentially in process modernisation rollouts such as domain driven design, orchestration, and AI\-assisted automation.
* **Delivery and governance:** Partner with engineers, architects and QA through build and test phases; own specification clarifications and defect triage; and contribute to the maintenance of interface inventory, API registry and solution catalogue.

**Your profile:**


* Minimum 3 years’ experience in solution analysis with a strong integration focus.
* Hands\-on understanding of cloud\-native architecture, Spring Boot microservices, and integration patterns.
* Knowledge of GCP ecosystem and how projects and components interact; excellent knowledge of Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, Cloud Armor, VPC, GKE and the GCP Developer Portal.
* Expertise in integration principles and API gateways; knowledge of API lifecycle, API management and API security, REST, JSON, JWT, OAuth.
* Knowledge of IAM principles including RBAC, SSO and federated identity, MFA, and certificate lifecycle.
* Experience deploying microservices in containerised and cloud environments (OpenShift, GCP, or similar), with a proactive willingness to adapt to our internal stack.
* Knowledge of logging, monitoring, distributed tracing and alerting for integration flows would be a plus.
* Agile delivery, comfortable in Jira and Confluence.
* Fluent English and French or Dutch.

**What we offer:**


* A pivotal role in augmenting our journey of cloud\-native, API\-first integration with upcoming initiatives and projects.
* A collaborative, expert team working closely with our architecture community, with real investment in new capabilities and cutting\-edge technology.
* A competitive salary package with benefits in line with Belgian market standards.
* A hybrid working model with flexibility.
* Full support for your onboarding into our specific infrastructure stack, and continuous learning in current integration technology.
**Apply**

title: AI & AUTOMATION ENGINEER (LIEGE-BELGIUM)
description:
As part of its IT Corporate Business Partners team, Gaming1 is looking for an **AI \& Automation Engineer** to design and operate automation solutions that serve the entire organisation. Your internal customers span Finance, HR, Marketing, Retail, and IT — with new use cases emerging constantly.


This is a **greenfield role**. There is no legacy automation practice to maintain, no backlog of technical debt to inherit. You will help define what good looks like: the tools, the standards, the reusable components, the way we work. That means navigating ambiguity, learning fast, and making decisions without a complete picture — which is exactly what we are looking for.


This is a **dual\-focus role**: half **automation engineering** (workflow design, integration, orchestration), half **AI integration** (LLM\-powered processing, intelligent document handling, smart routing). You will be expected to own both dimensions end\-to\-end — from a vague stakeholder conversation to a production deployment. Experiments will sometimes fail. We treat that as signal, not failure.


**Your Role**


* **Identify, scope, and prioritise** automation opportunities across business domains (Finance, HR, Marketing, Retail, IT) in collaboration with stakeholders
* **Design and build** production\-grade automation workflows using Power Automate (Cloud), n8n, or any other tool fit for purpose
* **Develop and maintain** REST API integrations (OAuth2, webhooks, JSON) or MCPs connecting internal tools and third\-party services
* **Integrate** LLM capabilities (Azure OpenAI or equivalent) into automation pipelines: document extraction, classification, email triage, exception handling
* **Write** clean, maintainable scripts (Python, C\#) for data transformation, validation logic, and automation tooling
* **Implement** robust error handling, retry logic, alerting, and structured logging across all workflows
* **Document** automations thoroughly and contribute to a growing framework of reusable components
* **Track and report** automation KPIs: time saved, error reduction, volumes processed, ROI
* **Actively monitor** the AI \& automation landscape — bring relevant ideas to the table before you are asked

**Your Profile**


**Required:**


* **2–5 years of hands\-on experience in automation engineering** or a closely related role
* Solid **Power Automate (Cloud) skills**: connector design, approval flows, complex conditional logic, SharePoint/M365 integrations
* Strong **REST API fundamentals**: OAuth2, webhooks, pagination, authentication patterns, JSON manipulation
* **Python or C\# proficiency**: scripting for data handling, transformation logic, and automation support tasks
* Practical **LLM integration experience**: prompt engineering for structured outputs, Azure OpenAI or OpenAI API usage in real workflows
* **Comfort with ambiguity**: ability to turn a messy "this is painful" conversation into a scoped, maintainable solution
* **Strong ownership**: you scope, build, test, deploy, and hand over — with documentation
* Fluent in both **French and English** (written and spoken)

**Nice to have:**


* **Hands\-on n8n experience**: JavaScript nodes, custom HTTP integrations, self\-hosted or cloud deployment
* Familiarity with **RAG patterns or MCP** (Model Context Protocol)
* **Exposure to a regulated or compliance\-heavy industry** (gaming, finance, insurance)
* **DevOps literacy**: Git, versioning, CI/CD pipelines
* Knowledge of the **Microsoft Power Platform ecosystem** beyond Power Automate

title: Visual inspection specialist
description:
:

We are currently recruiting for a **Project Engineer / Visual Inspection Specialist** to support projects in the pharmaceutical sector at a client in the region of Brussels.
:
**Context:**  

Our client is looking for a Visual Inspection Specialist – Process Equipment to support a major aseptic manufacturing CAPEX project at their site in the region of Brussels. This is a highly strategic role focused on the implementation of the first automated visual inspection system for injectable products. The candidate will act as the subject matter expert for visual inspection technologies, supporting the selection, specification and procurement of a new inspection machine while ensuring compliance with pharmaceutical regulations and quality standards. The mission will have a strong focus on the equipment selection and design phase. Depending on project needs and performance, further collaboration may be considered during later project stages.  

**Team info:**  

The candidate will join a team of technical SMEs responsible for key process equipment within the new aseptic manufacturing project. The team oversees major equipment packages such as filling lines, visual inspection machines, autoclaves and washing equipment. While the candidate will receive support from the wider engineering team, a high level of autonomy is expected as the role owner will serve as the primary expert for visual inspection activities.  

**Day to day:**  

* Act as SME for automated visual inspection technologies within an aseptic manufacturing environment.
* Support supplier selection and technical evaluation of visual inspection equipment.
* Define and refine User Requirement Specifications (URS).
* Participate in equipment and process design reviews.
* Assess defect detection strategies for syringes and injectable products.
* Collaborate with equipment vendors throughout the design and procurement phases.
* Lead technical discussions regarding inspection technologies, camera configurations and defect classification approaches.
* Ensure compliance with GMP, Annex 1, Annex 11, GAMP 5 and Data Integrity requirements.
* Support computerized system validation and qualification activities.
* Contribute to MES/eBR integration and digitalization initiatives.
* Participate in future FAT/SAT, CQV and validation activities when project phases advance.
* Influence stakeholders and support the implementation of a new technology on site.

:
Requirements
* Minimum **8 years of experience in the pharmaceutical industry**.
* Strong experience specifically in automated visual inspection systems for injectable products.
* Previous experience working directly with visual inspection machines is mandatory.
* Experience participating in the implementation or deployment of a new visual inspection system is considered a strong advantage.

  

**Must have:**  

* Master’s degree in Engineering, Automation, Optics, Pharmaceutical Technology or a related scientific field.
* Proven hands\-on experience with automated visual inspection equipment.
* Strong knowledge of pharmaceutical manufacturing and aseptic operations.
* Experience with defect detection, defect classification and inspection processes for injectable products.
* Good understanding of automation architecture and computerized system validation.
* Knowledge of GMP regulations, Annex 1, Annex 11, GAMP 5 and Data Integrity (ALCOA\+) principles.
* Experience defining technical requirements and interacting with equipment suppliers.
* Strong autonomy and decision\-making skills.
* Fluent in English.
* Ability to be on site 3 days per week from day one.
  

**Nice to have:**  

* Experience leading or participating in the implementation of a new visual inspection platform.
* Knowledge of AI/ML\-enabled inspection technologies.
* MES/eBR integration experience.
* Knowledge of ASTM E2500 and risk\-based validation approaches.
* PMP certification or equivalent.
* Strong stakeholder management, influence and change management capabilities.
* Assertiveness, emotional intelligence and the ability to drive adoption of new technologies.

\#LI\-DN1

title: PMO | Defence
description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life\-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R\&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.


**Job Description**
-------------------


* **Establishing and maintaining project governance structures**, ensuring adherence to organisational policies, facilitating steering committee meetings, and documenting outcomes to keep all stakeholders aligned and informed.
* **Supporting project managers in planning, execution, and monitoring**, challenging planning and resource allocation decisions, tracking deliverables and milestones, and raising alerts on impacting deviations to ensure on\-time delivery.
* **Consolidating risks and mitigation plans** through a structured Risk Register, animating risk review sessions, assisting with risk scenario planning, and monitoring risk management activities across projects.
* **Facilitating stakeholder engagement and knowledge management**, including internal workshops, feedback sessions, lessons learned, and knowledge transfer initiatives to drive continuous improvement.
* **Assisting in budget preparation and monitoring**, while also providing onboarding, training, and ongoing support to project teams on PMO processes, tools, and best practices.
**Your Profile**
----------------


* You have **at least 10 years of experience** in a Project Management or PMO role within an international and technically demanding environment, with a proven ability to operate across complex, multi\-stakeholder programmes.
* You have **solid expertise in project planning, scheduling, risk management, and financial monitoring**, and are comfortable challenging and supporting project managers at all stages of the project lifecycle.
* You are **proficient in project management and reporting tools** such as MS Project and Power BI, and are confident in maintaining and supporting their use across project teams.
* You demonstrate **strong communication and facilitation skills**, with the ability to engage effectively with diverse stakeholders, lead workshops, and produce clear, structured documentation.
* You are **fluent in English**, and proficiency in **French and/or Dutch**
**What you'll love about working here**
---------------------------------------


At Capgemini Belgium we offer flexibility in more than one way: next to our hybrid way of working, where you offer you can work 70% from home, we also offer our flex abroad program. With this program you can work up to 45 days abroad, this to maintain a good work\-life balance.


Our mission is your career path. Our array of career growth programs and diverse professions are crafted to support you in exploring a world of opportunities.


OUTfront, Women@Capgemini or CapAbility are 3 examples of employee led networks dedicated to advance diversity, equity and inclusion within workplace and society.


Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55\-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end\-to\-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

title: Lead Technical HSE Engineer - 1
description:
**About us**

Worley is a global company of energy, chemicals and resources experts headquartered in Australia. We partner with our customers to deliver projects and create value across the life of their assets. We specialize in consulting, engineering, procurement and construction across the project lifecycle, with services extending through to operations and decommissioning. Leveraging extensive experience and AI\-enabled delivery, we support customers in navigating complexity as they meet today's needs and transition to more sustainable solutions.


**Essential Roles and Responsibilities:**

* Ensuring HSSEQ goals, objectives and targets are met through personal leadership and involvement.
* Safe delivery and handover of the Project to the Owner, sustainably, safely, on time, within budget, ensuring that a quality product is produced that represents ‘best value’ for the Owner and their Stakeholders.
* Coordinate and supervise the Loss Prevention engineering aspects of the Assiut Hydrocracking Complex Project to ensure the technical objectives are met within the approved scope, budget, and schedule.
* Supervise, oversee and coordinate regular and timely technical reviews of Loss Prevention related Engineering deliverables developed by the Contractor and technology Licensors, ensuring design optimization in compliance with relevant codes, standards, and best practices and in close conjunction with Owner’s functional departments.
* Co\-ordinate and interface with other Technical Departments, Business Units, Operations, and Maintenance functions to resolve technical issues and ensure quality Engineering execution and integrity.
* Provide technical expertise on all subject matter pertaining to Loss Prevention Engineering during all phases of Project e.g. Engineering, Fabrication, Installation, Pre\-commissioning and Commissioning.
* Responsible for developing and establishing systems, procedures and standards for effective implementation of the Project in line with International Codes and Standards, Owner specifications, local regulations and Owner’s HSE policies, philosophies and requirements for Loss Prevention Engineering.
* Champion the Project Safety culture, behaviors and engagement activities.
* Reporting to the PMC Engineering Manager and works under his direction.
* Ensure quality and accuracy of Contractor’s Loss Prevention Engineering activities.
* Review and approve Contractor’s work and ensure compliance with Contract obligations, Project specifications, relevant codes and standards, design philosophy, and Industry best practices.
* Provide PMC Loss Prevention performance data and reports to PMC Management and the Owner.
* Provide technical guidance to develop new specifications and update existing specifications.
* Perform calculations for design validation and optimization.
* Review technical bid submissions and perform technical bid analysis.
* Participate in Layout, P\&lD, PHASER, HAZID, HAZOP, SIL, Layout Safety Reviews, PSSR, constructability reviews, 3D Model reviews, safety audits, QRA workshops, etc.
* Provide Loss Prevention Engineering expertise in the development and analysis of various design options and business models.
* Provide technical assistance and coordination with other discipline engineers.
* Participate in analysis during Contractor and Vendor pre\-qualification, bid evaluation, and performance evaluation.
* Ensure quality and accuracy of Contractor’s Loss Prevention Engineering activities and review deliverables including philosophies, data sheets, specifications, layouts, close out reports, detailed drawings, etc. pertaining to risk studies, loss prevention systems, firefighting equipment, muster station, TGR’s, TSRs, Safety Signage, hazardous areas classifications, etc.
* Review any Project specific Risk Management Systems and criteria pertaining to Loss Prevention.
* Manager \& review of HSEIAs for Loss Prevention Engineering inputs, including reviewing hazards and effects registers, bow tie diagrams, HSECES register, HSCES performance standards and procedures, etc.
* Review Emergency Response procedures and plans for Loss Prevention inputs including alignment with Owner specifications and standards etc.
* Provide assistance and support to Construction, Pre\- commissioning and Commissioning phases of the works.
* Review Action Tracking Registers and ensure close out of all Loss Prevention actions arising out of key reviews, workshops, HSSEQ studies, safety related concerns, etc.
* Review technical bid submissions and perform technical bid analysis for Loss Prevention discipline.
* Provide Loss Prevention Engineering expertise in the development and analysis of various design options and business models.
* Provide technical assistance and coordination with other discipline Engineers.
* Participate in analysis during Contractor and Vendor pre\-qualification, bid evaluation and performance evaluation.
* Assist in the handling of correspondence related to Loss Prevention.

**Qualification:*** A bachelor’s degree in relevant engineering discipline or equivalent from an accredited university, with a minimum of fifteen (15\+) years of relevant experience in the Oil \& Gas or Petrochemical industry, including a minimum of five (5\) years (preferred) in the GCC region.
* Must have at least five (5\) years of experience in a similar position on major Oil \& Gas or Petrochemical projects, managing a team of Specialists, Senior Engineers, and Engineers.
* Experience within FEED \& EPC experience required.
* Experience in PMC roles.
* Experience in Offshore Project required.
* Minimum 5 years’ experience in Offshore projects is required.
* ADNOC experience is preferred.

And there's no barrier to your potential career success. Join us to broaden your horizons, explore diverse opportunities, and be part of delivering sustainable change.

title: Specialist Project Engineer
description:
**About us**

Worley is a global company of energy, chemicals and resources experts headquartered in Australia. We partner with our customers to deliver projects and create value across the life of their assets. We specialize in consulting, engineering, procurement and construction across the project lifecycle, with services extending through to operations and decommissioning. Leveraging extensive experience and AI\-enabled delivery, we support customers in navigating complexity as they meet today's needs and transition to more sustainable solutions.


**Responsibilities:**

* Responsible for all management aspects, including day\-to\-day work allocation and supervision, of the PMC Engineering group and the oversight of the Contractor during the Engineering, Procurement phases of the Project.
* To ensure PMC Engineering personnel are competent to perform their duties relating to the scope of work as identified in the PMC Contract.
* To provide leadership in the development and implementation of engineering processes, procedures and systems operating within the Engineering group.
* To ensure the Engineering group is resourced with the correct disciplines and size to deliver against the requirements of the PMC Contract.
* To provide independent Project Management Consultancy services and technical opinion, and advice related to short falls, recovery plans, minimizing potential risks and maintaining overall Project progress during the Engineering and Procurement phases in the Contractor's Home Offices.
* Participating in the design review and analysis consistent with requirements, including consideration of constructability, testability, operability, and maintainability, system interactions; environmental considerations; personnel safety and fire protection; and proper selection of materials.
* Ensuring the orderly technical review coordination, and processing of vendor documents.
* Securing approval from the Owner for the Engineering design in accordance with the Contract requirements.
* Manage the day today interfacing between the Projects and the disciplines of Piping, Mechanical, Structural, and E\&I and specialist disciplines.
* Participate in key customer reviews and meetings as required.
* Conduct succession planning within the engineering team, especially for key roles.
* Implement competence assessments and regular performance assessments with Team.
* Ensure team know and work to procedures in order to be efficient and right first time.
* Provide development opportunities for personnel \- to increase breadth of experience and capability.
* Site visits to demonstrate safety leadership.
* Develop and maintain effective working practices for the Wood project management team.
* Provide, with full responsibility and accountability, leadership and excellence in the achievement of coordinating both technical and governance through the different stages of the Project.
* Identify and communicate project team objectives in accordance with the contract terms, scope of work and corporate policy.
* Organize the project team, define individual responsibilities and motivate team members towards successful achievement of specified project goals, particularly through regular project meetings.
* Delegate work to the project team members in a manner that encourages individual responsibility.
* Achieve scheduled performance, cost, quality and HSE requirements from award to acceptance.
* Provide guidance to internal and external stakeholders during project execution to meet project objectives.
* Oversee different contracting parties, owners, customers, government bodies and existing facilities in coordination.
* Manage complicated issues among different project phases and the existing facilities.
* Provide leadership and management for the PMT and Contractor to ensure safe, cost effective and timely resolution of all interfaces.
* Ensure that company policies, procedures and controls are adhered to at all times.
* Be exposed to different cultures, backgrounds and environments. Attend to and resolve conflicts, challenges and problems related to a large multi\-cultural and multi\-discipline technical workforce.
* Carryout Technical Evaluation of Bids, Issue Bid Technical Clarifications, Technical Evaluation Reports and Recommendations.
* Ensuring incorporating, where applicable, the field\-requested and/or \-initiated changes to Engineering deliverables.

**Qualifications and Experience:**

* A bachelor's degree in relevant engineering or equivalent from an accredited university with a minimum of fifteen (15\+) years of relevant experience in the Oil \& Gas or Petrochemical industry, Petrochemical.
* Must have at least five (5\) years of experience in a similar position in mega Oil \& Gas or Petrochemical projects.
* Experience within FEED \& EPC experience is required.
* Experience in PMC roles.
* Experience in Offshore \& Upstream projects is required.
* Must have previous experience working in offshore projects.
ADNOC experience is required.  
* 

**Moving forward together**

We want our people to be energized and empowered to drive sustainable impact. So, our focus is on a values\-inspired culture that unlocks brilliance through belonging, connection and innovation.
