title: Edge AI & Connectivity Specialist
description:
**Location:** Orbe, Switzerland  

**Work model:** Hybrid/\[Full time
  

**Contract type / duration:** Permanent

**Start date:** As soon as possible

**Deadline for applications:** 17\.08\.2026

 **Be a force for good and accelerate change that improves lives and the planet.**

  

As an **Edge Artificial Intelligence \& Connectivity Specialist** at Nestlé Deep Tech Center, your **mission** is to accelerate Deep Tech and Connectivity innovations by turning business and technical opportunities into rapid, end\-to\-end proof of concepts that combine electronics, vision systems, connected devices, backend services and application prototyping. You’ll make a **difference** by collaborating closely in electronics, firmware, data and business teams to create connected solutions that enable faster learning and evidence\-based decisions. This is your opportunity to take ownership, grow your expertise, and make a difference at scale.

 **How you’ll make an impact as an Edge AI \& Connectivity Specialist**

  

* Accelerate rapid proof of concept development using vision systems, RFID (Radio Frequency Identification), machine learning and artificial intelligence\-enabled methods to validate high\-impact business opportunities.
* Translating consumer, business and technical needs into testable prototypes, clear validation plans and practical recommendations for next steps.
* Building reusable software components, building blocks, data assets and demonstrators, improving speed, quality and repeatability across projects.
* Integrating prototypes with cameras, sensors, connectivity, embedded platforms, edge devices, cloud services and user\-facing applications for real\-world demonstrations.
* Driving short development cycles with clear scope, success criteria, risks and evidence\-based recommendations.

 **What will make you successful**

  

* Bringing strong academic background and hands\-on capability in vision systems, machine learning, connected devices, sensors and edge computing to develop practical prototypes from idea to demonstration.
* Applying strong programming skills, especially in C, C\+\+, Python, Kotlin or similar languages, to develop, test, optimize and integrate models and software components.
* Using data collection, lab experimentation, model evaluation and variability analysis to make robust technical recommendations.
* Collaborating and integrating easily into a development team with an agile mindset, adapting to constant change, and shifting priorities when business or technical needs evolve.
* Communicating fluently in English and presenting and complex technical ideas clearly to technical and non\-technical audiences.
* Demonstrating courage, collaboration, speed and continuous learning.

 **At Nestlé in Switzerland, we place people at the heart of everything we do**

  

Our benefits are designed to support your growth and wellbeing, so you can thrive at work and in life:

  

* Flexible working options, including hybrid work possibilities (for office based roles)
* Paid holidays beyond legal requirements
* Learning and development opportunities to grow your career
* Performance based bonus
* Healthcare contribution and access to the Employee Assistance Program
* Strong employer contribution to your pension plan
* Generous parental leave and comprehensive family support solutions
* Attractive employee discounts across various products and services

 **What to expect from our hiring process**

  

We are committed to an inclusive and respectful hiring experience and are happy to provide reasonable accommodations if needed. Our workplaces are fully accessible and supported by a strong safety culture, with modern installations and procedures to ensure a safe environment for everyone.

  

The hiring process typically includes a video interview with Talent Acquisition, an interview with the hiring team, and a final discussion and offer. We review applications as they are received and close the role once a strong list of relevant candidates is identified, so we encourage you to apply early. All information is treated confidentially.

 *Stay vigilant: Nestlé will only contact candidates via official company email addresses and will never ask for payments or sensitive personal information at any stage of the hiring process.*

 **Ready to Be a Force for Good?**


Apply now and accelerate change that improves lives and the planet.

title: Analytic Consultant - CGA Team - FMCG - CHR (H/F)
description:
**Description du poste**  

Depuis 1990, CGA by NielsenIQ est une agence spécialisée dans le CHR (café, hotel, restaurant) et le secteur hors domicile et fournit des données et des analyses pour mieux comprendre la complexité de ce secteur et accompagner avec expertise et pertinence les acteurs de ce circuit que nous aimons tant (opérateurs CHR, grossistes, distributeurs, producteurs).


Dans le cadre du renforcement de nos services en France, nous recherchons actuellement notre futur(e) Analytic Consultant (Client Success CGA).


Vos missions

* Responsable de votre portefeuille de clients, vous interprétez leurs briefs et répondez à leurs problématiques en proposant des analyses à forte valeur ajoutée et de qualité.
* Contact privilégié de vos clients, vous savez détecter des opportunités chez vos clients grâce à votre connaissance des solutions NielsenIQ.
* Vous travaillez en étroite relation avec le Directeur France des Solutions Clients et avec les équipes CGA en Angleterre pour développer les solutions CGA en France.
* Vous analysez la donnée CGA pour générer des insights pour éclairer nos clients et pour apporter des éclairages sur le marché français.
* Vous collaborez avec les différentes équipes chez NielsenIQ : pistes d’améliorations, partage d’information sur vos clients etc
* Réellement intégré, vous participez aux projets d’équipes et de l’entreprise : vie de l’équipe, projets internes etc


Vos compétences

* Vous êtes diplômé bac\+5 : école de commerce, d’ingénieur ou université.
* Vous êtes à l’aise dans le décryptage de données et leurs interprétations pour les transformer en recommandations pertinentes.
* **Vous avez une expérience de 1 à 5 ans dans les études de marché, le marketing ou le category management et idéalement, chez un acteur du secteur hors domicile/ CHR.**
* Vous avez déjà travaillé(e) dans le secteur CHR ou hors domicile ou avez une affinité très forte pour le secteur.
* Vous connaissez ou êtes curieux(se) sur les produits boissons (bière, spiritueux, softs, vins, eaux).
* **Vous parlez anglais (et** **français) couramment afin de pouvoir échanger avec les équipes de CGA basée en Angleterre et aussi les clients internationaux**
* Reconnu(e) pour vos qualités relationnelles, votre pédagogie, votre flexibilité et votre esprit d'équipe, vous êtes à l’aise dans un environnement en constante évolution


Votre valeur ajoutée


Vos capacités d'analyse et votre compréhension des enjeux de vos clients et du marché hors domicile français vous permettent d’établir des recommandations pertinentes et d'aider nos clients à prendre de bonnes décisions.

**Ce que nous offrons**

* 34 600 à 39 076 euros brut annuel. Le positionnement dans cette fourchette dépendra de critères objectifs, notamment l’expérience, les compétences et les considérations d’équité interne. Nous nous engageons en faveur de l’égalité salariale et de la transparence des rémunérations. Les décisions en matière de rémunération sont prises sur la base de critères objectifs et neutres en matière de genre.
* CDI
* Une prime de vacances de 853,71 euros brut annuel.
* Mode de travail hybride : 2 jours de télétravail par semaine et flexibilité horaire
* Bâtiment récent au pied du tramway T2 à 12 minutes de La Défense
* Salle de sport, Quiet Room, Game Room, restaurant d’entreprise


\#LI\-IP2

 **Informations supplémentaires** **Our Benefits**

* Flexible working environment
* Volunteer time off
* LinkedIn Learning
* Employee\-Assistance\-Program (EAP)


NIQ may utilize artificial intelligence (AI) tools at various stages of the recruitment process, including résumé screening, candidate assessments, interview scheduling, job matching, communication support, and certain administrative tasks that help streamline workflows. These tools are intended to improve efficiency and support fair and consistent evaluation based on job\-related criteria. All use of AI is governed by NIQ’s principles of fairness, transparency, human oversight, and inclusion. Final hiring decisions are made exclusively by humans. NIQ regularly reviews its AI tools to help mitigate bias and ensure compliance with applicable laws and regulations. If you have questions, require accommodations, or wish to request human review were permitted by law, please contact your local HR representative. For more information, please visit NIQ’s AI Safety Policies and Guiding Principles: https://nielseniq.com/global/en/info/niqs\-ai\-safety\-policies/


**About NIQ**


NIQ is the world’s leading consumer intelligence company, delivering the most complete understanding of consumer buying behavior and revealing new pathways to growth. In 2023, NIQ combined with GfK, bringing together the two industry leaders with unparalleled global reach. With a holistic retail read and the most comprehensive consumer insights—delivered with advanced analytics through state\-of\-the\-art platforms—NIQ delivers the Full View™. NIQ is an Advent International portfolio company with operations in 100\+ markets, covering more than 90% of the world’s population.


For more information, visit NIQ.com


Want to keep up with our latest updates?


Follow us on: LinkedIn \| Instagram \| Twitter \| Facebook


**Our commitment to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion**


At NIQ, we are steadfast in our commitment to fostering an inclusive workplace that mirrors the rich diversity of the communities and markets we serve. We believe that embracing a wide range of perspectives drives innovation and excellence. All employment decisions at NIQ are made without regard to race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy, sexual orientation, or gender identity), national origin, age, disability, genetic information, marital status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws. We invite individuals who share our dedication to inclusivity and equity to join us in making a meaningful impact. To learn more about our ongoing efforts in diversity and inclusion, please visit the https://nielseniq.com/global/en/news\-center/diversity\-inclusion

title: APPRENTISSAGE - Ingénieur Technique en Solutions pour l'Industrie High-Tech (F/H)
description:
L’industrie High Tech a pour mission de couvrir quatre domaines d'application finaux : les semi\-conducteurs, les usines d'IA (AI Factories), les robots polyvalents et l'électronique grand public.


Le domaine des semi\-conducteurs est au cœur des autres secteurs couverts par High Tech et revêt donc un caractère stratégique.

**Vos missions**  

Vous aurez pour mission d'élaborer des solutions adaptées aux semi\-conducteurs, d'en approfondir les aspects spécifiques et de réaliser des démonstrations intégrant l'IA.

**Vos qualifications**  

Idéalement, vous suivez un cursus en génie électronique avec une spécialisation en semi\-conducteurs et vous recherchez une alternance (sous contrat d’apprentissage uniquement).

**Soft skills :**


Esprit analytique : Capacité à synthétiser et résoudre des problèmes avec rigueur.


Autonomie et proactivité dans la veille technologique.


Curiosité pour les innovations et les nouvelles technologies.

**Nous rejoindre c'est aussi**


Intégrer une entreprise scientifique au cœur de l’innovation technologique, portée par une forte croissance depuis plus de 40 ans.


Principaux avantages et bénéfices :

* Environnement collaboratif et innovant
* Collaboration internationale
* Diversité des technologies, produits et solutions
* Engagement en faveur de la diversité et de l’inclusion
**Inclusion statement**
-----------------------


As a game\-changer in sustainable technology and innovation, Dassault Systèmes is striving to build more inclusive and diverse teams across the globe. We believe that our people are our number one asset and we want all employees to feel empowered to bring their whole selves to work every day. It is our goal that our people feel a sense of pride and a passion for belonging. As a company leading change, it’s our responsibility to foster opportunities for all people to participate in a harmonized Workforce of the Future.

title: Bilingual (French & English) Sales Development Representative - 100% Remote
description:
**ABOUT TPG**

The Pipeline Group (TPG) provides our clients with end\-to\-end Pipeline Generation services that help B2B tech companies scale pipeline fast and reliably through our SDR\-as\-a\-Service model.

We combine superstar SDR talent, purpose\-built proprietary technology, industry\-leading SDR training, rigorous management \& quality control layers, world\-class data services, integrations and more to offer all\-in\-one Pipeline Generation to our clients.

TPG has been named in the Inc. 5000 Top Fastest\-Growing Privately Held Companies in the US for five consecutive years and we’re growing faster every single year.

Our clients work with us because we’ve cracked the formula for creating world\-class SDRs and putting up industry leading pipeline generation numbers.

No guesswork. Just results.

**OUR CULTURE**

At TPG, performance and accountability are our culture. We thrive on results—driven by excellence, collaboration, and integrity. Our people\-first mindset supports not only clients but our teammates. Your wins are our collective wins. Your growth is our mission.

Our vision is to be the world’s most effective virtual sales workforce—a place where high\-performing remote SDRs, program managers, and operational leaders come together to generate extraordinary ROI.

**ABOUT OUR ROLE**

We’re not just looking for someone who can cold call — we’re looking for someone with something to prove. At The Pipeline Group, SDRs are Go\-to\-Market Advisors who build pipeline, open markets, and drive real revenue impact for some of the fastest\-growing companies in the world.

**What You'll Do**

After completing our Certification Program, you'll be on the phones, driving outbound activity, and contributing to generating deal opportunities.

Core Responsibilities

* Drive pipeline growth through high\-volume cold calls, emails, and LinkedIn outreach
* Collaborate with Account Executives to book qualified meetings that turn into opportunities
* Participate in prospect meetings, take notes, and track next steps
* Build and prioritize contact lists with strategic account mapping
* Engage executives in high\-level, professional conversations
* Track daily KPIs and maintain **4\+ hours/day** of outbound activity using AI driven outreach tools
* Consistently achieve monthly quotas for meetings and qualified opportunities
* Contribute feedback to the Enablement and Program Management teams to refine messaging and campaigns

**Traits That Set You Apart**

Here’s what we see in our top performers:

* **Competitive \& Driven** – You want to win and won’t stop until you do
* **Talkative \& Conversational** – You enjoy engaging people and know how to hold a prospect's attention
* **Disciplined** – You show up every day and do the hard work, regardless of how you feel
* **Personally Accountable** – You don’t need to be pushed to perform
* **Persistent** – You don’t give up after one objection — you push through
* **Empathetic** – You see things from the customer’s point of view
* **Curious \& Adaptable** – You're always learning and adjusting to improve

**What you'll need to succeed:**

* Prior SDR/BDR or B2B prospecting experience is a plus
* Fluency in French and English (C1 levels or higher) is required
* Must be based in Europe (Balkans, UK, etc) to service our clientele and the timezone
* Proven ability to adapt to adjustments in process or priorities when required
* Highly results\-oriented and relentlessly driven
* Track record of delivering strong results under pressure and tight deadlines
* Experience using Salesforce.com or another CRM is a plus
* Excellent communication skills — professional, clear, and compelling, both verbally and in writing
* Positive, proactive, and resilient — you’re a team player who solves problems and doesn’t wait to be told what to do

**WHAT TPG PROVIDES FOR OUR TEAM MEMBERS**

* **Permanent Remote Work Model** – No commuting. Work from wherever you’re most productive.
* **Competitive Compensation**.
* **Growth \& Opportunity** – The role offers opportunities to expand skills, increase scope of work and take on greater responsibility over time. High\-performing contractors may have opportunities to support more complex client\-facing projects and, where business needs align, may be considered for future leadership\-oriented contract opportunity with increased earning potential.
* **Company Provided Home Office Equipment** – Laptop, desk, chair, etc.
* **Evaluation to Hire Model** –The role will begin as an independent contractor position, with the opportunity to transition into an EOR (Employer of Record) employment model based on performance and business needs.

Come join our innovative and dynamic team!

The Pipeline Group is an EOE/Affirmative Action Minority employer, and we welcome all to apply. We consider candidates regardless of race/color, religion, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth and related conditions), national origin/ethnicity, age, disability (intellectual, mental and physical), veteran status, marital status, ancestry, sexual orientation, gender identity and gender expression, genetic information, citizenship or any other personal characteristics protected by law.

**Please note we are not able to offer sponsorship of visas at this time.**

**An offer of employment for this role will be contingent upon the successful completion of a background check.**

**Internet Requirement:** This is a fully remote role which requires a reliable high\-speed internet connection with a **minimum of 100 Mbps download**, which will need to be verified.

Job Types: Full\-time, Contract

Pay: 25,000\.00€ \- 43,000\.00€ per year

Work Location: Remote

title: Logistics Advanced Analytics Senior Leader (M/F)
description:
**Job Description:**

**Airbus Commercial Aircraft** is looking for a **Logistics Advanced Analytics Senior Leader (m/f)** to join our **Procurment \& Supply Chain adv Analytics department** based in **Toulouse, France.**

  

OED Operations Data, Advanced Analytics and AI Factory provides clear vision, maximizes value\-for\-money, ensures user\-centric digital tools, and delivers reliable, compliant data to address critical business challenges. We closely support and collaborate with Manufacturing, Quality, and Procurement/Supply Chain \& Logistics.  



  

Joining OED means you'll gain insights and contribute directly to the digital transformation across Airbus Commercial Operations and the wider Group, specifically within the Procurement, Supply Chain \& Logistics scope. You'll be in the driver's seat for identifying disruptive technologies and deploying innovative solutions to ensure our supply chain \& Procurement are fit for the future !  



  

You will report to the Head of Planning, Transport \& Logistics Advanced Analytics \- OEDPL.  



  

In a context where the Supply Chain \& Logistics operations are key for Airbus Commercial Operational Excellence and aircraft delivery ramp\-up, you will act as a Product Manager / Product Owner to provide and implement advanced solutions for Business Intelligence, Advanced data Analytics, Reporting self\-service, to support transparency and decision making.  



  

**Your working environment :**

  

Global capital of aeronautics and European capital for space research, Toulouse is a dynamic city in the southwest of France served by an international airport. Ideally located between the Mediterranean sea and the Atlantic ocean and close to the Pyrenees mountains, it offers plenty of options for outdoor activities !  



  

**How we care for you :**

* **Financial rewards :** Attractive salary, agreements on success and profit sharing schemes, employee savings plan abounded by Airbus and employee stock purchase plan on a voluntary basis.
* **Work / Life Balance :** Extra days\-off for special occasions, holiday transfer option, a Staff council offering many social, cultural and sport activities and other services.
* **Wellbeing / Health :** Complementary health insurance coverage (disability, invalidity, death). Depending on the site: health services center, concierge services, gym, carpooling application.
* **Individual development :** Great upskilling opportunities and development prospects with unlimited access to \+10\.000 e\-learning courses to develop your employability, certifications, expert career path, accelerated development programmes, national and international mobility.

  

At Airbus, we support you to work, connect and collaborate more easily and flexibly. Wherever possible, we foster flexible working arrangements to stimulate innovative thinking.  



  

**Your challenges :**

* Understand and identify the needs of business stakeholders/business key users
* Support budget, business case and prioritization
* Design solutions on those needs with the support of analytical solutions, technology and process
* Formulate and communicate on the Analytics Product Vision
* Set\-Up the Project Governance, including the Projects/Product Service Board
* Deliver projects within time, scope, cost and quality objective
* Manage/Coordinate associated data products
* Lead technical development liaising with IT (including subcontractors)
* Manage the in\-service support, change management and associated communications

  

**Your boarding pass :**

* Professional experience in data analytics
* Professional experience in Supply Chain/Logistics
* Professional experience in Project management for Advanced data analytics / big data / business intelligence solutions / data visualization, ideally in the Supply Chain domain \- Agile for Project Management

  

Not a 100% match ? No worries ! Airbus supports your personal growth with customized development solutions.
  

Take your career to a new level and apply online now !  



  

\#LI\-JC2


This job requires an awareness of any potential compliance risks and a commitment to act with integrity, as the foundation for the Company’s success, reputation and sustainable growth.


**Company:**

AIRBUS SAS
**Employment Type:**

Permanent
\-


Classe Emploi (France): Classe G13
**Experience Level:**

Professional
**Job Family:**

Digital \<JF\-IM\-DI\>
By submitting your CV or application you are consenting to Airbus using and storing information about you for monitoring purposes relating to your application or future employment. This information will only be used by Airbus.
  

Airbus is committed to achieving workforce diversity and creating an inclusive working environment. We welcome all applications irrespective of social and cultural background, age, gender, disability, sexual orientation or religious belief.


Airbus is, and always has been, committed to equal opportunities for all. As such, we will never ask for any type of monetary exchange in the frame of a recruitment process. Any impersonation of Airbus to do so should be reported to emsom@airbus.com .


At Airbus, we support you to work, connect and collaborate more easily and flexibly. Wherever possible, we foster flexible working arrangements to stimulate innovative thinking.

title: Responsable technique de compte - lutte contre les drones
description:
#### **Join Axon and be a Force for Good.**



At Axon, we're on a mission to Protect Life. We're explorers, pursuing society's most critical safety and justice issues with our ecosystem of devices and cloud software. Like our products, we work better together. We connect with candor and care, seeking out diverse perspectives from our customers, communities and each other.  

  

Life at Axon is fast\-paced, challenging and meaningful. Here, you'll take ownership and drive real change. Constantly grow as you work hard for a mission that matters at a company where you matter.

**Responsable de compte technique embarqué — Lutte contre les drones**


* Lieu : Paris, France — présence sur site chez le client au moins 3 jours par semaine, lorsque cela est autorisé
* Déplacements : 20 à 30 % en France, y compris dans les territoires d'outre\-mer, et dans d'autres pays européens si nécessaire
* Supérieur hiérarchique : Responsable de la gestion des comptes techniques et du support régional — avec une ligne de rapport indirecte vers le responsable senior des programmes techniques


**Votre impact**



En tant que responsable technique de compte intégré chez Dedrone, une société du groupe Axon, vous serez le représentant technique de Dedrone au sein de l'un des programmes de lutte contre les drones (Counter\-UAS) les plus importants sur le plan stratégique en Europe. Vous serez le principal interlocuteur technique sur place pour le client, chargé de développer un partenariat stratégique à long terme et de veiller à ce que les solutions de Dedrone répondent à la mission opérationnelle consistant à protéger les personnes, les opérations de sécurité publique et les infrastructures critiques contre la menace que représentent les drones.



Vous apporterez votre expertise technique, assumerez la responsabilité opérationnelle au quotidien et défendrez les intérêts du client afin de garantir que les parties prenantes atteignent leurs objectifs opérationnels grâce à DedroneTracker.AI, aux capteurs RF, aux radars et aux systèmes de caméras EO/IR. En collaborant avec des équipes transversales au sein des départements PSO, ingénierie commerciale, produit et R\&D de Dedrone, vous ferez émerger des informations précieuses sur les besoins et les défis des clients, influençant ainsi les feuilles de route et les projets internes liés aux produits.



En endossant plusieurs rôles — de consultant à expert produit en passant par ingénieur de terrain —, vous aiderez les clients à optimiser leurs flux de travail quotidiens, à maintenir leur parc installé en bon état de fonctionnement et à adopter les nouvelles fonctionnalités dès leur lancement. Votre expertise et votre engagement contribueront directement à la mission d'Axon et de Dedrone : protéger des vies, établir la vérité et accélérer la justice grâce à des technologies innovantes.

  


**Vos missions**


* Acquérir une expertise dans les technologies Dedrone, notamment DedroneTracker.AI C2 (versions cloud, sur site et hors ligne), la gamme complète de capteurs RF (RF\-160, RF\-310, RF\-360, RF\-560, configurations AoA et TDOA), Robin Radar, les caméras PTZ FLIR / Axis EO/IR, ainsi que les systèmes de neutralisation agréés relevant du cadre défini par le client.
* Assurer le rôle de liaison technique principale entre Dedrone, le bureau de programme du client et les responsables opérationnels sur site.
* Participer aux réunions opérationnelles et techniques avec le client, en veillant à une communication et une collaboration efficaces entre toutes les parties prenantes.
* Mettre en place et maintenir un réseau interne Axon / Dedrone afin de soutenir à la fois l'équipe en contact avec le client et l'équipe de projet du client — notamment les ingénieurs commerciaux, le responsable technique senior du programme, la gestion des produits, le support et la R\&D.
* Fournir une assistance pratique sur le terrain tout au long du cycle de déploiement : réception et déballage du matériel, mise en service des capteurs, installation des mâts et trépieds, validation de la connectivité réseau, configuration de la plateforme C2 et tests de réception.
* Aider le client à gérer les stocks de matériel Dedrone sur l'ensemble de ses sites en France métropolitaine et dans les territoires d'outre\-mer.
* Assurer le suivi des tickets d'assistance, fournir un dépannage technique de niveau 2 — capteur réseau serveur interface utilisateur — et escalader vers le niveau 3 / la R\&D si nécessaire.
* Maintenir à jour la bibliothèque RF en fonction de l'environnement de menaces du client — coordonner avec la R\&D de Dedrone l'ajout de signatures et les mises à jour de DedroneDNA en fonction des menaces observées.
* Veiller au respect des exigences en matière de niveau de service et des obligations contractuelles.
* Assister le responsable technique senior du programme et l'équipe PSO en fournissant les documents, informations et retours clients demandés. Transmettre les retours clients aux équipes Dedrone / Axon et collaborer pour favoriser l'amélioration des produits.
* Identifier et signaler les risques afin de faciliter la collaboration en interne et avec la direction.
* Interpréter et communiquer les notes de mise à jour de Dedrone, en adaptant les informations pertinentes pour le client afin d'améliorer la compréhension et de favoriser l'adoption du produit, en coordination avec l'équipe d'ingénieurs commerciaux.
* Soutenir les étapes de facturation et de comptabilisation du chiffre d'affaires en garantissant la fiabilité des comptages de déploiement et en tenant à jour les enregistrements dans Salesforce et les outils PSO.
* Faciliter la formation et le transfert de connaissances pour les opérateurs clients, y compris les intégrations : API, webhooks, connecteurs C2 équivalents à Fusus, intégrations ATAK/TAK le cas échéant.
* Participer aux évaluations de sécurité chez les clients et aux évaluations de mise à jour des fournisseurs en cas de changements architecturaux majeurs.
* Maîtriser l'environnement technique du client, notamment l'infrastructure, le réseau, les politiques de sécurité et les processus d'approvisionnement.
* Tenir à jour et gérer les registres de déploiement, y compris le suivi des expéditions et les demandes de retour (RMA) dans les territoires d'outre\-mer.
* Élaborer et enrichir la documentation technique et les articles de la base de connaissances afin d'améliorer l'assistance client, les capacités de libre\-service et la compréhension globale du produit — y compris, le cas échéant, les guides d'utilisation en français.
* Assurer une coordination étroite avec l'installateur tiers local concernant la préparation du site, l'installation physique et le transfert de la maintenance de niveau 1\.
* Assurer un déploiement en toute confiance grâce à des conseils techniques, à la planification de la mise en place et à l'accompagnement à la mise en service.
* Réduire les risques liés à la mise en œuvre en identifiant dès le début les dépendances en matière d'intégration, de configuration, d'accès et de flux de travail.
* Favoriser l'adoption grâce à une mise en compétence spécifique aux rôles, à l'alignement des formations et à la planification de l'adoption.
* Renforcer la santé technique grâce à des revues proactives, à la préparation aux mises à jour et à des conseils en matière de performances.
* Coordonner les escalades en tant que partenaire technique dédié qui comprend l'environnement du client.
* Suivre les progrès par rapport aux résultats grâce à un plan de réussite, une feuille de route et un rythme de revue des indicateurs clés de performance (KPI).
* Créer davantage de valeur en termes d'adoption opérationnelle, de santé de la plateforme, de productivité du personnel et de réduction des risques.

  


**Profil recherché**


* Nationalité française — obligatoire pour travailler avec des données gouvernementales sensibles ; disposition à se soumettre à une habilitation de sécurité délivrée par le gouvernement français, telle que l'Habilitation Confidentiel Défense ou un niveau supérieur si nécessaire.
* Bilingue français\-anglais — français langue maternelle ; anglais professionnel à l'écrit et à l'oral.
* Au moins 5 ans d'expérience dans un poste lié à l'informatique, à l'ingénierie réseau, à l'ingénierie de terrain en radiofréquence (RF) / capteurs, ou au déploiement technique.
* Expérience de collaboration avec les forces de l'ordre, le secteur de la défense ou des entités gouvernementales — fortement appréciée.
* Expérience avérée dans la gestion réussie de relations clients et de projets techniques.
* Capacité à travailler de manière autonome pour atteindre les objectifs avec un encadrement minimal, en particulier lorsque vous êtes intégré au quotidien chez le client.
* Solide expérience en informatique, avec des connaissances pratiques dans les domaines suivants :
* Administration réseau : TCP/IP, VLAN, DHCP, DNS, SSH, pare\-feu, VPN, liaison LTE.
* Administration de serveurs Linux et Windows, notions de base en SQL, gestion des certificats.
* Modèles de déploiement sur site, hors ligne / en isolation physique et dans le cloud.
* Active Directory / Entra ID et modèles d'intégration des identités.
* Intégrations d'API et administration d'applications SaaS.
* Solide capacité à adapter les discussions techniques à des publics variés — des opérateurs et utilisateurs de terrain aux autorités techniques et aux décideurs de haut niveau.
* Grande rigueur en matière de documentation — schémas d'architecture, manuels d'exploitation, dossiers de transfert S2S, supports de formation des opérateurs.
* A l'aise avec la gestion d'un laboratoire personnel et l'apprentissage approfondi de nouvelles technologies liées aux capteurs, aux radiofréquences, aux radars, à l'observation de la Terre et à l'infrarouge.

  


**Atouts / Critères de différenciation**


* Expérience préalable dans les domaines de la lutte contre les drones (C\-UAS), de la défense ISR, de la guerre électronique ou de l'ingénierie de terrain pour les infrastructures critiques.
* Connaissance de l'analyse du spectre RF — SDR, analyseurs de spectre, compréhension des diagrammes de rayonnement des antennes.
* Maîtrise des cadres réglementaires français — ANFR pour le spectre, désignation OIV/OSE, PSSI\-E.
* Connaissance des plateformes C\-UAS Dedrone ou de celles de ses concurrents — DroneShield, CerbAir, MC2 Technologies, ApolloShield, DroneFox.
* Expérience avec le radar Robin, les caméras FLIR ou les caméras Axis au niveau du déploiement.
* Expérience au sein du génie des transmissions, de la gendarmerie technique ou des systèmes au sol de l'armée de l'air française.


**Des avantages qui vous sont destinés**


* Salaire de base compétitif
* Régime de retraite
* Assurance vie
* Assurance maladie
* 30 jours de congés payés, auxquels s'ajoutent les jours fériés et les jours de congé accordés par l'entreprise
* Indemnité de logement de 8 000 euros par an
* Assurance décès et invalidité
* Mise à disposition du matériel nécessaire au travail
* Formation et développement continus
* Prestations et assistance en matière de santé mentale
* Le sentiment d'avoir un rôle à jouer au sein d'une mission qui a un impact sur nos communautés locales et la société dans son ensemble


Don't meet every single requirement? That's ok. At Axon, we Aim Far. We think big with a long\-term view because we want to reinvent the world to be a safer, better place. We are also committed to building diverse teams that reflect the communities we serve.



Studies have shown that women and people of color are less likely to apply to jobs unless they check every box in the job description. If you're excited about this role and our mission to Protect Life but your experience doesn't align perfectly with every qualification listed here, we encourage you to apply anyways. You may be just the right candidate for this or other roles.


**Important Notes**


*The above job description is not intended as, nor should it be construed as, exhaustive of all duties, responsibilities, skills, efforts, or working conditions associated with this job. The job description may change or be supplemented at any time in accordance with business needs and conditions.*


*Some roles may also require legal eligibility to work in a firearms environment.*


*We collect personal information from applicants to evaluate candidates for employment. You may request access, deletion, or exercise other CCPA rights at* ***axongreenhousesupport@axon.com*** *or via our* *Axon Privacy Web Form**. For more information, please see the Your California Privacy Rights section of our* *Applicant and Candidate Privacy Notice.*


*Axon's mission is to Protect Life and is committed to the well\-being and safety of its employees as well as Axon's impact on the environment. All Axon employees must be aware of and committed to the appropriate environmental, health, and safety regulations, policies, and procedures. Axon employees are empowered to report safety concerns as they arise and activities potentially impacting the environment.*


*We are an equal opportunity employer that promotes justice, advances equity, values diversity and fosters inclusion. We're committed to hiring the best talent — regardless of race, creed, color, ancestry, religion, sex (including pregnancy), national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship status, marital status, disability, gender identity, genetic information, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws, regulations and ordinances — and empowering all of our employees so they can do their best work. If you have a disability or special need that requires assistance or accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please email* *recruitingops@axon.com.* *Please note that this email address is for accommodation purposes only. Axon will not respond to inquiries for other purposes.*



Phishing alert: Axon will never ask you to pay for any part of the hiring process, including training, equipment, or background checks. We do not make job offers via text message, WhatsApp, or instant messaging platforms without a formal interview process. All legitimate job openings are listed on our official careers page at https://www.axon.com/careers. If you receive a suspicious offer or outreach from an email address that is not **@axon.com**, or if you are asked for sensitive personal information (bank details, Social Security Number) prematurely, please ignore the message and report it to recruitingops@axon.com.

title: Senior Product Manager
description:
We are looking for a **Senior Product Manager** to join one of our **Product Tribes**, the cross\-functional units that own the end\-to\-end experience for a specific Toggl user role. You own your Tribe's direction, prioritization, and outcomes while working hands\-on with design and engineering to ship work that matters. You'll do this as we build and launch **Toggl Focus**, our consolidated planning, time tracking, and time intelligence product.


The salary for this position is **€90,000 annually.**


You can work **from anywhere in the world as long as your main location is between UTC\-4 and UTC\+4\.**

**The Role**
------------


As a Senior Product Manager, you own a product area end\-to\-end: its direction, prioritization, and outcomes. You are accountable not for process, but for clarity, judgment, and results. You work hands\-on with design, engineering, and revenue to identify the highest\-value opportunities, shape effective solutions, and ship improvements that matter. You act as a player\-coach, raising the quality of thinking, decision\-making, and execution within your Tribe.


Your main responsibilities will be:

**Direction and prioritization**

* **Set clear direction for your Tribe.** Define goals, translate company priorities into team focus, and identify the biggest opportunities and risks.
* **Make strong prioritization calls.** Decide what to do and what not to do, sequence work sensibly, and keep low\-value work out of the team.
* **Develop a strong point of view** on your product area. Understand users, the market, and the business deeply enough to make tradeoffs and say no clearly, without escalating decisions unnecessarily.

**Discovery and solution shaping**

* **Build real understanding of user problems** through customer calls, support and sales input, user research, and data.
* **Shape solutions with design and engineering.** Frame problems, compare options and constraints, and keep solutions tied to user and business value.

**Hands\-on leadership**

* **Lead designers within your Tribe.** Guide prototyping, user testing, and UX quality as embedded builders, not through handoffs.
* **Stay close to the work through execution.** Review flows, experiments, metrics, and shipped output. Resolve ambiguity quickly. Help the team converge faster.
* **Coach your team** by sharpening problem framing, improving decision quality, and keeping focus on the highest\-value work.

**Metrics, learning, and communication**

* **Define success upfront** for every initiative with clear OKRs, KPIs, leading indicators, and kill criteria. Measure impact after launch and decide whether to iterate, scale, or roll back.
* **Participate in roadmap reviews**, sharing upcoming priorities with leadership and internal stakeholders and surfacing tradeoffs and risks early.
* **Explain direction and decisions simply.** Keep stakeholders aligned with minimal overhead.

**AI as core leverage**

* **Use AI tools extensively in your daily work** for research, synthesis, analysis, drafting, exploration, and prototyping, and set that expectation across your Tribe. AI fluency is not optional. It's part of how you increase your speed, depth, and impact.

**About You**
-------------


You will thrive in this role if you:

* Have **proven product management experience**, ideally in B2B SaaS, or have built and shipped products people actually use, whether as a PM, founder, or in another role where you owned product decisions end to end.
* Hold an **extremely high bar for product quality.** You've developed real craft in product development. You know what great looks like, you notice the details others miss, and you don't ship work you wouldn't be proud to put your name on.
* Have **strong product judgment.** You develop a clear point of view on your area, make grounded tradeoffs, and say no without needing permission.
* Are a **problem\-first thinker.** You start from user needs and business impact, not from solutions or feature lists.
* Can **define and own outcomes rigorously.** You set KPIs, run experiments, interpret data, and make tough calls based on results. You're accountable for whether the work matters, not just whether it gets done.
* **Thrive in ambiguity and move fast.** You don't wait for perfect information or permission. You make confident decisions, adapt when new insights emerge, and course\-correct without drama.
* Can **pick up a new domain fast.** You're comfortable ramping into unfamiliar user segments and becoming the expert your Tribe needs.
* Have a **strong understanding of product\-led growth principles** and know how to balance self\-serve adoption with sales\-assisted motions for larger accounts.
* Are **hands\-on with AI tools.** You actively use AI for research, analysis, drafting, and prototyping as a core part of how you work, not a side experiment.
* **Don't need to be managed.** You set your own direction, keep people in the loop, and ask for help when it matters.
* Have **excellent written and verbal English communication skills.** You explain direction and decisions simply, communicate tradeoffs clearly, and articulate customer value without jargon.
* Value **transparency, ownership, and speed over perfection.** You ship, learn, and improve rather than waiting for the perfect plan.
* Nice to have: experience **leading designers** as embedded product builders, guiding user research, prototyping, and usability testing as part of an integrated discovery process, not as a separate handoff step.

**This Role Is NOT**
--------------------

* A meeting organizer, ticket router, or status reporter.
* A layer between functions or a process owner whose main contribution is ceremony.
* A roadmap administrator who writes detailed specs and manages backlogs rather than deeply understanding users and driving outcomes.
* A feature\-factory role. If your primary metric is "stories shipped," this isn't the right fit.
* A role for people who need heavy process, frequent approvals, or top\-down direction to do their best work.

**The Team**


We are a global team of \~100 awesome people working from over 40 countries around the globe. We hire globally, you work locally—in the heart of London, a beach outside of Río de Janeiro, or a quiet village near Florence, the choice is yours. Every few months we travel to meet up somewhere in the world and spend some quality time together. We place a huge amount of trust in our people, and we measure the outcomes rather than the work itself. Our values fuel our results.  

  

**What's Happening at Toggl**


Toggl is at an exciting turning point. We're taking our best\-in\-class time tracking \- trusted and loved by millions of users worldwide \- and expanding it into something bigger: Toggl Focus. One product that brings together time tracking, planning, capacity management, reporting, and insight. The idea is simple: better time tracking creates better data, which powers everything else. We call it time intelligence.

**Benefits**

* Freedom to choose when and how much you work—we only measure results
* 24 days of paid time off a year, plus your local holidays
* Unlimited sick leave
* In\-person meetups for team\-building (expenses covered)
* 4\-6 weeks paid sabbatical (depending on tenure)
* Laptop budget up to 2,500€ and it renews every 3 years
* €2,000 budget to set up your home office and an additional €300 every year after 3 years of tenure
* €3,000 per year for co\-working space membership and/or internet service at home
* €4,000 per year contribution to use for training, workshops, and conferences
* €2,400 per year contribution for any equipment or services to improve and/or maintain your physical and mental health
* Support for buying tools you need for doing your best work (even eyeglasses if you need a new pair)

title: INTERNATIONAL INCENTIVE PROJECT DIRECTOR
description:
At **egg** we make experiences. Real ones.


The kind that take creativity, sharp thinking, attention to detail and, every now and then, a sense of humour when everything changes five minutes before launch.


We work across countries, cultures and clients, so things move fast and no two days look the same. That's part of what we enjoy. It also means we need people who can stay calm under pressure, take ownership and care about getting things right.


We laugh a lot too. Sometimes at work. Mostly at ourselves.


At **egg**, we care about each other as much as we care about our clients and our business. We're collaborative, curious and straightforward. We help each other out when things get busy, we challenge each other to think differently, and we don't leave problems for someone else to solve.


No big egos. No hiding mistakes. No silent chickens in this nest.

**Which brings us to you**


You don't just organise incentive programmes. You create experiences people talk about for years.


You're passionate about travel, naturally curious about the world and always looking for the next destination, hidden gem or unforgettable experience. You understand that the smallest details often have the biggest impact, and you thrive on turning ambitious briefs into seamless, world\-class programmes.


You combine creativity with operational excellence, commercial awareness and calm decision\-making. Whether you're presenting to a client, leading a project team or managing multiple programmes across different countries, you stay focused, adaptable and committed to delivering exceptional work.


Most importantly, you're someone people trust, whether they're clients, colleagues or partners on the other side of the world.

**What you’ll be doing**

* Lead the end\-to\-end delivery of complex international incentive travel programmes, from brief through to onsite execution and post\-event evaluation
* Build trusted relationships with global clients, suppliers and destination partners, acting as a strategic advisor throughout the programme lifecycle
* Develop creative destination concepts and present compelling solutions that exceed client expectations
* Lead cross\-functional project teams, providing direction, coaching and quality oversight while ensuring programmes are delivered on time, on budget and to the highest standard
* Own programme budgets, commercial performance and profitability, balancing exceptional experiences with commercial success
* Travel internationally to lead site inspections, oversee programme delivery and stay ahead of industry trends, emerging destinations and new opportunities

**What you’ll bring**

*(We really mean it. Candidates who do not meet the following criteria will not be considered.)*

**Experience \& skills**

* 10\+ years' experience delivering international incentive travel programmes **within an agency environment**
* Proven experience managing complex, **multi\-country incentive programmes** for global clients
* Strong commercial acumen, including budget ownership and financial management
* Ability to build trusted relationships with clients, suppliers, DMCs and destination partners across international markets
* Exceptional project leadership and organisational skills, with the ability to manage multiple programmes simultaneously
* Passion for travel, destinations and creating unforgettable participant experiences
* Curious about AI and how technology can improve the way we create proposals, manage projects and deliver programmes
* **Billingual in English and French** (No scrambled oeufs at **egg**, svp.)

**How we work at egg**


Things move fast here. Priorities shift. Clients expect excellence.


The people who thrive at **egg** tend to:

* Take ownership and get things done
* Stay calm when priorities change
* Focus on outcomes and quality
* Be comfortable with ambiguity
* Look for smarter ways of working, including AI and technology
* Balance creativity with structure and execution

**Bonus points if...**

* You speak additional languages
* You've used AI to improve creativity, efficiency or project delivery
* You have an established international network of suppliers, DMCs or destination partners
* You enjoy discovering emerging destinations and travel trends before everyone else

**What we bring to the table**

* Flexible working setup (remote in some places, hybrid in others)
* Competitive salary \+ performance\-based bonus
* Home office / tech stipend, lunch vouchers
* Smart, supportive colleagues who genuinely enjoy working together
* International career opportunities \+ annual global offsite in somewhere excellent
* Free coffee, pet\-friendly offices and a culture that cares about people as much as performance

*(Yes, the coffee is good. We're not monsters.)*

**The hiring process**

* Online application *(you’ve swiped right)*
* First intro call *(we’ve swiped right too — let’s see if there’s chemistry)*
* First interview *(time to crack things open a bit)*
* Second interview *(meet the family — don’t worry, they’re mostly well\-behaved eggs)*
* Offer *(we’re in love. hope you are too)*

**The most important bit**


At **egg**, feedback goes in all directions: up, down and sideways. We believe accountability and kindness can coexist.


It’s okay to make mistakes here, as long as we own them, learn from them, and don’t keep serving them sunny\-side up forever.


We’re proud of a team made up of people from all walks of life, backgrounds and perspectives. We believe this makes our work better, our thinking sharper, and our outcomes stronger.


We welcome applications from all genders, including transgender and non\-binary people, as well as BIPOC communities, LGBTQ2S\+ communities, and people with visible and non\-visible disabilities.


We are also an ESG\-driven company committed to making a positive impact beyond our own walls.

title: Patent Paralegal
description:
**JBT Marel** is looking for a **Patent Paralegal** to join our team in **Boxmeer, the Netherlands** .  

  



The **Patent Paralegal** works closely with Attorneys, Patent Information Specialists and division management to ensure correct management of the JBT Marel IP portfolio. The ability to effectively communicate with attorneys and division management is key for this position. A patent paralegal has a strong understanding of the global legal patent process. In addition, a patent paralegal needs to be able to use various software systems to manage the IP portfolio and provide updates on the status of cases.  

  



The ability to organize is critical for a patent paralegal. This skill is critical in order to keep track of Official deadlines, manage the department workload, legal documentation and other important information.  

  



**Main responsibilities**

The patent paralegal works closely in a team with the in\-house IP team (patent/ trademark attorneys, patent search specialists and other patent paralegals) and the division management.


Towards the outside world the patent paralegal will collaborate with external national and international patent/trademark attorneys, their patent/ trademark paralegals, national patent offices, European Patent Office (EPO) and World International Patent Organization (WIPO). The main responsibility of the patent paralegal is the administration of JBT Marel´s worldwide (IP) matters.
  

  

Furthermore, the patent paralegal assists in defining the roadmap of the JBT Marel IP department.  

  



These tasks include:  

  



**Management of patent and trademark software system**

* Processing and docketing incoming correspondence from IP agents and IP Offices,
* Monitoring critical deadlines,
* Organizing annuity payments of JBT Marel patent portfolio,
* Working according to industry best practices relating to JBT Marel patent applications,
Entering and checking acquired Patent Portfolio data into JBT Marel patent software system.  
* 

**Filings and administrative (formalities) tasks**

* Filing of patent applications (NL, EP, PCT applications, PCT national phase applications, EP Validations),
* Fulfilling worldwide legal requirements for patents and trademarks (power of Attorneys, deeds of assignment, legal certificates),
* Organizing and handling JBT Marel internal patent meetings (PWG, IPSC).

**Organisation support function**

* Support function to internal patent attorney,
* Support creating patent portfolio screening material for JBT Marel divisions.

**Skills and abilities**

* Excellent interpersonal, verbal and written communication skills,
* Possess critical attention to detail,
* Ability to use sound judgment and discretion in dealing with highly confidential information,
* Strong organizational and computer skills.

**Education, Knowledge, and Experience**

* Excellent language skills in English, other languages are an advantage,
* Paralegal certificate is an advantage,
* Experience with and comfort working in a multi\-cultural, multi\-discipline organization is an advantage.

**Who we are**

JBT Marel is a global leader in food processing solutions, combining advanced technology with a strong focus on sustainability, innovation, and operational excellence. Our teams work closely across disciplines and borders to transform the way food is processed worldwide.


**Interested?**

 Apply by clicking the apply button and share your CV with us
 Learn more about us at: **JBTMarel.com** Follow us on LinkedIn: **https://www.linkedin.com/company/jbtmarel/**

  

**Join us \- and help shape the future of maintenance excellence at JBT Marel.**

***Use of Technology in Our Hiring Process***

*JBT Marel uses technology\-assisted tools, including artificial intelligence (AI), to support the review of applications.*  



*These tools help our recruiting teams identify skills and experience relevant to the role based on job\-related criteria.*  



*All applications are reviewed by people, and AI is not used to make hiring decisions independently. We are committed to fair, consistent and inclusive hiring practices globally.*

\#LI\-JV1

title: Analyst Treasury Technology & Operations
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION
At eBay, we're more than a global ecommerce leader — we’re changing the way the world shops and sells. Our platform empowers millions of buyers and sellers in more than 190 markets around the world. We’re committed to pushing boundaries and leaving our mark as we reinvent the future of ecommerce for enthusiasts.


Our customers are our compass, authenticity thrives, bold ideas are welcome, and everyone can bring their unique selves to work — every day. We're in this together, sustaining the future of our customers, our company, and our planet.


Join a team of passionate thinkers, innovators, and dreamers — and help us connect people and build communities to create economic opportunity for all.


**Job Description**


About the team and the role


The Treasury International team supports eBay's global marketplace by managing liquidity across EMEA and APAC to meet daily operating needs and enable longer\-term growth. This role sits within eBay Treasury and works closely with regional subsidiaries, banks, and cross\-functional partners including Finance and Managed Payments.


We are looking for someone who is naturally curious about technology, enjoys experimenting with new tools, including AI\-powered solutions, and thrives in an environment where operational excellence and continuous improvement go hand in hand.


**What you will accomplish**


* Ensure daily liquidity across EMEA and APAC by preparing cash positions and short\-term cash flow forecasts for regional subsidiaries and the Treasury Centre.
* Execute daily treasury transactions, including intercompany transfers, netting, funding requests, and short\-term investments, while partnering with banks to resolve operational issues.
* Produce reporting and analytics that provide insight into cash positions, liquidity, interest income, and counterparty exposures.
* Identify opportunities to apply automation and AI solutions to simplify manual activities, improve decision\-making, and enhance the efficiency of treasury operations.
* Assist with treasury system administration, testing, implementations, upgrades, and process documentation.
* Bring a continuous improvement mindset by challenging existing processes and helping implement practical, scalable solutions.

**What you will bring:**


* 3–5 years of experience in treasury, finance, banking, accounting, or another analytical role, supported by a Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, Information Systems, Data Analytics, or a related field (Master's degree is an advantage).
* Strong analytical and data skills, with experience working with large datasets and translating insights into business decisions using advanced Excel/Google Sheets and reporting tools such as Power BI, Tableau, or SQL.
* Experience with Treasury Management Systems (ideally Quantum) and familiarity with ERP platforms such as SAP S/4HANA.
* Exposure to automation and technology, including tools such as Python, Power Query, VBA, APIs, or similar, with a passion for improving treasury processes through technology.
* Interest in AI and digital innovation, with experience using AI\-powered tools (e.g., ChatGPT Enterprise, Microsoft Copilot, Claude AI, GitHub Copilot, or similar) to enhance productivity, analysis, and workflow automation is considered an advantage.

**Additional Details**


eBay is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, veteran status, and disability, or other legally protected status. If you have a need that requires accommodation, please contact us at talent@ebay.com. We will make every effort to respond to your request for accommodation as soon as possible. View our accessibility statement to learn more about eBay's commitment to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities.

  

We use cookies to enhance your experience and may use AI tools for administrative tasks in the hiring process. To learn how we handle your personal data and use AI responsibly, please visit our Talent Privacy Notice, Privacy Center, and AI Hiring Guidelines.

title: Legal Counsel Energierecht
description:
De energietransitie vraagt om slimme, daadkrachtige professionals. Op de afdeling Legal Affairs \& Company Secretariat werken we dagelijks aan actuele, uitdagende en vernieuwende juridische vraagstukken, zodat Nederland ook morgen kan rekenen op een betrouwbaar elektriciteitsnet. Draag jij hieraan bij als **Legal Counsel energierecht**?
### **Jouw bijdrage aan TenneT**

**Jouw rol**


Als Legal Counsel energierecht ben jij verantwoordelijk voor juridische advisering, zodat collega’s kunnen vertrouwen op jouw kennis en kunde en Nederland kan blijven rekenen op betrouwbare en duurzame energie.


Je komt te werken in de afdeling Legal Affairs \& Company Secretariat, bestaande uit ongeveer 40 collega’s. Daarbinnen ben je onderdeel van het team Energy \& Corporate Law, bestaande uit 11 collega’s. Samen werken jullie aan een breed takenpakket, waarbij jij onder meer adviseert over energierecht en optreedt in procedures (zelfstandig of samen met externe advocaten).


Binnen ons team heerst een werksfeer die gekenmerkt wordt door deskundigheid, open communicatie en collegialiteit. De drempel om elkaar te benaderen om kennis te delen en gezamenlijk tot oplossingen te komen, is laag.


Je gaat je voornamelijk richten op:


* Adviseren over Europese en nationale wet\- en regelgeving, over rechtspraak en geschilbesluiten, en over overeenkomsten met aangeslotenen (aanlegovereenkomst, aansluit\- en transportovereenkomst, congestiemanagementovereenkomsten)
* Bijdragen aan de ontwikkeling van nieuwe wet\- en regelgeving op het gebied van energierecht
* Verdedigen van de belangen van TenneT in geschillen en het optreden namens TenneT in geschilprocedures en rechtszaken
* Onderhandelen bij nieuwe, complexe transacties op het gebied van energierecht
* Verzorgen van trainingen en kennisoverdracht aan collega’s
* Verbeteren van modellen en processen van TenneT en gezamenlijk met de overige systeembeheerders

**Waar kom je terecht**


Naast de divisies die verantwoordelijk zijn voor de uitvoering van onze end\-to\-end processen, kent TenneT ook een aantal enabling functies. Dit zijn afdelingen die rechtstreeks rapporteren aan de CEO of CFO en die een essentiële rol spelen in het mogelijk maken van onze strategie, operatie en transitie. Ook Legal Affairs \& Company Secretariat is zo’n afdeling.


De enabling functies zorgen voor de juiste kaders, expertise en ondersteuning op cruciale gebieden. Ze dragen bij aan onze reputatie en stakeholderrelaties, de financiële gezondheid van ons bedrijf, goed bestuur en transparantie, en optimale ondersteuning van onze medewerkers.


### **Jouw profiel en achtergrond**

**Jouw profiel \& achtergrond**


Bij TenneT zoeken we professionals die bijdragen aan de toekomst van ons elektriciteitsnet. We verwachten dat je de juiste ervaring en vaardigheden hebt om een waardevolle bijdrage te leveren aan ons team en onze missie. Wat breng jij mee?


**Ervaring**


* Een afgeronde opleiding Nederlands recht
* Minimaal 4 jaar relevante werkervaring als advocaat of jurist
* Een uitstekende mondelinge en schriftelijke beheersing van de Nederlandse en Engelse taal
* Communicatief sterk, hands\-on en een teamspeler

  

De ideale kandidaat heeft bovendien:


* Ervaring met energierecht of ervaring opgedaan in een andere gereguleerde sector
* Een stevige civielrechtelijke basis (bijvoorbeeld in het verbintenissenrecht of vennootschapsrecht)
* Ervaring in het werken met (legal) AI in een werkomgeving

Mis je deze ervaring, maar heb je wel een duidelijke affiniteit met de energiesector en ben je bereid je hier verder in te verdiepen? Aarzel dan niet om toch te solliciteren.


**Competenties**


* **Omgaan met complexiteit:** je overziet complexe vraagstukken en grote hoeveelheden, soms tegenstrijdige informatie, en vertaalt deze naar heldere oplossingen en concrete acties.
* **Besluitkwaliteit:** je draagt bij aan en neemt doordachte en tijdige beslissingen die richting geven en de organisatie vooruithelpen.
* **Innovatie stimuleren:** je komt met frisse ideeën en vernieuwende aanpakken die bijdragen aan duurzaam succes.
* **Werkprocessen optimaliseren:** je herkent verbetermogelijkheden in processen en zorgt voor efficiënter en effectiever werken, met oog voor continue verbetering.
* **Organisatorisch inzicht:** je beweegt je soepel binnen een complexe organisatie en weet beleid, processen en mensen effectief met elkaar te verbinden.
* **Overtuigingskracht:** je weet anderen te overtuigen met sterke argumenten, tactvol en nauwkeurig taalgebruik (zowel Nederlands als Engels), en je creëert draagvlak en betrokkenheid om gezamenlijke doelen te realiseren.
### **Ons recruitment process**

### **Ons aanbod**

Flexibility
**Flexibiliteit voor betere work\-life balans**
* Flexibele arbeidstijden;
* Hybride werken waarin je afwisselt tussen thuis of remote werken en werken op TenneT locatie;
* Ouderschapsverlof (met na 1 jaar in dienst ook een werkgeversbijdrage);
* Tijdelijk meer of minder werken of doorwerken na je pensioendatum;
* Mogelijkheid voor sabbatical leave;
* Thuiswerkvergoeding.

Payment \& more
**Uitstekende arbeidsvoorwaarden en regelingen**
* Vast dienstverband bij indiensttreding;
* 43 verlfodagen bij fulltime dienstverband;
* Naast 8% vakantietoeslag een 6% eindejaarsuitkering;
* Vergoeding woon\-werkverkeer of een leaseauto (afhankelijk van je functie);
* TenneT betaalt 70% van je pensioenpremie (middelloonregeling / ABP);
* Opties voor deelname aan IPAP en ANW Hiaatverzekering.

Wellness  

Balance \&  

Personal Growth
**Gezondheid – jouw basis**
* Always Energy programma met een brede mix aan trainingen en workshops om je fysiek en mentaal fit te houden;
* Fietsvergoeding;
* Bijdrage van €60,\- bruto aan de premie voor je ziektekostenverzekering;
* Bijdrage van €30,\- bruto aan de premie voor je aanvullende ziektekostenverzekering;
* Bijdrage van €40,\-aan je sportabonnement.

Technology \&  

Innovation
**Inspirerende werkomgeving**
* Hoofdkantoor MCE in Arnhem gelegen aan de rand van landgoed Mariëndaal. Ideaal voor een lunchwandeling in het groen of lunch buiten op het terras;
* Bedrijfsrestaurant met gevarieerde en brede keuze voor lunch met collega’s of relaties;
* EkV, ons all day café, voor je croissantje en lekkere verse koffie;
* Flexibele werkplekken op onze kantoorlocaties met zones om te brainstormen, te vergaderen, geconcentreerd te werken of elkaar te ontmoeten.

### **Onze uitdaging**

Legal Affairs \& Company Secretariat helpt TenneT haar doelen te bereiken en de energietransitie te versnellen, binnen de kaders van wet\- en regelgeving. We zorgen voor sterke governance, goed georganiseerde besluitvorming en kwalitatief juridisch advies. Als onafhankelijke en betrokken partner werken we nauw samen met de business, delen we onze expertise en dragen we bij aan zorgvuldige, efficiënte en compliant besluitvorming.
### **Extra informatie**

TenneT biedt jou de kans om bij te dragen aan een duurzame energietoekomst. Samen met collega’s, partners en stakeholders werk je aan innovatieve oplossingen die de energietransitie mogelijk maken. Bij ons krijg je de ruimte om je talent te ontwikkelen en werk je in een omgeving waarin jouw groei centraal staat. Wij stimuleren initiatief en geven je de ruimte om met nieuwe ideeën te komen.  

Wij bieden jou:

* Een salaris in schaal 9: €4816,\- tot €9472,\- per maand met 8% vakantiegeld en 6% eindejaarsuitkering.
* Een solide pensioen via ABP: wij betalen 70% van jouw premie.
* 43 verlofdagen per jaar.
* Alle genoemde arbeidsvoorwaarden gelden bij een fulltime dienstverband, tenzij anders vermeld.

Heb je vragen over de functie? Neem dan contact op met **Rutger Prins** via **Rutger.Prins@TenneT.eu.**  

  

**Solliciteren kan uitsluitend via het sollicitatieformulier. E\-mails met cv kunnen wij niet in behandeling nemen.**  

  

**Acquisitie naar aanleiding van deze vacature wordt niet op prijs gesteld en zal daarom niet in behandeling worden genomen.**  


### **Salaris**

4816 € \- 9472 €
Bij TenneT willen we ons wervingsproces zo efficiënt en eerlijk mogelijk maken. Daarom gebruiken we AI\-technologie als hulpmiddel. Onze AI\-tool helpt ons sollicitanten te matchen op basis van relevante functietitels en vaardigheden. Het is belangrijk om te weten dat er nooit volledig geautomatiseerde beslissingen worden genomen; elke sollicitatie wordt uiteindelijk beoordeeld door een menselijke recruiter. Onze AI houdt geen rekening met persoonlijke gegevens zoals geslacht, leeftijd, afkomst of religie, waardoor er geen nadelen of discriminatie op basis van deze factoren zijn. Voor vragen of bezwaren kun je mailen naar sollicitatie@tennet.eu.

  


TenneT houdt Nederland aan. We vervoeren 24/7 elektriciteit over het hoogspanningsnet, sluiten klanten aan en maken de energietransitie mogelijk door het net uit te breiden en slimmer te gebruiken. Samen met partners werken we aan een betrouwbaar, betaalbaar en weerbaar energiesysteem. Zo verbinden we Nederland met een duurzame toekomst.
  

**Connecting everyone to a brighter energy future.**
* 
### **Recruiter**
