title: AI Deployment and Business Analyst Internship – Climate Action (non-thesis)
description:
### **Job Title**

AI Deployment and Business Analyst Internship – Climate Action (non\-thesis)
### **Job Description**

**Start Date: As of September 2026**

**Duration: at least / 6 months**

**Type: Internship (non\-thesis)**

**Weekly Presence: 40h (minimum 32h)**

**Location: Flexible; Amsterdam / Eindhoven**

**Internship Title**

**AI Deployment and Business Analyst Internship – Climate Action (non\-thesis)**

**Your role:**

In this role, you will have the opportunity to help accelerate the deployment of AI within Philips’ Climate Action team. You will support the development and adoption of AI\-enabled tools that make climate impact insights more accessible, actionable, and scalable for internal teams and external customers.


At Philips, our purpose is to improve people’s health and well\-being through meaningful innovation. We deliver superior, long\-term value to our customers and stakeholders, while acting responsibly towards our planet and society.


To achieve these ambitious targets, we focus on expanding access to care for underserved communities, driving towards a circular economy by embedding EcoDesign in our innovation processes, and supporting climate action by ensuring our emission reduction targets across our entire value chain are in line to limit global warming to below 1\.5 °C.


Philips is an industry frontrunner in these areas, recognized by investors, customers, supply chain partners, and talents seeking to work with us. To deliver on our ambitions, we need to use data, digital innovation, and AI more effectively to measure, manage, and communicate climate impact. As an AI Deployment Intern in the Climate Action team, you will contribute to embedding AI into day\-to\-day ways of working, developing market\-facing AI tools to assess climate impact across lifecycle stages, building a climate impact tool that enables businesses to quantify their contribution in line with our 2030 impact ambitions, and optimizing performance management processes to increase efficiency and decision\-making quality.


**Responsibilities**

* Support the deployment of AI\-enabled ways of working within the Climate Action team, identifying practical use cases where AI can improve efficiency, insight generation, and stakeholder engagement.
* Contribute to the design and development of customer\-facing AI tools that help customers assess the climate impact of products and solutions across different lifecycle stages.
* Help build and improve a climate impact tool that enables businesses to quantify their climate impact and contribution to Philips’ 2030 impact ambitions, translating complex sustainability data into clear and actionable outputs.
* Optimize climate performance management processes by identifying opportunities to automate recurring tasks, improve KPI tracking, streamline reporting workflows, and reduce manual effort.
* Collaborate with function, market, and business stakeholders to translate user needs into practical AI\-enabled solutions.
* Support testing, validation, and documentation of AI tools to ensure outputs are reliable, understandable, and aligned with climate accounting principles, lifecycle thinking, and business requirements.
* Create clear training materials, demos, and communications to drive adoption of AI tools and embed them into day\-to\-day team routines and decision\-making processes.

**You are the right fit, if:**

* **Degree in a relevant field such as Business Administration, Environmental Science, Sustainability, Data Science, AI, Digital Innovation, Engineering, or a related discipline.**
* Passionate about sustainability, climate action, and the responsible deployment of AI to solve practical business challenges.
* Strong analytical skills, with the ability to work with data, structure problems, test assumptions, and translate insights into practical recommendations.
* Experience with Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint is required; experience with Power BI, Power Query, Python, low\-code/no\-code tools, AI assistants, or workflow automation tools is a strong plus (e.g. CODEX).
* Basic understanding of climate impact, lifecycle thinking, carbon accounting, or sustainability reporting frameworks is preferred.
* Ability to translate user needs into clear tool requirements, simple process improvements, and engaging communication materials.
* Self\-starter with a proactive mindset, able to experiment, learn quickly, and drive actions independently while aligning with strategic objectives.
* Strong interpersonal skills and excellent English verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to collaborate across technical and non\-technical teams.

**In return,**

* Hands\-on experience in deploying AI\-enabled tools in a global sustainability function and embedding them into day\-to\-day business processes.
* Exposure to climate impact assessment, lifecycle thinking, carbon accounting, and Philips’ 2030 impact ambitions.
* Practical experience in developing customer\-facing and internal tools that translate complex climate data into actionable insights.
* Insight into how performance management, KPI tracking, and sustainability reporting processes can be improved through automation, data analytics, and AI.
* Professional growth through collaboration with sustainability, digital, innovation, and business experts in a purpose\-driven organization recognized for climate action leadership.

**How we work together**

We believe that we are better together than apart. For our office\-based teams, this means working in\-person at least 3 days per week. Onsite roles require full\-time presence in the company’s facilities. Field roles are most effectively done outside of the company’s main facilities, generally at the customers’ or suppliers’ locations.


**We offer you:**  

A non\-stop growth opportunity within a global multinational company. In addition, we also want to renumerate you well for the opportunity. This includes:


* Monthly full\-time allowance between €500 \- €700 gross, depending on your education level and if you need to relocate to The Netherlands. Part\-time internships receive the allowance pro\-rata.
* Housing compensation. Should you need to relocate to near our office, we’ll offer you a monthly allowance of €300,\- net if location is in the vicinity of Amsterdam, €255,\- net for all other Philips locations. To be eligible, we’ll just ask for the rental contract from your landlord, and your usual home\-work travel distance needs to be more than 50 km or 1\.5 hours of travel time (for a one way trip).
* Travel compensation, if you are not eligible for a free public transport card; you will receive max. €192,\- net as a monthly allowance.
* Paid holidays per internship term.
* The opportunity to buy Philips products at our Philips shop.

**About Philips**

We are a health technology company. We built our entire company around the belief that every human matters, and we won't stop until everybody everywhere has access to the quality healthcare that we all deserve. Do the work of your life to help the lives of others.


* Learn more about our business .
* Discover our rich and exciting history .
* Learn more about our purpose .

If you’re interested in this role and have many, but not all, of the experiences needed, we encourage you to apply. You may still be the right candidate for this or other opportunities at Philips. Learn more about our commitment to diversity and inclusion here .


**\#LI\-OFFICE**

title: Intern – Operations Benelux (m/f/d)
description:
**City:** Amsterdam  

**Department:** Operations


**Recruiter:** Pavlina Grancharova

  

We're looking for a motivated and driven **Intern – Operations Benelux** for our Amsterdam office who is eager to develop their skills within our Flix family. The nature of this internship is practical rather than theoretical — you'll be hands\-on from day one.



Amsterdam \| Full\-time Internship \| Starting August 2026


**Please submit your resume in English!**


**About the Role**


* **Admin \& Operations**: Support day\-to\-day administrative tasks, manage the operations inbox, and handle relevant partner queries in a timely and professional manner
* **Analytics \& Reporting:** Assist in KPI analysis to help partners become key players in our international route, delivering reliable reports and actionable insights for the teams
* **Automation \& Process Improvement:** Actively drive the automation of operational workflows and repetitive tasks, experimenting with AI tools to build smarter, more accurate processes \- turning manual work into scalable, reliable solutions
* **Communication \& Newsletter:** Contribute to internal and external communications, including drafting and distributing the monthly Benelux newsletter to bus partners
* **Proactive Field Research:** Take initiative in conducting on\-site station visits, producing structured field reports and contributing to the improvement of our operations
* **Partnership Development:** Help build, maintain, and develop long\-lasting partnerships by supporting on\-site regional operations across the Benelux network
  


**About You**


* **Education:** You have an HBO level in a related field (e.g. Tourism, Business Administration, Logistics, or Communications)
* **Languages:** You are fluent in English and Dutch and/or French
* **Detail\-Oriented \& Precise:** You have a natural tendency to double\-check your work, catch inconsistencies, and take pride in delivering accurate, high\-quality output
* **Proactive \& Autonomous:** You don't wait to be told — you anticipate needs, take ownership, and consistently look for ways to add value beyond your core tasks
* **Automation Appetite:** You have a genuine interest in digital tools and automation, eager to make processes smarter, faster, and more scalable
  


**What We Offer**


* **Travel perks:** 12 free Flix vouchers \+ 12 discount vouchers for friends \& family
* **Work from (M)Anywhere:** Depending on your role, work from another location for up to 60 days per year
* **Hybrid work model:** We are an office\-first company, but we offer flexibility to balance work and life
* **Wellbeing support:** Access confidential 1:1 counselling, courses, and stress management for yourself and up to four family members
* **Learning \& Development:** Take advantage of language classes, training courses, and expert\-led sessions to grow your skills
* **Mentoring Program:** Connect with experienced colleagues to gain insights and accelerate your career
  


To view more local benefits specific to each office location,



**Why Join Flix?**



At Flix, you’ll find teams that rally together to overcome challenges and spark creativity. We believe in ownership culture \- giving you the freedom to take initiative, make an impact, and shape your own career path.  

As we continue to expand across the globe, you can make a real difference in how we work.



If you’re ready to grow and lead your journey, Flix is the place for you!

title: Technology Product Manager - Next Generation Payments Platform, FinTech
description:
Role Description:

At Booking.com, data drives our decisions. Technology is at our core. And innovation is everywhere. But our company is more than datasets, lines of code or A/B tests. We’re the thrill of the first night in a new place. The excitement of the next morning. The friends you make. The journeys you take. The sights you see. And the food you sample. Through our products, partners and people, we can empower everyone to experience the world.

  

We’re a truly global e\-commerce company, with business operations in nearly every country and city on the planet. And we want to make it easy for everyone, anywhere in the world, to pay for their travel or do business with our platform – whenever and however it’s convenient for them.

  

Our FinTech business unit – with teams in Amsterdam, London, Shanghai and Bangalore – develops new products and drives innovation to help us continue removing financial friction from the travel process. That makes buying and selling travel\-related products and services simpler for both travelers and partners.


Our FinTech unit is scaling fast. Across multiple internal payments verticals (e.g. Customer Experience, Partner Experience etc.), we already have quite a few services, holding multiple flows and are probably going to double the functionality with upcoming projects.


Dealing with money comes with a big responsibility! As FinTech, we believe that the only way to scale to achieve a North star FinTech vision is to invest in building the best cloud journey for our developers. There are a lot of uncovered opportunities in the existing setup, and we are looking for a person passionate to turn them into reality for the benefit of our business.

 **Role Description**

  

As a Tech Product Manager, you’ll work together with several product and engineering teams to understand their business flows and the current challenges of our developers. Using your experience and knowledge, you will focus on how to support our developers in their cloud journey and optimize our time to market for new features and services.


You will drive the product vision, direct strategic initiatives and the creation of product roadmaps in collaboration with your product teams and your main stakeholders.

 **Key Job Responsibilities and Duties**

* Establish the strategic product vision and roadmap for some of the products facilitating the modernization of Booking's payment infrastructure, which manages an annual transaction volume exceeding €70 billion;
* Prioritize of your backlog to maximize the impact of said products;
* Define OKRs, manage expectations, identify risks and drive mitigations;
* Drive the delivery of the product roadmap, managing risks and dependencies;
* Work closely with developers, SREs, product \& engineering teams, (Senior) Engineering Managers and directors to gather new requirements, create solutions, plan deliveries, and drive the adoption;
* Perform external market analysis (e.g., commercial and open source) to evaluate emerging trends, technologies, and practices to make buy vs build decisions

**Qualifications \& Skills**

* Experience with cloud platforms (AWS in particular), microservices, and complex systems in production, at scale; prior experience with highly regulated settings is an advantage
* 3\+ years of (technical) Product Management experience in an Engineering, Technology Strategy role or Developer Advocate role
* Prior experience with credit card payment systems or knowledge of PCI DSS requirements and compliance are an advantage
* Ability to define the ideal cloud journey for FinTech use\-cases and products and set a realistic plan with a clear prioritization
* Comfort navigating ambiguous settings, investigating options, and bringing clarity to engineering teams and leadership
* Willingness to learn new technologies and apply existing and new technical knowledge constantly
* Interest in adopting context engineering and being an advocate to safely and effectively scale AI\-powered SDLC

### **Benefits \& Perks \- Global Impact, Personal Relevance**


Booking.com’s Total Rewards Philosophy is not only about compensation but also about benefits. We offer a competitive compensation and benefits package, as well unique\-to\-Booking.com benefits which include:

* Annual paid time off and generous paid leave scheme including: parent, grandparent, bereavement, and care leave
* Hybrid working including flexible working arrangements, and up to 20 days per year working from abroad (home country)
* Industry leading product discounts \- up to 1400 per year \- for yourself, including automatic Genius Level 3 status and Booking.com wallet credit
* Contributing to a high scale, complex, world renowned product and seeing real\-time impact of your work on millions of travelers worldwide;
* Working in a fast\-paced and performance driven culture;
* Opportunity to utilize technical expertise, leadership capabilities and entrepreneurial spirit
* Promote and drive impactful and innovative engineering solutions
* Technical, behavioral and interpersonal competence advancement via on\-the\-job opportunities, experimental projects, hackathons, conferences and active community participation
* Need more flexibility in your work week? We are happy to consider part\-time, and reduced working week opportunities\* (min. 32 hours per week, subject to terms and conditions)

**Inclusion at Booking.com:**

  

Inclusion have been a core part of our company culture since day one. This ongoing journey starts with our very own employees, who represent over 140 nationalities and a wide range of ethnic and social backgrounds, genders and sexual orientations.

  

Take it from our Chief People Officer, Paulo Pisano: “At Booking.com, the diversity of our people doesn’t just build an outstanding workplace, it also creates a better and more inclusive travel experience for everyone. Inclusion is at the heart of everything we do. It’s a place where you can make your mark and have a real impact in travel and tech.”

  

We ensure that colleagues with disabilities are provided the adjustments and tools they need to participate in the job application and interview process, to perform crucial job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment.

 **Application Process:**

* Let’s go places together: How we Hire
* This role does not come with relocation assistance

title: Kassa/Service medewerker
description:
Je gaat werken bij dit bedrijf in een team van 20 collega’s die allemaal klaarstaan voor de bouwprofessional uit de regio. Hier heerst betrokkenheid, collegialiteit en een open sfeer. Iedereen krijgt de kans om te groeien door trainingen en opleidingen, en jouw ideeën zijn altijd welkom. Kassa/service medewerker zijn bij dit bedrijf betekent dat je samen het verschil maakt voor iedere klant die binnenloopt.



In deze functie krijg jij een afwisselende rol met veel klantcontact, ruimte om te leren en groeien binnen de bouwbranche. Je werkt samen in een hecht team en hebt volop mogelijkheden om jouw ideeën in te brengen. Jouw service maakt het verschil voor de professional die bij dit bedrijf binnenloopt.


**About the function**



Als kassa/service medewerker ben jij hét aanspreekpunt voor klanten. Je maakt offertes samen met verkoopadviseurs, beantwoordt vragen hierover en helpt klanten bij het aanmaken van hun klantenpas. Ook regel je retouren, verwerk je reparaties en houd je het overzicht als het druk is. Je werkt intensief samen met je collega’s. Jouw doel? Elke dag de verwachtingen van klanten overtreffen met jouw service en oplossingsgericht meedenken. Je kunt rekenen op uitdagingen, want bouwprofessionals rekenen op jouw advies en snelheid. Je werkt 32 tot 40 uur, zowel doordeweeks als op zaterdag.


**What we offer**


* Een bruto salaris tussen de €2\.674 en €2\.782 per maand, op basis van 40 uur
* Een informele sfeer en leuke uitjes
* Volop ontwikkelmogelijkheden en doorgroeikansen richting bijvoorbeeld teamleider kassa/service of verkoop


**What we need**


* Je hebt relevante werkervaring als servicemedewerker, kassamedewerker of in hospitality
* Je hebt affiniteit met de bouw(materialen)branche
* Je spreekt en schrijft goed Nederlands en/of Engels


**About the company**



Je gaat werken bij dit bedrijf in een team van 20 collega’s die allemaal klaarstaan voor de bouwprofessional uit de regio. Hier heerst betrokkenheid, collegialiteit en een open sfeer. Iedereen krijgt de kans om te groeien door trainingen en opleidingen, en jouw ideeën zijn altijd welkom. Kassa/service medewerker zijn bij dit bedrijf betekent dat je samen het verschil maakt voor iedere klant die binnenloopt.


**Additional information**



Wil jij snel starten als Kassa/Service medewerker? Solliciteer direct, of neem voor een vrijblijvend gesprek contact op met Michael van Stigt van PDZ Amsterdam Noord via \+31204945233 of michael.van.stigt@mail.pdz.nl. Onze digitale AI jobcoach Stan neemt direct na je sollicitatie contact op via Whatsapp. Dit om je beter te leren kennen en een voorkeursdatum voor een mogelijk kennismakingsgesprek op te vragen.

title: Working Student Automations/AI (f/m/d)
description:
AI is reshaping how companies work and you'll be at the center of it at nilo. Working with every team (Sales, Ops, Finance, HR, Marketing), you'll spot where smart automation can free people up for the work that actually matters, then build it and ship it. From week one, your automations run in production and save real hours across the company.

* Availability: 20 hours/week (flexible around your lectures)
* Enrollment: Must be actively enrolled at a German university for at least another 12 months (Bachelor or Master)
* Location: Berlin\-based (Hybrid: min. 2\+ days/week in our office for in\-person collaboration)
* Start Date: asap

**What you'll do**

* Sit with teams, map their workflows, and spot what's automatable
* Build and ship automations using tools like n8n with and without AI agents
* Train colleagues and gather feedback: adoption matters as much as the build
* Track impact: hours saved, errors reduced, processes sped up
* Take real ownership: your automations run in production, used by real teams

**Example projects:** auto\-generating weekly reports from our CRM, an AI triage bot for support inboxes, automated invoice data extraction, onboarding checklist automation.

**Who we're looking for**

* You're enrolled at a university in Germany, ideally in a Bachelor's or Master's program in computer science, engineering, business, economics, or another analytical field. The degree matters less than the evidence: you write code (Python or JavaScript) and are comfortable connecting different tools and automating workflows.
* Very self\-driven and curious, with a track record of building things independently. e.g. side projects, hackathons, open\-source contributions or a bot that runs your life ;)
* Hands\-on experience with LLMs and AI tooling: prompting, RAG, agents, MCP and eager to experiment with whatever ships next
* Experience with low\-code platforms (n8n, Make, Zapier) or webhooks
* Able to quickly understand a business process and translate it into an automation opportunity. We need working solutions people adopt, not just technical demos
* You’re based in Berlin and available for regular in\-person collaboration with our team; even if the role includes remote flexibility (2\+ days in the office)
* You have a sharp eye for detail and a structured, reliable way of working; whether you’re cleaning data, preparing reports, or working on a process doc.
* Experience with spreadsheets as a data layer (Google Sheets / Excel formulas, connected data sources)  

  

**Nice to have**
* Experience with CRM tools like Pipedrive, HubSpot, or Salesforce.
* Working knowledge of databases and SQL \- querying and modeling data in BigQuery, AWS (Redshift/Athena), PostgreSQL, or similar
* Familiarity with version control (Git) and a structured, iterative approach to building and debugging
* Exposure to data visualization / BI tools (Metabase, Looker, Power BI) or webhook\-driven notifications (e.g. Slack bots)

**What you get:**

* **Responsibility meets creativity:** At nilo, you’ll actively shape the way we work and bring your ideas to life.
* **Your growth, our support:** Whether it's training, conferences, or coaching – we support your personal and professional development with an annual development budget.
* **Mental strength with our nilo app:** Enjoy free access to our nilo app for proactive and preventive mental health support – anytime you need it (incl. family support)
* **Hybrid setup:** Two in\-office days keep us connected, the rest of the week is yours to shape.
* **Stay active:** Benefit from an Urban Sports Club membership at a discounted rate.
* **We’re team players:** Look forward to regular team and company events.
* **Dog\-friendly office:** Your four\-legged friend is always welcome.  

  

*nilo embraces diversity. We strive to create an inclusive workplace where everyone feels welcome, psychologically and physically safe. All applicants will be considered for employment without regard to different ethnic/racial origins, age groups, religions, sexual orientations, gender identities, abilities, socio\-economic statuses, educational backgrounds, family arrangements and/or any other characteristic.*


We would like to encourage you to apply even if the technical requirements cannot be met 100%.

title: Business Development & Solutions Manager – Google Cloud (f/m/d)
description:
At TRKKN, we are driven by the excitement of taking our client's data\-driven businesses to new heights. As the leading European Google partner and reseller of Google Cloud \& Google Marketing Platform, we act as a catalyst for cutting\-edge digital marketing solutions. Our team is diverse, international, inspiring, and operates in a fast\-growing digital \& technological environment. This provides the ideal and dynamic work environment for individuals with a hunger for growth, responsibility, and the desire to shape their future. With Google in close proximity, the learning and development opportunities at TRKKN are limitless.


With over 25 nationalities, 20\+ languages, and 240\+ Trakkies on board, we’re taking our business global, and our story doesn't end here!

**How will you make an impact:**


We are looking for a motivated and ambitious Business Development \& Solutions Manager – Google Cloud (f/m/d) to join our team. Whether you are an experienced sales professional or a rising talent with a passion for tech, this role offers the perfect platform to grow within the Google Cloud (GCP) ecosystem.


Your mission is to drive the growth of our Cloud and Data solutions across the DACH region. You will act as a bridge between client needs and the cutting\-edge possibilities of the Google Cloud Platform, helping businesses transform their data into their biggest asset.

**Your key responsibilities will include:**

* **Pipeline Growth:** Build and nurture a sales pipeline for our Cloud \& AI solutions, reaching out to new and existing clients from mid\-sized companies to large enterprises.
* **Mastering the Google Ecosystem:** Learn to navigate the **Google Cloud Sales organization** to create joint sales plays and build a strong professional network.
* **Full\-Cycle Sales Support:** Manage the sales journey from the first touchpoint to the final deal, learning how to present complex solutions with confidence.
* **Collaborative Solutioning:** Work closely with our Cloud Architects and Data Experts to understand technical challenges and offer the best consultative approach.
* **Compelling Storytelling:** Create pitch decks and customized offers that showcase how Google Cloud can solve real\-world business problems.
* **Contracting \& Negotiation:** Gain experience in negotiating license fees and professional services contracts with client procurement teams.
* **Being Present:** You enjoy being "on the road." Your **willingness to travel** (mainly within the DACH region) allows you to build genuine relationships with clients and partners on\-site.

**The person we are looking for…**

* **Background:** ... has initial experience in Sales, Customer acquisition or Business Development – ideally withinthe Cloud industry, Data Analytics, and/or Marketing Technology industry.
* **Cloud Curiosity:** ... had initial touchpoints with Google Cloud (GCP) or other cloud environments and is eager to dive deep and become a certified expert.
* **Communication Skills:** ... is a strong communicator in German and English (min. C1\), capable of translating client needs into clear value propositions.
* **Ambition:** ... is a self\-starter with a "hunter" mentality, ready to take ownership of their professional development in a fast\-paced environment.
* **Mobility:** ... is looking forward to visiting clients and attending industry events and sees **traveling** as an opportunity to expand your network.

 **Our benefits**


We empower you to take responsibility right from the start and provide you with an environment for enormous growth potential within the company and beyond your initial role. We see you as an important part of our success story \- We grow with you, you grow with us!


In addition, you can expect:

* Competitive salary
* Knowledge sharing \& company events
* Personal development plan \& leadership training
* Hybrid work model
* Choose your own device

  

Do you identify with our DNA and want to gain more insights? We look forward to getting to know you! :)

* **Collaborative Solutioning:** Work closely with our Cloud Architects and Data Experts to understand technical challenges and offer the best consultative approach.
* **Compelling Storytelling:** Create pitch decks and customized offers that showcase how Google Cloud can solve real\-world business problems.
* **Contracting \& Negotiation:** Gain experience in negotiating license fees and professional services contracts with client procurement teams.
* **Being Present:** You enjoy being "on the road." Your **willingness to travel** (mainly within the DACH region) allows you to build genuine relationships with clients and partners on\-site.

**The person we are looking for…**

* **Background:** You have initial experience in Sales, Customer acquisition or Business Development – ideally withinthe Cloud industry, Data Analytics, and/or Marketing Technology industry.
* **Cloud Curiosity:** You have had initial touchpoints with Google Cloud (GCP) or other cloud environments and are eager to dive deep and become a certified expert.
* **Communication Skills:** You are a strong communicator in German and English, capable of translating client needs into clear value propositions.
* **Ambition:** You are a self\-starter with a "hunter" mentality, ready to take ownership of your professional development in a fast\-paced environment.
* **Mobility:** You look forward to visiting clients and attending industry events; you see **traveling** as an opportunity to expand your network.

**Our benefits**


We empower you to take responsibility right from the start and provide you with an environment for enormous growth potential within the company and beyond your initial role. We see you as an important part of our success story \- We grow with you, you grow with us!


In addition, you can expect:

* Competitive salary
* Knowledge sharing \& company events
* Personal development plan \& leadership training
* Hybrid work model
* Choose your own device

  

Do you identify with our DNA and want to gain more insights? We look forward to getting to know you! :)

title: SENIOR FINANCIAL CONTROLLER (LIEGE - BELGIUM)
description:
**THE SCOPE**


With 30 years of history, today Gaming1 is one of the international leaders in both land\-based and online games of chance (casino games, sports betting and poker). Its evolution at the heart of innovation is accompanied by a diversification and specialization of positions, with the creation of new cutting\-edge jobs.


Gaming1's finance department is made up of a team of around 30 people dedicated to accounting, purchasing, and financial planning and analysis. As part of their professional development and international growth strategy, our Finance team is looking for a **Senior Financial Controller.**

**YOUR ROLE**


You will ensure high\-quality group consolidation and reporting, while driving key initiatives to professionalize the finance function (reporting optimization, AI projects, fast closing, IFRS, M\&A, etc.) and deliver in\-depth financial insights.


* **Consolidation \& Financial Reporting**


	+ Own and lead the end\-to\-end production of Group consolidation (IFRS and BE\-GAAP) \- scope validation, intercompany reconciliations, consolidation adjustments, ownership of the consolidation tools.
	+ Lead the production of Group reporting package (BS / CFS / P\&L / Net Debt and other key indicators) and lead improvement initiatives (e.g.: working capital or cash optimization).
	+ Drive technical accounting topics (PPA, Impairments, IFRS developments, ...)
* **Financial Statements**


	+ Lead the preparation of annual consolidated financial statements, including IFRS notes and Group Cash Flow Statement (CFS), ensuring accuracy, compliance and audit readiness.
* **Continuous Improvement**


	+ Improve the efficiency and reliability of closing and reporting processes by reducing lead times, structuring documentation and enhancing consolidation procedures.
	+ Leverage Automation and AI tools to streamline processes, reporting and analysis, and challenge how things are done today.
* **Analysis and insights**


	+ Deliver in\-depth analyses to support strategic decisions (e.g.: impact of acquisition or expansion projects, …)
	+ Monitor and challenge the financial performance of subsidiaries, tracking key indicators and flagging deviations.
* **Project and Team Leadership**


	+ Play a key role in cross\-functional Finance transformation to strengthen the Finance organization and support value creation across the Group;
	+ Coach and develop a medior Finance controller (you will be direct report).

**YOUR PROFILE**


* Proven experience in Group Finance environments, with a good understanding of consolidation and financial reporting complexities
* Solid IFRS knowledge \- or a high\-potential profile keen to grow it \- with exposure to consolidation topics (PPA, financial instruments, leases) and audited financial statements
* Entrepreneurial mindset with a strong sense of ownership \- able to structure topics, drive them forward and deliver with autonomy
* Strong interpersonal skills, comfortable engaging with stakeholders at all levels, from junior profiles to senior management
* Sharp critical thinking, with the ability to challenge assumptions, analyze situations in depth and propose relevant, value\-driven alternatives
* High standards of quality, precision and reliability, ensuring robust and accurate deliverables
* Strong focus on process optimization and digitalization, with the ability to redesign existing processes to make them more efficient and less manual
* Efficiency\-driven, constantly identifying and eliminating low value\-added activities to maximize impact

**WHAT WE OFFER**


As well as enjoying a unique experience – centered around our values of **Pleasure, Team Spirit, Performance, Boldness and Integrity** – alongside **1\.600 colleagues worldwide**, you'll have the opportunity to contribute to the international development of a fast\-growing family company.


Joining Gaming1 means becoming part of a human and entrepreneurial adventure where people are empowered to make an impact, grow and succeed together.


We offer:


* the opportunity to work on ambitious international projects within a solid and growing group
* a collaborative and high\-performing work environment
* leadership based on trust, autonomy, talent and shared values
* continuous learning and career development opportunities through training and internal mobility
* a competitive salary and benefits package aligned with the local market
* a hybrid working model, with the possibility to work remotely up to 50% of your working time
* an international and collaborative environment where people come first

title: Customer Success Public Sector (Brussels)
description:
**Discover our galaxy**

Join the Future of Work ! Malt is Europe's leading freelance marketplace, connecting over 1,000,000 talented freelancers with 100,000\+ companies. Founded in 2013, we're transforming how work gets done through our tech\-powered, human\-centered platform. What makes us different:
* A diverse team of 600 Malters across 6 European countries
* A culture that champions equality (50% of our Comex are women) and inclusive growth
* Backed by top investors including ISAI, Serena Capital, Eurazeo Growth, Goldman Sachs, and BPI
* A mission to give everyone the freedom to work differently

Ready to help shape the future of work? Your next chapter starts here!
*At Malt we believe that Ambition is the Way, so all lists of missions and responsibilities are non\-exhaustive.*  

You will join Malt as a **Customer Onboarding \& Success Manager \- Public Sector**, based in Brussels. You will work hand\-in\-hand with our teams to manage one of our key european clients.



 Your main mission will be to ensure the flawless operational execution and administrative delivery of this contract throughout its lifecycle. You will be the guarantor of compliance with strict public procedures, acting as the primary operational point of contact and dedicated partner for the **freelances** deployed on this framework agreement.


### **Key responsibilities ✨**


* **Operational Client Management:** Manage the validation of quotes and activity reports (CRA) for non\-autonomous clients. Ensure the upload and consumption of purchase orders (POs) to guarantee smooth and seamless invoicing.
* **Renewal Driving:** Anticipate project end dates and provide the necessary support to secure renewals and ensure business continuity.
* **Primary Point of Contact:** Serve as the main go\-to person for incoming client requests, resolving issues directly or escalating them to the appropriate internal teams (e.g., Finance).
* **Contractual Compliance Expertise:** Act as the expert on client contracts (SLAs, penalties) and internal workflows (PO processes) to guarantee the strict application of contractual terms.
* **Driving Client Autonomy:** Promote platform benefits and conduct live demos to train clients on managing their operations independently.
* **Partnership with Account Managers (AMs):** Collaborate closely with AMs as a Subject Matter Expert (SME) on renewals and PO management to drive business growth.
* **Process Optimization (Scaling):** Identify operational pain points and partner with Business Operations and Product teams to deploy automated solutions.
### **About you ‍**

* **Experience:** Ideally 5 years in operational contract management, complex customer support, or project coordination. Previous experience within the Belgian Public ecosystem and/or a large\-account subcontractor environment is a strong asset.
* **Administrative Rigor \& Compliance:** A keen sense of organization, attention to detail, and a structured mindset. You are comfortable following strict, non\-negotiable step\-by\-step validation workflows and managing rigorous documentation.
* **Solution \& User\-Oriented:** Excellent interpersonal skills, patience, and diplomacy. You love helping users (freelances), solving their daily platform issues, and navigating complex administrative structures calmly.
* **Tools \& Data:** Proficiency in collaborative and analytical tools (Gsheet/Excel) and an appetite for mastering internal platform configurations.
* **Languages:** Full fluency in English is essential (all documentation, platform interfaces, and interactions with Accenture and the European Commission are in English). French is a huge plus.
### **How to join the mission?**

* First call with our Talent Acquisition team to better understand your background and aspirations (30\-45 minutes).
* Interview with your future manager to delve into your experience and the specifics of the role (45\-60 minutes).
* Home assignment to complete, which will be evaluated to assess your management logic and analytical skills.
* Final interview with a C\-level executive to discuss Malt’s long\-term vision.
**Life on planet Malt is the perfect space to thrive personally and professionally****Onboarding:** Before easing into your new role, you’ll spend your first week learning about our culture, products, and services with other onboardees at our office in Paris.
**Remote work:** Hybrid remote policy \- 3 days office / 2 days home\-office.
**Sabbatical:** 1 month paid sabbatical once you've been with Malt for 3 years.
**Stock options:** Every Malter is entitled to stock options.
**Transportation:** Every Malter is entitled to a mobility budget.
**Lunch vouchers:** Monizze, 8€/day.
**Home office allowance:** 160€ for home office and internet.
**Premium healthcare coverage** provided by Axa.
**Free books:** If you’re interested in learning more about any topic relevant to Malt’s business, just tell us the books you’d like to read, and we’ll order them for you—without any questions asked or approval processes to follow.

**Ready? Get your ticket to Malt**
*At Malt, we are committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse workplace. We recruit based on skills, experience, and potential, without any form of discrimination related to age, gender, sexual orientation, ethnicity, religion, or disability. Our mission is to create a work environment where everyone feels valued, respected, and safe to thrive.*

*Your profile may be subject to background screening. For more information see our candidate privacy policy.*
We believe people hire people. While we use AI to help our team manage the high volume of applications we receive, it never replaces our personal touch. Think of AI as our administrative assistant—it helps us stay organized, but all final decisions are made by our Talent Acquisition team members who look for the unique value you bring.

With 30 years of history, today Gaming1 is one of the international leaders in both land\-based and online games of chance (casino games, sports betting and poker).
