title: IT Manager
description:
### **PROJECT OVERVIEW**


We are looking for an experienced IT Manager to lead and continuously improve our IT infrastructure, security, and workplace technologies. This role is ideal for someone who is passionate about modern Microsoft technologies, automation, and AI\-driven process optimisation.


The successful candidate will own the company's IT environment, ensuring it is secure, scalable, and cost\-effective while proactively identifying opportunities to improve employee experience and operational efficiency through automation and AI. We're looking for someone who doesn't just maintain IT systems — they actively improve them.

### **IN THIS ROLE, YOU WILL**

* Manage and maintain the company's Microsoft\-based IT infrastructure, including Microsoft 365, Azure, Intune, Defender, and Entra ID.
* Administer and optimize Microsoft Intune for endpoint management, device provisioning, compliance policies, application deployment, and lifecycle management.
* Manage endpoint security using Microsoft Defender and implement security best practices across the organisation.
* Maintain cloud infrastructure and services (Azure, AWS, Google Workspace where applicable).
* Design, implement, and maintain IT security policies and standards aligned with industry frameworks such as SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001\.
* Support security audits, risk assessments, and compliance initiatives.
* Lead IT infrastructure improvements and cloud optimisation projects.
* Monitor software licensing and identify opportunities for cost optimisation.
* Manage IT vendors, hardware procurement, and technology lifecycle.
* Automate repetitive IT processes using Microsoft Power Platform and other automation tools.
* Research, evaluate, and implement new technologies that improve productivity and security.
* Provide technical leadership and support for internal users.
* Maintain IT documentation, procedures, and knowledge base.

### **IF YOU ARE**

* 5\+ years of experience in IT Administration, Systems Administration, or IT Management.
* Strong hands\-on experience with Microsoft Intune (device management, Autopilot, compliance policies, application deployment, Conditional Access integration).
* Strong knowledge of Microsoft 365 administration (Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD); Microsoft Defender; Exchange Online; SharePoint Online; Microsoft Teams)
* Experience managing cloud infrastructure in Microsoft Azure (AWS experience is a plus).
* Azure Administrator (AZ\-104\), Microsoft 365 Administrator, or Microsoft Security certifications.
* Knowledge of endpoint security, identity management, and Zero Trust principles.
* Experience implementing security policies and compliance controls.
* Experience with PowerShell scripting and IT automation.
* Experience integrating AI into IT operations and employee support.
* Experience building, configuring, or deploying AI agents for internal business processes
* Strong troubleshooting and problem\-solving skills.
* Excellent communication and documentation skills.
* Good level of English and strong communications skills.

### **NICE TO HAVE**

* Experience preparing or supporting SOC 2 Type II and/or ISO 27001 audits.
* Experience with Microsoft Power Automate and Power Apps.
* Experience with Microsoft Copilot Studio.
* Experience with Microsoft's AI ecosystem.

### **AS AN OPINOV8R, YOU WILL HAVE**

* **Digital\-First Approach:** Great talent knows no borders! You can work from wherever you are — we hire and collaborate with professionals worldwide.
* **Remote Work Model:** Balance your professional and personal life with our flexible working conditions, empowering you to deliver your best from anywhere.
* **Exciting Projects:** Dive into impactful projects across industries that challenge and spark creativity.
* **Boost Your Expertise:** Grow your career with continuous learning, development opportunities, and hands\-on experience.
* **Join the Best Team Ever:** Collaborate with our diverse and cross\-cultural team of passionate technologists and creative thinkers.

### **HOW’S THE HIRING PROCESS GOING**


We strive to make our hiring process smooth and transparent to find the perfect match for both sides. Steps may differ depending on the role, but here’s what to expect:

* **Initial Interview:** If your background fits the role, we’ll invite you for an interview with a Talent Acquisition Specialist.
* **Technical Interview:** Depending on the position, you may complete a technical assessment or test task.
* **Final Decision:** After all steps, we’ll get back to you with the result and next steps.

title: Customer Service Agent - Full Time (German Speaking)
description:
**Location: Stockholm, Sweden**  

**Language Requirement: Native\-German**  

**Work Hours: Monday–Friday, 08:00–17:00 (1 weekly WFH day)**

**Help People Take Control of Their Finances — Join Us at Anyfin**
------------------------------------------------------------------

**At Anyfin, we believe financial power belongs in the hands of the people. Since 2017, we’ve helped customers across Sweden, Finland, Norway, and Germany save millions by refinancing expensive consumer credit. And we’re just getting started. With new markets, new tools, and new products ahead, we’re on the lookout for more brilliant minds and big hearts to grow our Operations team.**

**We’re now hiring a German\-speaking Operations Agent who’s eager to make a real impact on customers’ financial health \- every single day.**

**What You’ll Be Doing**
------------------------

**As an Operations Agent, you become a key player in our core operations. Your work will directly shape the customer experience and the success of our mission.**

**Your responsibilities:**

* **Communicate with customers across email, chat, phone, and social media**
* **Ensure top\-quality customer experience \- every interaction counts**
* **Follow credit policies and regulatory standards with precision**
* **Handle administrative tasks, including AML/KYC checks, customer verification, and regulatory documentation**
* **Analyze and evaluate credit applications to produce responsible, transparent offers**
* **Suggest and implement improvements to processes, tools, and workflows**
* **Collaborate closely with a supportive, energetic, cross\-functional team**

**Who You Are**
---------------

**You’re in the early to mid stages of your career, combining enough experience to make confident decisions with a strong hunger to grow within fintech.**

### **Your Background**

**You likely have 1\-4 years of experience in:**

* **Customer service (banking, fintech, insurance, telecom, travel, or similar)**
* **Credit risk assessment, AML/KYC, financial services, or advisory roles**
* **Sales or support environments where empathy and communication are key**

**You don’t need to be senior \- but you do bring maturity, ownership, and reliability to every task.**

**Skills \& Competence**
------------------------

### **Languages**

* **Native\-level German**
* **Fluent English**
* **Bonus: Swedish or Finnish**

### **Technical \& Analytical Skills**

* **Excellent communication skills across written and spoken channels**
* **Strong attention to detail and comfort working in regulated environments**
* **Ability to assess creditworthiness quickly and accurately**  

**Comfortable interpreting financial data and customer information**
* **Familiarity with AML/KYC or a willingness to learn**
* **Familiarity with AI**

**Mindset \& Personality**
--------------------------

**You thrive in a role where customer impact is real and immediate. You are:**

* **Customer\-obsessed — motivated by helping people improve their financial lives**
* **Fearless \& proactive — you take initiative and challenge how things can be improved**
* **Positive \& team\-oriented — uplifting the people around you comes naturally**
* **Structured yet adaptable — you follow processes while embracing change**
* **Multitasking\-friendly — you enjoy switching between service, analysis, and admin tasks**

**What Drives You**
-------------------

* **Growing your career in fintech**
* **Working ethically and helping customers regain financial control**  

**Being part of an ambitious, international, mission\-driven team**
* **Making real impact \- not just executing routine tasks**

**What We Offer**
-----------------

* **A modern office in central Stockholm**
* **A diverse team from all over the world**
* **Real opportunities for learning, development, and career progression**
* **A supportive and high\-performing Communications \& Operations team**
* **Breakfast, after\-work hangouts, wellness perks, and top\-tier tech gear**
* **A workplace that values curiosity, innovation, and continuous improvement**

**This is your chance to join a bold fintech company transforming financial health and to grow alongside a team that’s only getting started.**

**Ready to Make a Difference?**
-------------------------------

**We can’t wait to meet you.**  

**Apply today and help us build a fairer financial future for everyone.**

title: CTO / Chief Technology Officer
description:
CTO (Chief Technology Officer) — Zellify
  
Zellify builds subscription web funnels for apps — quiz funnels, web paywalls, onboarding flows — and the AI layer that generates them. We work with app companies across Europe, the US and beyond.
  
We're hiring a CTO to own our technology end to end and lead engineering as we scale.
  
What you'll own
  
The technical vision and architecture for the whole platform — from the AI agent runtime to the funnel infrastructure our customers build on.
  
Our AI systems — LLM orchestration, multi\-agent architecture, and the infrastructure that runs them at scale.
  
Engineering execution — you set the standards, ship alongside the team, and are accountable for velocity, reliability and security.
  
Building and leading the engineering team.
  
  

What we're looking for
  
Experience owning engineering at an early\-stage startup — you've personally built and shipped product, and helped scale it.
  
Deep, hands\-on expertise in AI systems — LLM agents, orchestration, prompt and tooling infrastructure — building the systems around models, not just using them.
  
Strong full\-stack engineering (TypeScript/Node.js) and modern cloud/serverless infrastructure (e.g. Cloudflare, serverless databases).
  
The judgment to make architecture calls under uncertainty and the discipline to keep the system secure and reliable as it scales.
  
You lead by building, communicate directly, and raise the bar for everyone around you.
  
  

We care about what you've built, not your credentials — a specific degree is not required.
  
Nice to have
  
Subscription/paywall or growth infrastructure, payment integrations, or marketing APIs.
  
A track record scaling a product and a team from early stage.
  
  

What we offer
  
A senior leadership seat with real ownership and equity in a growing, revenue\-generating company.
  
Permanent, full\-time role based in Stockholm (Sollentuna), on\-site.
  
Competitive fixed salary (by agreement) and relocation support for the right person.
  
A direct, English\-speaking, international team.
  
  

How to apply
  
Send a short note with your CV and GitHub/portfolio to careers@zellify.app. We review on a rolling basis.

title: Head of Product and Technology
description:
About the role
  
Carbon Compensate Scandinavia AB is a Stockholm\-based technology company. We are hiring a Head of Product and Technology to own the strategy, development, and delivery of our product and technology functions.
  
This role combines product leadership and engineering oversight to build and scale software platforms that leverage state\-of\-the\-art AI technologies and integrate them into real\-world applications, enabling businesses to get set up or making existing businesses more efficient. You will set the technical direction of the company's AI initiatives and ensure the product roadmap aligns with business objectives and customer needs.
  
Key responsibilities
  
Define and execute the product vision, strategy, and roadmap across web and mobile platforms
  
Lead the design, architecture, and delivery of the company's technology infrastructure and applications
  
Manage and mentor engineering and product team members, including internal staff and external contractors
  
Oversee the full product development lifecycle from discovery and specification through release and iteration
  
Establish and maintain engineering standards, incident management processes, and operational reliability practices
  
Translate business goals into technical requirements and measurable product outcomes
  
Drive experimentation and data\-informed decision\-making to improve key performance indicators
  
Own key technical and product metrics and report on performance to the executive team
  
Evaluate and integrate third\-party tools, platforms, and vendors to support company operations
  
Collaborate with commercial, operations, and leadership functions to align product delivery with business strategy
  
Manage data security, privacy, and compliance considerations across the technology stack
  
  

Qualifications
  
University degree in computer science, engineering, or a related technical field, or equivalent professional experience
  
7\+ years of experience leading engineering and product teams
  
Proven track record of building and scaling software products
  
Strong technical foundation across software architecture, application development, and platform systems
  
Demonstrated ability to lead cross\-functional teams and manage distributed contributors
  
Experience setting operating cadences, engineering standards, and delivery processes
  
Strategic thinker with the ability to balance long\-term vision and hands\-on execution
  
  

Terms
  
**Employment type:** Permanent, full time
  
**Working hours:** Full time, in accordance with Swedish labor regulations
  
**Location:** Stockholm, Sweden
  
  

How to apply
  
Send your CV and a short introduction to Jonatan.carlsson@gmail.com by 27th July 2026\. Please include "Head of Product and Technology" in the subject line.
  
**Contact person:** Jonatan Carlsson, Hiring Manager, Jonatan.carlsson@gmail.com

title: Customer Success Manager - North America
description:
Volumental is the foot scanning and fit technology company trusted by leading footwear retailers worldwide. We combine 3D scanning hardware with AI\-powered sizing recommendations, in physical retail, on Shopify storefronts, and across enterprise e\-commerce platforms, improving customer experience, shopper confidence and boosting sales. Our mission: make standard sizes obsolete.


We are growing our North American team and looking for a Customer Success Manager to own onboarding, adoption, and long\-term retention across our US in\-store scanner accounts. You will be embedded in the market, visiting stores, deepening relationships, and making sure our retail partners are getting real value from the technology they have invested in.

 **Where you'll fit in**


You will be our first dedicated CS hire on the ground in North America, managing a portfolio of retail accounts, from onboarding new stores to deepening relationships with accounts like Fleet Feet, Skechers, CCM and VF Corp.


You will work closely with the North America Sales Manager and report to the CCO. There is real ownership here \- of accounts, of process, and of how CS develops in the US market. If you are energised by fieldwork, building structure, and operating with autonomy, this is your environment.  

  

**We're excited about you because...**

* You are proactive by default. You initiate contact, spot risks early, and don't wait for accounts to raise their hand.
* You are comfortable in the field by visiting stores, training staff, and building in\-person relationships is how you do the job well.
* You have managed high volumes of accounts in parallel and built systems to keep a long tail healthy.
* You communicate clearly with everyone from retail floor staff to senior account stakeholders.
* You use AI tools as a natural part of how you work, for account prep, communication, or portfolio tracking.

**What you'll do**

* Own onboarding for new in\-store scanner accounts. Getting stores live, staff trained, and scanning quickly.
* Monitor scanner usage and account health data, identifying underperformance early and intervening before accounts disengage.
* Visit stores in person to deepen relationships, support staff, and gather first\-hand intelligence on how the product is being used.
* Collect structured customer feedback and route it to the product team in a format they can act on.
* Track account health and onboarding milestones in HubSpot and share timely updates with the Sales Manager and CCO.
* Collaborate with two CSMs in Stockholm to share playbooks and ensure seamless coverage across time zones.
* Attend key US trade shows including RIA Summit and The Running Event.

**We are looking for someone who:**

* Has 2–5 years in a Customer Success, Account Management, or field training role post\-sale, customer\-facing, B2B.
* Has demonstrated experience managing a high volume of accounts simultaneously and building repeatable systems to do it well.
* Is comfortable working remotely and independently while staying well\-connected to a distributed international team.
* Is willing and able to travel regularly to retail stores across their region.
* Must be based and eligible to work in the US.

**Bonus: not required, but nice to have:**

* Experience with physical hardware or technology products in a retail or B2B context.
* Experience collecting and synthesising customer feedback into structured product input.
* Spanish fluency.

**What we offer**

* Competitive annual base salary ($80,000–$90,000\) plus performance bonus
* Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
* Direct collaboration with the CCO and the North America commercial team
* Regular visits to our Stockholm HQ to connect with product and CS teams
* Genuine ownership of a function, you will shape how CS works in the US market
* A product with strong proof points and a growing enterprise customer base
* An AI\-forward team that gives you the tools to work smarter
* Clear growth path as the team and portfolio scale


This is a **full\-time remote position** based in the **US**, reporting to our **Chief Commercial Officer**. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds! If this role excites you but you don't meet every qualification, we encourage you to apply — we'd love to hear from you.

title: Project Manager – Enterprise AI
description:
### **Quick Introduction**



At **BlueCallom**, we don’t just talk about the future of AI—we create it. Our Agentic AI solutions bring Workgroup Intelligence to every employee, transforming how companies work and collaborate and changing their mindsets for exponential efficiency. We help shape the future of work, the future of education, and the future of society for the better.



**Full Job Description**
------------------------


**VP Marketing Enterprise AI**
------------------------------


##### **Responsibility**


Forget “marketing the future.” The future was already *yesterday.*  

We don’t push the envelope — we built a new one.  

Our challenge: helping enterprises catch up to *the now*.  

Most people are still playing with ChatGPT. You’ll help them play in a new league: the **Agentic Enterprise world**.


**Key topics include:**  

BlueCallom Platform for a Multi\-Application Architecture, Measurability, Manageability, Productivity, and ROI. Operational excellence, EAI Econimics, Native AI Technology (IoC), AI Act Compliance, Services, AI Academy, Agent Factory, and the Awards we won.



**Responsibility**
------------------


**Your Responsibility as VP Marketing, Enterprise AI**


* Executing our marketing and brand strategy.  

People around the world don’t buy a product; they buy the imagination of how it feels and how it helps to work with BlueCallom.
* Craft compelling messaging that translates AI innovation into clarity and fosters meaningful connections.
* Create and manage content across websites, social media, videos, decks, newsletters, and more.
* Collaborate with the product team, sales, and leadership teams to align communication with our GTM strategy.
* Handle a professionally provocative and polarizing communication style.
* Drive campaigns that expand our brand awareness in EMEA and South East Asia.
* Help shape the BlueCallom brand voice as we define a new category in intelligent enterprise applications.
##### **Qualification**

**Qualification**
-----------------


**Target Market Experience**


* **Empathy** is the most critical talent to manage marketing at BlueCallom
* You have experience working with our target market, including small, medium, and large enterprises, in the B2B segment.
* The people we work with are primarily division managers, VP\-level, and C\-level executives. You need to ‘read’ them.


**Creativity \& Communication Talent**


* **Courage** is the most critical talent to communicate at BlueCallom
* Storytelling: Craft compelling narratives that resonate emotionally with target audiences.
* Copywriting \& Editing: creating clear, concise, engaging messages across multiple channels.
* Managing the full range of brand communication, product branding, sales, and action\-driven communication.


**Digital \& Technical Talent**


* **Curiosity** is the most critical talent to leverage top technology in marketing at BlueCallom
* Well\-versed with ChatGPT, Mid Journey, Runway, and Sythesia.
* Skilled at analyzing data, interpreting insights, and making informed decisions.
* Rapid new technology adoption. You will utilize AI Agents to accelerate content creation and develop concepts for additional agents.


**Interpersonal \& Leadership Talent**


* **Intuition** is the most critical talent to manage marketing at BlueCallom
* Collaboration: Exceptional team player who works with internal and external teams.
* Leadership \& Influence: Ability to inspire, motivate, and manage teams, including external partners or agencies.
* Relationship Management: Adept at managing external relationships with agencies, vendors, influencers, and media partners.


**More About you**


* 3\+ years of experience in marketing communication or content creation.
* Social media top communicator and networker.
* Sharp writing skills and a creative mind—visualization is a plus.
* Proactive, fast, and excited by new ideas and early\-stage tech.
* Passionate about AI, enterprise innovation, and building things that matter.
* An empathic talent sensing how others would experience what we are doing or communicating.
* Fluent in German and English.
##### **Logistics**

#### **Our Location** **\&** **Office**



8008 Zürich, Switzerland  

Our office is next to the lake, the opera, and the city center. There are tram/bus stops, supermarkets, and restaurants within walking distance.


**Home office won’t work for us.**  

We love to think, create, work, and grow together.  

We are all BTO (Back to Office).



#### **What we have to offer**



A cool team of open minds  

A place for life long learning  

Monthly salary  

Plus, a success bonus  

A stock option plan  

**An opportunity to make a difference**



### **Application Logistics**



No need to send any resume.  

Please review our hiring process.  

Complete your career application with love.  

Send us an email to career@ and share your interest and ambition.  

We’ll review your LinkedIn profile.  

We will carefully assess your career application.  

Then, let’s do an initial video call and take it from there.


**We can’t wait to hear from you – we really mean it.**

  


### **Quick Introduction**



At **BlueCallom**, we don’t just talk about the future of AI—we create it. Our Agentic AI solutions bring Workgroup Intelligence to every employee, transforming how companies work and collaborate and changing their mindsets for exponential efficiency. We help shape the future of work, the future of education, and the future of society for the better.

title: 2026 Off-Cycle Internship - Investment Banking Mid Market - Zurich
description:
Switzerland \- Zürich
Business management, administration and support
Investment Bank
**Job Reference \#**


341345BR
**City**


Zürich
**Your role**


Interested in learning more about the dynamics of corporate finance and capital markets?
  

  

We’re looking for ambitious students to join our 2026 Off\-Cycle Internship Program within our Investment Bank, Global Banking business.  

  

You’ll:  

* learn all about the business: mergers and acquisitions (including corporate and sponsor\-backed transactions, leveraged buyouts or carve\-outs), equity capital markets and debt capital markets transactions
* be involved in providing advice and execution of merger and acquisitions, spin\-offs, refinancings, and other advisory services with a focus on Swiss mid\-sized corporations, entrepreneurs, and private equity funds across all sectors
* analyze complex situations and develop the best strategy to maximize our clients’ diverse objectives
* support the team on financial analyses and valuation exercises, conducting research activities on markets and companies
* work closely with our Swiss corporate banking, private banking and our international investment banking network of industry experts, providing an optimal platform for collaboration and your development

**Your team**


You’ll be working in Zürich, Switzerland in our Global Banking business (part of the Investment Bank), within our Swiss Mid Market Investment Banking team. We advise Swiss mid\-sized corporations, entrepreneurs and private equity funds on their strategic development and financing activities, including M\&A, debt and capital raisings as well as leveraged buyouts.
**Your expertise**


* is currently enrolled in studies with a graduation date in 2026 or 2027
* is motivated to work in a fast\-paced business with high demands and tight deadlines
* is a strategic thinker with sharp analytical and quantitative skills
* solid corporate finance knowledge of accounting and valuation techniques
* has an excellent academic track\-record and with strong communication skills in English and German, French is a plus
* previous experience or familiarity with Investment Banking, Transaction Services, Consulting or related financial services is an advantage


**Your program**


During your 4 \- 6 month internship, you’ll work with our experts and learn about the industry, our clients and our firm. You’ll be right at the heart of our business, learning from your colleagues, taking part in day\-to\-day operations. You’ll have plenty of opportunities to develop new skills and make contacts along the way. If you like challenges, enjoy learning and want to work where no two days are the same, this program is for you. If you have a successful internship, you may get an offer to return for our Graduate Talent Program after you've completed your studies.
**About us**


UBS is a leading and truly global wealth manager and the leading universal bank in Switzerland. We also provide diversified asset management solutions and focused investment banking capabilities. Headquartered in Zurich, Switzerland, UBS is present in more than 50 markets around the globe.  

We know that great work is never done alone. That’s why we place collaboration at the heart of everything we do. Because together, we’re more than ourselves. Want to find out more? Visit ubs.com/careers.
**Join us**


At UBS, we know that it's our people, with their diverse skills, experiences and backgrounds, who drive our ongoing success. We’re dedicated to our craft and passionate about putting our people first, with new challenges, a supportive team, opportunities to grow and flexible working options when possible. Our inclusive culture brings out the best in our employees, wherever they are on their career journey. And we use artificial intelligence (AI) to work smarter and more efficiently. We also recognize that great work is never done alone. That’s why collaboration is at the heart of everything we do. Because together, we’re more than ourselves.  

We’re committed to disability inclusion and if you need reasonable accommodation/adjustments throughout our recruitment process, you can always contact us.
**Disclaimer / Policy Statements**


UBS is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We respect and seek to empower each individual and support the diverse cultures, perspectives, skills and experiences within our workforce.

title: PMO Lead - Legal & Integrity Operations 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
description:
**Location:**

Zurich, Zurich, Switzerland
**Job ID:**

R0135056
**Date Posted:**

2026\-07\-14
**Company Name:**

HITACHI ENERGY HOLDINGS LTD
**Profession (Job Category):**

Project/Program Management
**Job Schedule:**

Full time
**Remote:**

No
**Job Description:**

**The opportunity**

We are looking for a PMO Lead who helps teams move faster, stay focused, and make better decisions. This role supports the Legal \& Integrity transformation portfolio by bringing structure, clarity, and follow\-through to important initiatives.


You will work closely with Legal, Integrity, Legal Operations Service Center, Legal Tech Lead, IS, AI teams, and external partners. Your job is to turn business needs into clear plans, connect the right people, and help initiatives land with measurable impact.


The PMO is not an administrative control function. It is a lean enablement function that helps teams execute well, remove blockers, and keep leadership informed.


**How you’ll make an impact**

* Keep one clear view of the transformation portfolio, including priorities, milestones, risks, and decisions
* Help teams define simple plans with clear ownership, timelines, deliverables, and success criteria
* Track progress, spot blockers early, and drive follow\-through on actions and commitments
* Prepare decision\-ready updates for leadership, steering committees, and portfolio governance forums
* Translate legal and operational needs into structured business and technical requirements
* Act as a bridge between Legal, Integrity, Legal Tech, IS, AI teams, and vendors.
* Support AI and legal tech initiatives by helping define use\-cases, scope, requirements, and measurable outcomes
* Use modern tools such as Microsoft 365, Loop, Power BI, and Copilot to reduce manual work and improve visibility

**Your background**

* A bachelor’s degree in business, technology, operations, project management, or a related field and equivalent practical experience
* Approximately 5–10 years’ experience in a multinational environment
* Strong experience in project, program, or portfolio management
* A practical, outcome\-focused mindset and the ability to turn strategy into execution
* Good business analysis skills, including requirements gathering, process mapping, and problem framing
* Confidence working with senior stakeholders, project sponsors, technical teams, and external partners
* Strong communication skills, especially the ability to simplify complex topics
* Comfort working across business and technology teams
* Experience with tools such as Power BI, Microsoft Teams, Loop, Copilot or similar collaboration and reporting tools
* Interest in using AI to improve delivery, reporting, and ways of working
* Fluency in English (communication with stakeholders on senior/executive levels)

**More about us**

At Hitachi Energy, we are advancing a sustainable energy future for all. Together with customers and partners, we pioneer technologies and enable the digital transformation required to accelerate the energy transition. Joining our Legal \& Integrity Operations team offers a unique opportunity to contribute to a transformation portfolio that drives efficiency, innovation, and collaboration across a global organization. You will work in a dynamic environment where continuous improvement, digital solutions, and AI\-enabled ways of working are shaping the future of how we operate.


**Accessibility and reasonable accommodation**

**Qualified individuals with a disability may request a reasonable accommodation if you are unable or limited in your ability to use or access the Hitachi Energy career site as a result of your disability. You may request reasonable accommodations by completing a** **general inquiry form** **on our website. Please include your contact information and specific details about your required accommodation to support you during the job application process.**

  

**This is solely for job seekers with disabilities requiring accessibility assistance or an accommodation in the job application process. Messages left for other purposes will not receive a response.**

  

**Use of Al and automated tools in recruitment**

**As part of our recruitment process, Hitachi Energy uses digital and automated tools, including Al\-supported solutions, to assist with activities such as application screening, job matching, and interview scheduling. These tools are designed to support our recruiters and do not replace human decision\-making. Candidate data is processed in accordance with applicable data protection and employment laws as well as** **Hitachi's Global Data Privacy Notice.**  

  

**Background Screening and Security Checks**

**As part of the hiring process, Hitachi Energy conducts pre\-employment background checks that may include verification of employment history, education, criminal records, and other relevant information, in accordance with applicable laws.**

**For certain roles—particularly those involving access to sensitive information, financial responsibilities, client data, regulated environments, or security\-sensitive functions—additional or more comprehensive background or security screenings may be required. These may include, but are not limited to, enhanced criminal history checks, credit history reviews (where legally permissible), sanctions screening, or other due diligence measures aligned with the responsibilities of the position.**

**The scope and depth of any background or security review will be determined based on the nature of the role and business necessity, and will always be conducted in compliance with applicable federal, state, and local laws. Candidates will be notified and, where required, asked to provide consent prior to the initiation of any such checks.**

title: Major Account Manager - DACH
description:
### **Who is Sonar?**



Sonar is driving the future of agent\-centric software development. As the leader in AI code verification and governance, we solve a critical problem: ensuring that software generated by AI\-assisted developers or autonomous agents is reliable, secure, and maintainable.



Integrating seamlessly with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Gemini, and Devin, we help over 75% of the Fortune 100 build trusted, reliable, compliant software. Customers who use Sonar are 44% less likely to report an outage due to AI\-generated code.



We believe code verification is the critical missing link in the Agent\-Centric Development Cycle (AC/DC). Industry giants like Nvidia, ServiceNow, Booking.com, Goldman Sachs, AstraZeneca, and Ford Motor Company count on us to provide independent, explainable, consistent review and governance of their AI\-generated code via products like:


* SonarQube: The world’s leading AI code review and verification platform.
* SonarQube Foundation Agent: Currently topping the leaderboards for agentic software repair.
* SonarSweep \& Sonar Context Augmentation: Providing the enterprise\-grade context and constraints agents need to be truly effective.


Our team operates across global hubs in Austin, Bochum, Dubai, Geneva, London, Singapore, Tokyo, and Washington D.C. We move with a mindset we call CODE:


* Committed to our customers and community.
* Obsessed with quality.
* Deliberate in our decisions.
* Effective as one team.


With over $400M in revenue and profitable, fast\-paced growth, we are building the backbone of the AI software revolution. If you’re hungry to have an impact, want to build at a fast pace, and ready to work at the forefront of AI, we want to hear from you.



### **What You Will Do Daily:**

* Generate new opportunities within a dedicated portfolio of the most strategic financial and retail accounts through upselling and cross\-selling.
* Lead strategic client engagements, including Quarterly Business Reviews, demonstrating how our solutions help them meet critical compliance standards like DORA, the CRA, and OWASP.
* Develop deep relationships with technical and business champions, becoming their go\-to expert on clean code and application security.
* Articulate the value of advanced features, including the application of AI to secure coding, to differentiate our offerings and solve complex customer problems.
* Size, quote, negotiate, and close enterprise\-level upgrades, managing the entire sales cycle with precision.
* Collaborate with marketing to create and execute targeted campaigns that resonate with the specific pain points of the banking and retail industries.
* Proactively share insights and best practices for selling into regulated markets with the wider sales team.
* Maintain meticulous records of account activity and opportunity forecasting using Salesforce.


### **The Experience You Will Need:**

* Advantageous: Experience in or a strong understanding of Secure DevOps principles and how security is integrated into the modern software development lifecycle \& knowledge of the application of AI in enhancing code security and the ability to discuss its benefits with technical audiences.
* Essential: A solid understanding of key compliance and security standards crucial to the finance and retail sectors, including the Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA), the Cyber Resilience Act (CRA), and the OWASP Top 10\.
* Proven success over 7\+ years in a B2B SaaS sales role, with a track record of selling technical products to technical buyers and executive sponsors.
* Expertise in managing and growing large enterprise accounts, including navigating complex sales cycles and negotiating deals over £250k, while maintaining a run rate of incremental expansion revenue of 120k/month at an ASP of 25k. We are a high velocity business.
* Mastery of account planning, strategic prospecting, and pipeline management from lead qualification to closing the deal.
* Exceptional communication and listening skills, with the ability to deliver compelling value propositions to C\-level contacts and handle objections effectively.
* Proficiency with Salesforce is a must; you should see it as a critical tool for success.
* A proactive, customer\-centric, and team\-oriented attitude with a professional level of written and spoken English. A build it while flying it attitude is essential.
* Experience of hypergrowth it’s challenges and opportunities is an advantage.
* Has worked in secure Devops familiarity with key concepts and standards governing code quality and security.

**We value diversity, equity, and inclusion**



At Sonar, we believe that our diversity is our strength. We are a global company that values and respects different backgrounds, perspectives, and cultures. We are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive work environment where everyone feels valued and empowered to contribute their best. We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer and welcome all qualified applicants, regardless of race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status.



If you need any accommodation, please reach out to us at \[email protected].



All offers of employment at Sonar are contingent upon the results of a comprehensive background check and reference verification conducted before the start date.



Applications that are submitted through agencies or third party recruiters will not be considered.  



  

### **In\-office culture**



We're intentional about this. We believe the best teams are built in the room together. Three anchor days — Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays — create the collaboration rhythm that makes a hub office worth having.



Candidates need to be genuinely based in the location the role is posted — if that's not where you are today, we're happy to support relocation for the right person.

  


### **We value diversity, equity, and inclusion**



At Sonar, we believe that our diversity is our strength. We are a global company that values and respects different backgrounds, perspectives, and cultures. We are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive work environment where everyone feels valued and empowered to contribute their best. We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer and welcome all qualified applicants, regardless of race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status.



If you need any accommodation, please reach out to us at \[email protected].



All offers of employment at Sonar are contingent upon the results of a comprehensive background check and reference verification conducted before the start date.



Applications that are submitted through agencies or third party recruiters will not be considered.



We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

* Strong experience in project, program, or portfolio management
* A practical, outcome\-focused mindset and the ability to turn strategy into execution
* Good business analysis skills, including requirements gathering, process mapping, and problem framing
* Confidence working with senior stakeholders, project sponsors, technical teams, and external partners
* Strong communication skills, especially the ability to simplify complex topics
* Comfort working across business and technology teams
* Experience with tools such as Power BI, Microsoft Teams, Loop, Copilot or similar collaboration and reporting tools
* Interest in using AI to improve delivery, reporting, and ways of working
* Fluency in English (communication with stakeholders on senior/executive levels)

**More about us**

At Hitachi Energy, we are advancing a sustainable energy future for all. Together with customers and partners, we pioneer technologies and enable the digital transformation required to accelerate the energy transition. Joining our Legal \& Integrity Operations team offers a unique opportunity to contribute to a transformation portfolio that drives efficiency, innovation, and collaboration across a global organization. You will work in a dynamic environment where continuous improvement, digital solutions, and AI\-enabled ways of working are shaping the future of how we operate.


**Accessibility and reasonable accommodation**

**Qualified individuals with a disability may request a reasonable accommodation if you are unable or limited in your ability to use or access the Hitachi Energy career site as a result of your disability. You may request reasonable accommodations by completing a** **general inquiry form** **on our website. Please include your contact information and specific details about your required accommodation to support you during the job application process.**

  

**This is solely for job seekers with disabilities requiring accessibility assistance or an accommodation in the job application process. Messages left for other purposes will not receive a response.**

  

**Use of Al and automated tools in recruitment**

**As part of our recruitment process, Hitachi Energy uses digital and automated tools, including Al\-supported solutions, to assist with activities such as application screening, job matching, and interview scheduling. These tools are designed to support our recruiters and do not replace human decision\-making. Candidate data is processed in accordance with applicable data protection and employment laws as well as** **Hitachi's Global Data Privacy Notice.**  

  

**Background Screening and Security Checks**

**As part of the hiring process, Hitachi Energy conducts pre\-employment background checks that may include verification of employment history, education, criminal records, and other relevant information, in accordance with applicable laws.**

**For certain roles—particularly those involving access to sensitive information, financial responsibilities, client data, regulated environments, or security\-sensitive functions—additional or more comprehensive background or security screenings may be required. These may include, but are not limited to, enhanced criminal history checks, credit history reviews (where legally permissible), sanctions screening, or other due diligence measures aligned with the responsibilities of the position.**

**The scope and depth of any background or security review will be determined based on the nature of the role and business necessity, and will always be conducted in compliance with applicable federal, state, and local laws. Candidates will be notified and, where required, asked to provide consent prior to the initiation of any such checks.**

title: Robotics Lab Technician Intern
description:
ANYbotics is a fast\-growing tech company dedicated to shaping the future of mobile robotics across multiple industries. Join our highly talented and motivated team of more than 190 people and work on cutting\-edge robot technology. We are open to internships all year round and post regularly.

We’re always looking for passionate, curious, and motivated interns to join our mission.

This is your chance to collaborate with world\-class experts, gain real\-world experience, and make meaningful contributions in a fast\-paced, interdisciplinary environment.  

### **The Opportunity**



We are looking for a hands\-on **Robotics Lab Technician Intern** for a 6\-month period to support our engineering team with hardware maintenance, troubleshooting, and lab organization. In this role, you will focus on the physical upkeep and operational readiness of our robotics systems and testing environment. This is a highly practical, execution\-focused position ideal for students or technical trainees seeking direct experience with robotics hardware.

  


### **The Market \& Our Technology**



ANYbotics is a fast\-growing tech company dedicated to shaping the future of mobile robotics across multiple heavy industries. Our four\-legged robotic platform, ANYmal, is designed to navigate complex industrial environments autonomously, performing inspections and data collection in places that are too dangerous or difficult for humans. Join our highly talented and motivated team of more than 200 people and work on cutting\-edge robot technology in an agile, fast\-paced environment.

### 


### **Your Impact**


* Inspect, diagnose, and repair robotics hardware and subsystems before and after testing cycles
* Build and maintain laboratory tools, infrastructure, and test benches to ensure optimal working conditions
* Organize the laboratory space, managing component inventory, tools, and safety protocols to maintain a clean, efficient workspace
* Assist technical staff with the physical setup, wiring, and mounting of sensors and hardware testing rigs
* Execute standard test protocols on robotics systems under the guidance of our engineering team
### **Your Profile**


* Student or trainee currently enrolled in a hands\-on technical program from a university, school of applied sciences, or a relevant vocational track
* Strong practical mindset with a genuine interest in troubleshooting, repairing hardware, and working with your hands
* Methodical and organized approach to keeping a structured, tidy, and safe laboratory environment
* Basic familiarity with electronics and sensors such as multimeters, wiring, and basic test equipment
* Good communication skills in English, both written and spoken, to collaborate effectively with our international technical team
### **Bonus Points**


* Prior experience working in a makerspace, university lab, or automotive/electronics workshop
* Familiarity with Linux (Ubuntu) environment and basic command\-line interfaces
* Basic soldering skills or experience with electrical crimping tools
3,000 CHF \- 3,000 CHF a month

**Interested? Submit your application**



We will contact you if your skills and experience are a good fit for the team and the role. Please note due to the high load of applications we will only contact those that are relevant. Thank you for your understanding.



We are only able to consider applications from Schengen\-Area citizens (or any student enrolled at ETH and EPFL who require compulsory internship). For residents outside of Switzerland, you will have to find your own accommodation in order to apply for the L or B work permit.  


Internship Details:

Start date: any time of the year and always on the 1st of the month
Duration: 6 months
Workload: 100% (Full time, Onsite)

Who can apply:
**EU** applicants for internships
The internship can be voluntary
A work permit is not required but the candidate needs a residence permit
Must be enrolled in a University

**Non\-EU** applicants for internships:
Internship must be mandatory (supported by a letter from a university)
A work permit is required
Must reside in CH  


**Interested? Submit your application**
We will contact you if your skills and experience are a good fit for the team and the role. Please note due to the high load of applications we will only contact those that are relevant. Thank you for your understanding.

What We Offer:
* Hands\-on experience working on advanced locomotion software.


* Mentorship from industry experts.


* Opportunities to contribute to innovative projects.


* A dynamic and collaborative work environment.


* Potential for future full\-time opportunities.



We offer you a very exciting and dynamic work environment, the opportunity to become part of a fast\-growing company and an ambitious team that is on a mission to change the industrial inspection market, a chance to leverage your experience and bring in your own ideas, a fair market salary, an attractive and fun environment in the city of Zurich.
We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Global Procurement Manager - Warehousing
description:
**Location:** La Tour\-de\-Peilz, Switzerland  

**Work model:** Hybrid / Full time
  

**Contract type / duration:** Permanent

 **Be a force for good and feel trusted to make decisions that matter.**


As a Global Procurement Manager for Warehousing at Nestlé Global Procurement, you will be responsible for defining and implementing the category strategy for the 3PL Warehousing spend in scope by using strategic sourcing processes, tools and policies, as well as working closely with the Nestle Corporate \& Zone Logistics functions to drive the implementation of the category strategy, support innovation and drive standardization processes.


We operate on a truly global scale, bringing together over 40 nationalities across three dynamic hubs in Switzerland, Panama, and Malaysia. This is your chance to drive innovation, sustainability, and impact at scale, ensuring value creation through responsibly sourced supply across diverse categories.

 **How you’ll make an impact as a Global Procurement Manager \- Warehousing**

* Define and align with key stakeholders the global category strategy for the spend and drive the implementation process by working closely with the business and the local procurement organizations.
* Implement key Strategic Sourcing processes, tools and policies such as Request for Quotations (RFQ), supplier management, standardization, aggregation.
* Perform supplier market/category/supply risk analysis and develop Total Cost Ownership (TCO) models to identify improvement opportunities and implement them.
* Introduce / develop new suppliers in close cooperation with the Logistics standard owners.
* Negotiate supply contracts ensuring the most beneficial commercial agreements with suppliers in line with the category strategy and in collaboration with Nestrade Legal team.
* Manage and lead supplier relations with key strategic suppliers under the category’s scope.
* Ensure compliance with Nestlé's Corporate Business Principles, policies, and standards.

 **What will make you successful**

* University degree in Procurement, Business Administration, Supply Chain, Economics, Finance, or Engineering.
* 10 years of experience in strategic sourcing, ideally with a regional or global scope, ideally gained in Procurement of Warehousing or Logistics or within Operations in a 3PL company.
* Proven track record in leading cross\-functional projects, driving change, and demonstrating strong functional leadership.
* Solid experience in category sourcing, TCO modelling, risk management, and Supplier Relationship Management (incl. claims management).
* Strong interest in Automation, Robotics, and new technologies, with solid understanding and use of digital tools and AI.
* Excellent negotiation, communication, and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to influence internally and externally with global suppliers.
* Fluency in English is essential, French or German is a big plus.

 **At Nestlé Global Procurement, we place people at the heart of everything we do.**

Our benefits are designed to support your growth and wellbeing, so you can thrive at work and in life:

* Flexible working options, including hybrid work possibilities (for office\-based roles)
* Paid holidays beyond legal requirements
* Learning and development opportunities to grow your career
* Performance based bonus
* Healthcare contribution and access to the Employee Assistance Program
* Strong employer contribution to your pension plan
* Generous parental leave and comprehensive family support solutions
* Attractive employee discounts across various products and services

 **What to expect from our hiring process**


We are committed to an inclusive and respectful hiring experience and are happy to provide reasonable accommodations if needed. Our workplaces are fully accessible and supported by a strong safety culture, with modern installations and procedures to ensure a safe environment for everyone.


The hiring process typically includes a video interview with Talent Acquisition, an interview with the hiring team, and a final discussion and offer. We review applications as they are received and close the role once a strong list of relevant candidates is identified, so we encourage you to apply early. All information is treated confidentially.

 **Ready to Be a Force for Good?**


Apply now and feel trusted to make decisions that matter.


\#Nestradecareer

title: Product Manager - AI Agent Studio
description:
EXTERNS, Remote
Vollzeit
Festanstellung
  
**Deine Aufgaben**
------------------

**Mission**
At Hypatos, we develop a platform for building and delivering vertical AI Agents that automate document\-heavy back\-office workflows across core enterprise processes such as Purchase\-toPay (P2P), Order\-to\-Cash (O2C), and Record\-to\-Report (R2R). In large enterprises, business support teams still process huge volumes of transactions manually — from sales orders and contracts to invoices, payments, and order confirmations. Our AI Agents change that: they extract, classify, validate, and route transactions automatically and automate complex business decisions, reducing the need for manual intervention in mission\-critical workflows.  

We are looking for a Product Manager to strengthen our product team and help shape the evolution of our AI Agent Studio — the core environment where enterprise users build, configure, review, operate and talk to AI Agents through our AI Agent Builder and Human\-in the\-Loop (HITL) interfaces.  

This is a hands\-on product role at the intersection of enterprise workflows, AI agents, and user experience. You will help shape products that redefine how enterprise teams use AI — not as aside feature, but as the core of the product experience. As part of the Product team, you will take ownership of initiatives within the AI Agent Studio, working closely with Product Leadership, Engineering, AI, Design, and Go\-to\-Market teams. You will translate product strategy, customer needs, and technical opportunities into well\-specified, well\-executed product increments — from discovery and specification to delivery and adoption.  

**Responsibilities*** **Drive product initiatives within the AI Agent Studio:** Own selected areas across the AI Agent Builder and HITL interfaces, helping shape how enterprise users build, operate, and scale AI Agents.
* **Translate user and business needs into product capabilities:** Understand how customers configure agents for different transaction types, how reviewers work in the HITL interface, and what business teams need to trust AI automation in mission\-critical workflows. Turn these insights into clear product decisions.
* **Manage product execution end\-to\-end:** Define requirements, write specs and user stories, use AI to build product designs, manage the backlog, and drive delivery in close collaboration with Engineering and Customer Success, and Delivery teams.
* **Work hands\-on with customers and stakeholders:** Gather feedback, analyze usage, validate assumptions, and feed learnings back into the product continuously.
* **Support adoption and enablement:** Help bring new capabilities successfully to market by contributing to documentation, release communication, enablement, and internal/external readiness
**Dein Profil**
---------------

* **Background \& Experience:** Degree in Business, Technology, Computer Science, or a related field, with 2\+ years in Product Management or Product Ownership for B2B software. You have shipped features end\-to\-end in an agile environment.
* **Product \& Technical Fluency:** Strong grasp of modern software product development practices. Familiarity with AI or LLM\-powered products is a strong plus; curiosity and ability to learn technical concepts quickly are essential.
* **User\-Centric Mindset \& Execution:** You think in workflows and usability, drive topics forward proactively, and are highly organized when managing multiple initiatives at once.
* **Collaboration \& Communication:** You communicate clearly across Engineering, AI, Design, Delivery, and Go\-To\-Market teams, and are comfortable working directly with customers to gather feedback and validate assumptions.
* **Start up Mindset \& Adaptability:** You take ownership, learn fast, and are motivated by helping shape the next generation of enterprise AI products in a fast\-moving environment
**Unser Versprechen**
---------------------

* **We trust amazing people to do amazing things** and make a long\-term impact \- we give you Freedom and ownership of meaningful work that directly impacts the business
* We're building a positive organizational culture where **personal and professional growth are just as important as business growth**
* We believe different perspectives make Hypatos a better community \- that is why we're **committed to building a diverse and inclusive environment where you feel you belong**
* Beyond a **top market compensation package** including **company shares**, you will enjoy a **personal development budget, meal allowance, sporting activities and free beers :)**

**Über uns**
------------


Hypatos is redefining enterprise work by deploying LLM\-powered AI Agents into the heart of business operations. Backed by leading investors (Elaia, Blackfin Tech, Grazia Equity, UVC Partners, DTFC, Plug \& Play), we are expanding rapidly and building the foundation for the next generation of intelligent business systems.  

Join us to shape the future of enterprise automation and help improve the way hundreds of millions of people work every day.

title: AI Solution Builder
description:
EXTERNS, Remote
Vollzeit
Festanstellung
  
**Deine Aufgaben**
------------------

**Your Mission**  

At Hypatos, we build and sell **vertical AI Agents** that automate document\-heavy back\-office workflows across core enterprise processes such as Purchase\-to\-Pay (P2P), Order\-to\-Cash (O2C), and Record\-to\-Report (R2R).  

As a **(Senior) AI Solution Builder**, you take full ownership of designing, building, and scaling these AI Agents on top of the Hypatos platform, turning them into production\-grade solutions. Your work directly shapes our core product and is rolled out across our customer base.  

You operate within the **Product organization** at the intersection of Engineering, Applied AI, QA and Customer Operations. This is a highly collaborative role — you are the bridge between business problems and technical solutions. Your focus is hands\-on execution — turning real\-world business problems into robust, production\-ready AI workflows using prompt engineering, data, and agentic systems  

  

**Key Responsibilities**  

* **Build AI solutions end\-to\-end** – Design, implement, and continuously improve out\-of\-the\-box AI Agent solutions across P2P, O2C, and R2R processes.
* **Translate business needs into working AI systems** – Partner closely with Product, Pre\-Sales, Delivery, and customers to understand real\-world requirements and turn them into robust, multi\-step automation flows on the Hypatos AI Agent platform.
* **Own prompt engineering \& LLM behavior** – Develop, test, and refine prompts, context strategies, and evaluation methods to ensure reliable, high\-quality outputs.
* **Work hands\-on with real data \& drive quality** – Dive into customer data, edge cases, and process variations to make solutions production\-ready; define KPIs, evaluate systematically, and optimize for accuracy, robustness, and business impact.
* **Identify and close gaps** – Spot limitations in existing solutions or the platform and work with Product and Engineering to improve them.
* **Scale solutions** – Scale solutions across customers by creating reusable blueprints and enabling our go\-to\-market and delivery teams.
**Dein Profil**
---------------

**Your Profile**  

* **Background \& Experience:** Degree in Business Informatics, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field. Combined with hands\-on experience in Solution Engineering, Technical Product Management, Applied AI/ML, Implementation Consulting, or similar roles, preferably in a B2B SaaS environment.
* **AI, LLM \& Technical Fluency:** Strong practical experience with AI/LLMs (e.g. ChatGPT, Claude, Microsoft Copilot), comfortable working with APIs, JSON, and data structures, hands\-on experience with scripting or coding, and the ability to translate business problems into structured prompts and systematically improve outputs.
* **Builder \& Execution Mindset:** You enjoy building things end\-to\-end — hands\-on, execution\-driven, with deep focus and attention to detail; you dive into complex problems, maintain high concentration over extended periods, and deliver precise, high\-quality results.
* **Process \& Systems Understanding:** You quickly grasp business processes and translate them into structured, scalable automation logic, with a solid understanding of how they are implemented in enterprise systems such as SAP, Oracle, or Salesforce.
* **Startup Mindset \& Collaboration:** You thrive in fast\-paced, demanding environments, take full ownership, and work effectively across Engineering, Product, and business stakeholders to ship impactful solutions.
**Unser Versprechen**
---------------------

* **We trust amazing people to do amazing things** and make a long\-term impact \- we give you Freedom and ownership of meaningful work that directly impacts the business
* We're building a positive organizational culture where **personal and professional growth are just as important as business growth**
* We believe different perspectives make Hypatos a better community \- that is why we're **committed to building a diverse and inclusive environment where you feel you belong**
* Beyond a **top market compensation package** including **company shares**, you will enjoy a **personal development budget, meal allowance, sporting activities and free beers :)**

------------


Hypatos is redefining enterprise work by deploying LLM\-powered AI Agents into the heart of business operations. Backed by leading investors (Elaia, Blackfin Tech, Grazia Equity, UVC Partners, DTFC, Plug \& Play), we are expanding rapidly and building the foundation for the next generation of intelligent business systems.  

Join us to shape the future of enterprise automation and help improve the way hundreds of millions of people work every day.

title: Business Development Representative (BDR) – Strategic & Enterprise Accounts
description:
Remote Germany
Vollzeit
Festanstellung
  
**Deine Aufgaben**
------------------


We are seeking a high\-energy, strategic, and tech\-savvy Enterprise **Business Development Representative (BDR)** to join our rapidly growing, AI\-driven software company based in Germany. In this role, you will partner directly with a Regional Strategic Account Executive (AE) to disrupt the German enterprise markets.  

  

You will act as the engine of the sales pipeline, educating corporate executives on how our cutting\-edge artificial intelligence platforms solve complex operational inefficiencies. Your focus will be equally split between hunting/supporting net\-new enterprise logos and driving AI adoption within our existing, high\-value client base. Your contribution has a direct impact on closing multi\-million\-dollar deals

**????️** **Strategic Territory Alignment \& Planning**  

* **AE Partnership:** Collaborate daily with your Regional Strategic Account Executive to map the territory, rank target accounts, and build execution plans.
* **Account Mapping:** Research large enterprise organizations to identify key subsidiaries, business units, and legacy system pain points ripe for AI automation.
* **Buying Committee Identification:** Find and map key decision\-makers across the C\-suite, IT, Innovation/AI Leads, Procurement, and specialized business units.

**????** **Net\-New Enterprise Acquisition (50% Focus)**  

* **Multi\-Channel Outreach:** Execute highly personalized prospecting campaigns via phone, tailored email, LinkedIn, and video touchpoints with the support of our marketing team.
* **AI Value Proposition Delivery:** Craft and pitch compelling, industry\-specific value propositions that demystify AI technology and prove immediate ROI to corporate executives.
* **Discovery \& Qualification:** Conduct deep initial discovery calls to qualify enterprise needs, digital maturity, budget timelines, and decision criteria.

**????** **Account Expansion: Cross\-Sell \& Up\-Sell (50% Focus)**

* **Relationship Building:** Prospect into new, unmapped departments within existing customer companies to expand our operational footprint.
* **Internal Growth Campaigns:** Run targeted campaigns to introduce existing users to advanced AI product features, premium upgrades, or next\-generation capabilities.
* **️** **Data, Pipeline, \& Process Management**
* **CRM Hygiene:** Track, log, and maintain meticulous records of all activities, account structures, and intelligence in Salesforce.
* **Meeting Hand\-off:** Coordinate smooth transitions of qualified opportunities to your AE, providing detailed briefs on executive pain points and AI readiness.

**Feedback Loops:** Share market feedback, common objections regarding AI integration, and competitive intelligence with Marketing and Product teams**Dein Profil**
---------------

**Required Experience \& Skills**

* Clear, structured career paths into Enterprise Account Executive, AI Solution Engineering, or Sales Leadership roles.

* Beyond a top market compensation, you will enjoy a **unlimited vacation days,** **professional development activities, meal allowance, sporting activities and free beers** as well as a hybrid working mode
