title: Lead Web Designer
description:
Creatio is an AI CRM and workflow platform where people and AI agents work together — with no limits on users, agents, or scale. We help midsize and large organizations run customer workflows in the AI era. Headquartered in Boston, MA, with a global team and a large ecosystem of partners, Creatio serves thousands of customers in over 100 countries and automates tens of millions of workflows daily. Genuine care for our clients and partners is at the heart of our DNA. We’re proud to be recognized by top industry analysts as a Leader and Strong Performer in multiple Gartner and Forrester reports.In 2025, Creatio was named to Inc.’s Best Workplaces list, recognizing our commitment to employee wellbeing and a strong workplace culture.Who We’re Looking For: We're looking for a strong Lead Web Designer who sets the visual bar for our digital products — website, landing pages, platforms. This is a role about creativity and quality: someone whose work impresses from the very first look, and who independently drives the most complex projects from concept to final mockup.You'll work within the web platforms team, alongside development and in close creative collaboration with the art director and the UX/technical designer. Project management and coordination are handled by the team lead — your focus stays on design and quality.The role is based in Poland (Remote).Team composition: You'll work within the web platforms team, alongside development and in close creative collaboration with the Art Director and the UX/Technical Designer. Project management and coordination are handled by the Team Lead — your focus stays on design and quality.Responsibilities: Wow\-level design — creating visually strong, modern UI for the company's website, landing pages, and digital platforms.Tier\-1 projects — independently driving strategically important projects from concept to a final, development\-ready mockup.Stakeholder work — shaping the design concept even when the client doesn't yet know what they want — proposing a vision rather than waiting for a detailed brief.Creative partnership — pairing with the UX/technical designer, who owns structure and flows, and working closely with the art director to jointly maintain the visual bar.Requirements: Visual mastery — a strong web design portfolio with an obvious "wow" factor: modern, aesthetically flawless interfaces and landing pages.UI above all — deep UI skills: typography, composition, color, detail, and working with design systems.UX instinct — thinking beyond aesthetics — understanding flows, usability, and user behavior while pairing with the UX designer.Audience understanding — designing for a specific audience (complex B2B/enterprise clients) rather than an abstract user.Proactivity — the ability to guide stakeholders and sell design decisions, not just execute tasks.Independence — the ability to carry a complex project through to completion without step\-by\-step direction.Conversion design (PPC) — experience with advertising landing pages and an understanding of conversion design is a plus.Figma — fluent proficiency, working with design systems and preparing mockups for development handoff. (Must have)Adobe — After Effects / Premiere (video) and Photoshop (photo). (Must have)AI design and development — generative tools and AI\-assisted design in daily work; ability to build with AI and implement modern web effects (animations, scroll interactions, micro\-interactions).Frontend understanding (HTML / CSS / JS) — understanding of responsive design basics and layout constraints; deeper skills are a strong bonus.English — B2 level or higher (working with English\-speaking products and audiences).What you should expect from us: Growth \& Development: Clear career paths, mentorship opportunities, and access to continuous learning to help you reach your full potential.Flexibility \& Well\-Being: We provide flexible work arrangements and initiatives that empower you to manage your schedule effectively, stay productive, and thrive both personally and professionally.Recognition \& Impact: A culture that celebrates achievements, values your ideas, and empowers you to make real contributions from day one.Innovative Culture: Be part of a company that embraces new ideas, modern technologies, and bold thinking to stay ahead of the curve.Benefits \& Rewards Package: We provide competitive compensation and benefits designed to support you and your family. Our rewards approach goes beyond salary, recognizing your contributions and commitment. The exact package may vary depending on your country of residence and employment type.
  
  

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Creative Producer (Female-Oriented Product)
description:
Social Discovery Group (https://socialdiscoverygroup.com/) (SDG) is a group of social discovery companies. SDG solves the problems of loneliness, isolation, and disconnection \- transforming virtual intimacy into the new normal. SDG's products redefine the way people interact and connect with one another.


Our portfolio includes social entertainment platforms designed to connect people online across different cultures and regions of the world.


We bring together a team of like\-minded people and IT professionals who specialize in creating and developing globally impactful social discovery products. Our international team of digital nomads works remotely from all over the world.


We're proud to be a two\-time “Great Place to Work” winner (USA \& Japan, 2024–2025\) and a Top\-5 Company for Work\-From\-Anywhere Jobs (FlexJobs, 2025\).


We are looking for **Creative Producer**.


**Your main tasks will be:**


* Own the creative testing framework end\-to\-end: hypothesis\-to\-verdict pipeline, data thresholds for decisions, stop\-loss rules.
* Generate creative hypotheses from performance data, competitor analysis (Meta Ads Library, TikTok Creative Center) and adjacent verticals (e\-commerce, gaming, dating).
* Brief and manage designers and the AI\-generation pipeline (GenAI video/image tools), then oversee testing execution with the UA team.
* Analyze creative performance by layer — hook rate, hold rate, IPM, CTR, CPA, ROAS, cohort retention — and turn results into a taxonomy/knowledge base (which themes and angles win, and why).
* Deliver weekly reporting on the creative portfolio and drive iteration on winning concepts.


**We expect from you:**


* 2\+ years in creative strategy / creative performance, ideally high\-volume creative operations (hundreds/quarter) in e\-commerce, gaming or dating.
* Hands\-on experience with GenAI video/image tools (Seedance, Runway, Veo, Kling, Midjourney, HeyGen or similar) and understanding of which tool fits which task.
* Strong analytical skills: comfortable with large datasets, spreadsheets/dashboards, and creative performance metrics.
* Strong brief\-writing skills — hypotheses, constants, references — enabling production to execute without back\-and\-forth
* Working English (US market); editing skills (CapCut/Premiere/After Effects) are a plus


**What do we offer:**


* **REMOTE OPPORTUNITY** to work full\-time;
* The **initial pay level** or **pay range** for this role will be shared with candidates during the recruitment process and before the commencement of employment;
* **Vacation** 28 calendar days per year;
* **7 wellness days per year** (time off) that can be used to deal with household issues, to lie down and recover without taking sick leave;
* **Bonuses up to $5000** for recommending successful applicants for positions in the company;
* 50% **payment for professional training, international conferences, and meetings;**
* Corporate discount for **English lessons;**
* **Health benefits.** According to the paychecks, if you are not eligible for corporate medical insurance, the company will compensate you with up to $ 1,000 gross per year per employee. This can be spent on self\-purchase of health insurance or on doctor's fees for yourself and close relatives (spouse, children);
* **Workplace organization.** The company provides all employees with an equipped workplace and all the necessary equipment (table, armchair, wifi, etc.) in our offices or co\-working locations. In the other locations, the company provides reimbursement of workplace costs up to $ 1000 gross once every 3 years, according to the paychecks. This money can be spent on the rent of the co\-working room, on equipping the working place at home (desk, chair, Internet, etc.) during those 3 years;
* **Internal gamified gratitude system:** receive bonuses from colleagues and exchange them for our merchandise, team building activities, massage certificates, etc.


**Sounds good? Join us now!**

title: Recruiter (contract)
description:
Please note that this is a contract role providing services to Microsoft through external staffing partners of Allegis Global Solutions (AGS). If you are selected for this role, you will be employed by AGS and will not be an employee of Microsoft.

 **Role Overview:**


This role is an end‑to‑end early‑career recruiting position supporting Microsoft’s EMEA Global Programs, focused on hiring interns, graduates, apprentices, and research talent in Ireland. The recruiter will own the full hiring lifecycle, including university sourcing, campus and virtual hiring events, candidate interviews, assessment centres and offer management, while delivering a strong and inclusive candidate experience. The role works closely with hiring managers and programme stakeholders in a fast‑paced, remote environment to build strong early‑talent pipelines for the future.

 **Key Responsibilities:**

* Review applications and shortlist early‑career candidates.
* Conduct first‑round virtual interviews.
* Plan, organize and run assessment centers and hiring events.
* Manage end‑to‑end recruiting: sourcing interviews offers close.
* Negotiate and extend offers; manage candidate expectations.
* Partner closely with hiring managers and program stakeholders.
* Ensure compliance with local employment, visa, and discrimination laws.
* Track market trends, competitor activity, and hiring data.

 **Must‑Have Skills:**

* Early in Career / University recruiting experience (interns, graduates, apprentices).
* Strong sourcing strategy for campus hiring and internship pipelines.
* Hands‑on experience with:
* University partnerships / school engagement events
* Application screening \& interview coordination
* Offer creation and negotiation
* Experience running assessment centres or bulk hiring events.
* ATS experience \+ strong Microsoft Office skills.
* Ability to manage multiple roles and candidates independently.

 **Nice‑to‑Have Skills**

* Experience hiring for global or EMEA programmes
* Background in a large multinational company
* Exposure to tech or research hiring (preferred)
* GitHub sourcing experience (preferred)

 **Experience Level Guidance**

* 4\+ years recruiting experience.
* Must have done end‑to‑end university hiring, not just coordination.

 **Additional Details:**

* **Location:** Ireland (Remote)
* **Duration:** 13 months contract
* **Shift Timings:** 8:00AM to 4:00PM (business hours)
* **Pay Range:** €196\-207 /day (PAYE)
* **Weekly Schedule:** 39 hours

  

As a workplace, Allegis Global Solutions focuses on relationships – with each other, our clients and our candidates. In fact, serving others is one of our core values. title: Head of Training Strategy & Growth – EMEA
description:
**Business Area:**

Professional Services**Seniority Level:**


Mid\-Senior level**Job Description:**


At Cloudera, we empower people to transform complex data into clear and actionable insights. With as much data under management as the hyperscalers, we're the preferred data partner for the top companies in almost every industry. Powered by the relentless innovation of the open source community, Cloudera advances digital transformation for the world’s largest enterprises.

**Overview**  

This role is responsible for defining and driving the growth of the Training business across EMEA. Acting as the voice of the market, the role identifies skills demand, shapes training offerings, and develops scalable routes to market. It operates at the intersection of customers, ecosystem partners, and internal teams to ensure training is aligned to real\-world needs and positioned as a strategic growth pillar.

**As Head of Training Strategy \& Growth you will:**

* Own the EMEA training strategy, aligning offerings to market demand, emerging trends (e.g. AI, data), and regional priorities
* Act as the primary conduit of market insight, translating customer needs, field feedback, and delivery experience into clear requirements for training content and portfolio evolution
* Shape and influence the training portfolio by working closely with enablement and content teams to ensure offerings are relevant, scalable, and commercially viable
* Build and scale a focused training ecosystem, including partners, academic institutions, and strategic alliances
* Identify and activate new demand channels, including enterprise L\&D budgets, workforce transformation programs, and public sector or government\-funded initiatives
* Act as the central point of alignment across teams, ensuring consistency between what is sold, what is delivered, and what is developed
* Establish a structured feedback loop on training performance, including adoption, quality, and gaps, to continuously improve offerings

**We're excited about you if you have:**

* Strong background in Professional Services / Consulting roles
* Proven ability to translate market needs into structured offerings or programs
* Experience working across multiple stakeholders (sales, delivery, product/enablement)
* Strong commercial awareness with an understanding of how services and training drive revenue
* Experience with partnerships, ecosystem development, or education programs is a strong advantage
* Highly proactive, structured, and comfortable operating in an evolving environment

**What you can expect from us:**

* Generous PTO Policy
* Support work life balance with Unplugged Days
* Flexible WFH Policy
* Mental \& Physical Wellness programs
* Phone and Internet Reimbursement program
* Access to Continued Career Development

title: Creative Producer (Female-Oriented Product)
description:
Social Discovery Group (https://socialdiscoverygroup.com/) (SDG) is a group of social discovery companies. SDG solves the problems of loneliness, isolation, and disconnection \- transforming virtual intimacy into the new normal. SDG's products redefine the way people interact and connect with one another.


Our portfolio includes social entertainment platforms designed to connect people online across different cultures and regions of the world.


We bring together a team of like\-minded people and IT professionals who specialize in creating and developing globally impactful social discovery products. Our international team of digital nomads works remotely from all over the world.


We're proud to be a two\-time “Great Place to Work” winner (USA \& Japan, 2024–2025\) and a Top\-5 Company for Work\-From\-Anywhere Jobs (FlexJobs, 2025\).


We are looking for **Creative Producer**.


**Your main tasks will be:**


* Own the creative testing framework end\-to\-end: hypothesis\-to\-verdict pipeline, data thresholds for decisions, stop\-loss rules.
* Generate creative hypotheses from performance data, competitor analysis (Meta Ads Library, TikTok Creative Center) and adjacent verticals (e\-commerce, gaming, dating).
* Brief and manage designers and the AI\-generation pipeline (GenAI video/image tools), then oversee testing execution with the UA team.
* Analyze creative performance by layer — hook rate, hold rate, IPM, CTR, CPA, ROAS, cohort retention — and turn results into a taxonomy/knowledge base (which themes and angles win, and why).
* Deliver weekly reporting on the creative portfolio and drive iteration on winning concepts.


**We expect from you:**


* 2\+ years in creative strategy / creative performance, ideally high\-volume creative operations (hundreds/quarter) in e\-commerce, gaming or dating.
* Hands\-on experience with GenAI video/image tools (Seedance, Runway, Veo, Kling, Midjourney, HeyGen or similar) and understanding of which tool fits which task.
* Strong analytical skills: comfortable with large datasets, spreadsheets/dashboards, and creative performance metrics.
* Strong brief\-writing skills — hypotheses, constants, references — enabling production to execute without back\-and\-forth
* Working English (US market); editing skills (CapCut/Premiere/After Effects) are a plus


**What do we offer:**


* **REMOTE OPPORTUNITY** to work full\-time;
* The **initial pay level** or **pay range** for this role will be shared with candidates during the recruitment process and before the commencement of employment;
* **Vacation** 28 calendar days per year;
* **7 wellness days per year** (time off) that can be used to deal with household issues, to lie down and recover without taking sick leave;
* **Bonuses up to $5000** for recommending successful applicants for positions in the company;
* 50% **payment for professional training, international conferences, and meetings;**
* Corporate discount for **English lessons;**
* **Health benefits.** According to the paychecks, if you are not eligible for corporate medical insurance, the company will compensate you with up to $ 1,000 gross per year per employee. This can be spent on self\-purchase of health insurance or on doctor's fees for yourself and close relatives (spouse, children);
* **Workplace organization.** The company provides all employees with an equipped workplace and all the necessary equipment (table, armchair, wifi, etc.) in our offices or co\-working locations. In the other locations, the company provides reimbursement of workplace costs up to $ 1000 gross once every 3 years, according to the paychecks. This money can be spent on the rent of the co\-working room, on equipping the working place at home (desk, chair, Internet, etc.) during those 3 years;
* **Internal gamified gratitude system:** receive bonuses from colleagues and exchange them for our merchandise, team building activities, massage certificates, etc.


**Sounds good? Join us now!**

title: Senior SEO Account Manager
description:
**Launch Your Next Successful Chapter with Veta Virtual!**

  


*Competitive Pay \| 100% Remote \| Senior SEO Role \| Home Services Marketing Agency*

  


Veta Virtual is hiring a **Senior SEO Account Manager** for one of our clients in the Home Services Marketing industry — a U.S.\-based digital marketing agency helping HVAC, plumbing, roofing, electrical, and landscaping businesses dominate local search and generate more leads through performance\-driven SEO. This is a senior, client\-facing role built for someone who is technically sharp, strategically strong, and confident holding intelligent conversations with business owners of $10M–$15M companies. If you bring deep local SEO expertise, real ownership instincts, and the communication presence to match — this role was made for you.


**Your Role:**

  


As a **Senior SEO Account Manager**, you will be the primary point of contact for a portfolio of U.S.\-based home service business owners — owning the full cycle from strategy through execution through client communication. This is not a hand\-off role. You will diagnose, strategize, execute, and report — bringing energy, specificity, and proactive thinking to every account you manage. The agency leverages AI and automation tools to streamline execution, so you will focus your time where it matters most: strategy, results, and client relationships. Your day\-to\-day will involve:


* Managing a portfolio of 8–10 client accounts — serving as the primary point of contact for each business owner and taking full accountability for their local search performance and satisfaction.
* Leading onboarding calls, monthly strategy reviews, and regular check\-ins — communicating confidently and authoritatively with business owners who expect specifics, not generalities.
* Auditing local search presence and building customized SEO strategies — diagnosing performance gaps, identifying growth opportunities, and executing with precision across every account.
* Optimizing and actively managing Google Business Profiles — including regular posts, photo uploads, Q\&A management, review strategy, and ongoing optimization that keeps profiles performing at their peak.
* Implementing on\-site SEO improvements on WordPress websites — including technical fixes, content optimization, internal linking, and metadata updates aligned with local search best practices.
* Building and maintaining local citations and directory listings — ensuring NAP consistency and citation health across all relevant platforms.
* Monitoring rankings, traffic, and lead metrics using tools like BrightLocal, Whitespark, GSC, and GA4 — translating data into clear, actionable insights that clients can understand and act on.
* Supporting social media management for select accounts — contributing to content planning and posting where required alongside the core SEO scope.
* Staying current on Google algorithm updates and local SEO trends — proactively adjusting strategies before clients feel the impact, not after.
* Working comfortably with AI and automation tools the agency uses to streamline SEO workflows — embracing technology as a lever for doing more, faster, and better.

  

  

✅ **What You'll Need:**

  


* 3–5\+ years of hands\-on local SEO experience — with a proven track record of driving measurable ranking and traffic improvements for local businesses in a competitive search landscape.
* Strong expertise in Google Business Profile optimization — you know every lever available and you pull them all consistently, not just when it's convenient.
* Proven ability to manage multiple client accounts in an agency environment — you hold yourself accountable to results, not just activity.
* Exceptional written and verbal English communication skills — you speak confidently and intelligently with business owners, give specific actionable recommendations, and never hide behind vague strategy talk.
* Solid understanding of on\-site SEO for local businesses — including WordPress implementation, technical basics, and content optimization.
* Strong work ethic and proactive mindset — you go beyond the minimum, bring energy to every client interaction, and take initiative without being asked.
* Availability to work U.S. Central or Eastern Time hours — to effectively serve both East and West Coast clients across the portfolio.
* Comfortable with AI tools and marketing automation platforms — the agency automates heavily and you need to work efficiently within that environment.
* Reliable internet connection and a professional remote home office setup.
* Bonus: experience in the home services or trades industry — HVAC, plumbing, roofing, electrical, or landscaping.
* Bonus: familiarity with BrightLocal, Whitespark, GA4, Google Search Console, or Google Local Services Ads (LSAs).
* Bonus: experience with social media management alongside SEO in an agency context.
* *To be considered for this role, you must be currently based in Latin America (LATAM) or Europe.*

  

  

**What We Offer:**

  


* Competitive base salary in USD — paid consistently every month.
* Quarterly retention bonuses — tied directly to client results and retention, rewarding the impact you make on the accounts you own.
* 15 paid vacation days per year plus all U.S. national holidays.
* 100% remote — work from anywhere in LATAM or Europe with a professional home setup.
* A high\-growth agency environment where your SEO expertise directly drives client revenue — and where your results are recognized and rewarded.
* A supportive, collaborative culture through Veta Virtual and our client — with real growth opportunities as the agency scales.

  

  

**Ready to Apply?**

  


**If you are ready to own a portfolio of home service clients, drive real local search results, and grow with a high\-performance digital marketing agency — apply now and launch your next chapter with Veta Virtual!**

  


*Once you apply, you will be invited to complete a short 2\-minute video question as part of our screening process. It is your first opportunity to show us your SEO expertise, your communication presence, and what makes you the right person for this role. We can't wait to meet you!*

title: Casino Operations Manager
description:
**ABOUT BETR**
==============



Founded in 2022 by Joey Levy and Jake Paul, Betr has built the world's first real money gaming super app. The Betr Super App currently consists of Picks, Social Sportsbook, Social Casino, and Arcade – and will soon include Prediction Markets alongside other new products. Betr has one million paying users and is one of the fastest growing companies in the industry. Betr is also the world's most followed real money gaming brand on social media.


We're backed by Fuel Venture Capital, Aliya Capital Partners, IA Sports Ventures, FinSight Ventures, Florida Funders, Harmony Partners, 8vc, and other top\-tier investors.

  

### **About the Role:**



The Betr team is looking for a **Casino Operations Manager** who will be responsible for sourcing, negotiating, and managing relationships with game vendors and content partners that supply games to our sweepstakes casino platform. This person will ensure we maintain a best\-in\-class offering, secure favorable commercial terms, and launch high\-performing games that drive player engagement and retention.



### **What You'll Do:**


### **Vendor Sourcing \& Strategy**


* Identify, evaluate, and secure partnerships with high\-quality game vendors—slot studios, crash games, instant\-win, table games and emerging game formats.
* Develop and maintain a strategic roadmap for content acquisition aligned with business goals and sweepstakes regulatory requirements.
* Conduct competitive analysis to ensure the platform maintains unique and differentiated game offerings.

### **Relationship Management**


* Serve as the primary point of contact for all game vendors, managing day\-to\-day communication and long\-term strategic relationships.
* Host regular business reviews to align on roadmaps, performance goals, and content delivery timelines.
* Resolve operational issues, negotiate updates, and maintain strong vendor satisfaction.

### **Content Integration \& Launch Coordination**


* Collaborate with Product Managers and Engineering to plan game integrations, feature support, and release schedules.
* Ensure all vendor assets, game files, math models meet our launch requirements
* Oversee go\-to\-market planning, coordinating with Head of Games and Arcade for feature placement, promotional campaigns, and launch visibility.

### **Performance Management**


* Analyze game performance metrics—RTP behavior, player engagement, retention impact, and revenue lift.
* Work with analytics teams to produce dashboards and insights that guide content strategy.
* Optimize game placement, promotional exposure, and content mix to maximize impact.
### **About You:**


* 5\+ years of experience in partnerships, business development, or vendor management—ideally in online gaming, social casino, real\-money gaming, or sweepstakes.
* Proven success negotiating commercial agreements and managing multiple vendor relationships.
* Strong understanding of game studios, content pipelines, and casino game mechanics (RNG, math models, volatility, feature sets).
* Excellent project management skills with experience leading cross\-functional launch processes.  

Strong analytical mindset with experience evaluating game performance metrics.
* Exceptional communication, negotiation, and relationship\-building capabilities.
At Betr, we're driven by a shared vision to reshape the sports \& gaming industry. As a dynamic startup poised for remarkable growth, we're dedicated to crafting innovative experiences that cater to sports enthusiasts across the nation. We believe in pushing boundaries, embracing diversity, and fostering a collaborative culture that extends beyond the world of sports. Join us in shaping the future of sports entertainment!

Betr provides equal employment opportunities (EEO) to all employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, genetics, sexual orientation, gender identity or gender expression. We deeply understand the value of bringing together a team with different perspectives, educational backgrounds, and life experiences. We encourage people from underrepresented backgrounds to apply

Thank you for your interest in Betr. We look forward to reviewing your application.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
**Sales Development Representative (SDR)**  
*Revely — Fully Managed B2B Sales Development Agency*

**About Revely**

Revely is a Go\-To\-Market and Pipeline Generation service provider, helping founder\-led SaaS, cybersecurity, fintech, regtech, and AI companies build predictable pipeline; from Seed through Series A, across EMEA, the US, LATAM, GCC, and Australia. We embed as our clients' outbound engine: prospecting, booking qualified meetings, coaching their teams, and in some cases running as their fractional sales function entirely. We're a small, fast\-moving team where the work you do has a direct, visible impact on our clients' growth.

**The Role**

We're hiring a Sales Development Representative to run outbound campaigns on behalf of our client portfolio. Depending on client need, you'll either manage multiple smaller accounts in parallel or go deep on one larger, high\-volume campaign — so you'll need to be equally comfortable context\-switching across sectors and messaging, or committing fully to mastering a single client's ICP and objection landscape. Either way, you're the front line of Revely's promise to clients: consistent, qualified pipeline.

**What You'll Be Doing**

* Running outbound prospecting via cold calls, email sequences, and LinkedIn outreach across one or more client campaigns
* Qualifying leads against each client's Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) and booking SQLs/SALs (Sales/Sales Accepted Leads)
* Adapting messaging, scripts, and positioning to fit each client's sector, buyer personas, and competitive landscape
* Keeping CRM records accurate and up to date — call notes, lead status, next steps
* Working closely with Revely's account leads to refine playbooks based on what's converting and what isn't
* Hitting monthly SAL/meeting targets tied to client campaign goals
* Flagging patterns from the field, objections, messaging that's landing or falling flat — to help sharpen Revely's playbooks over time

**What We're Looking For**

* 1\-2 years of SDR, BDR, or outbound sales experience preferred — but we'll seriously consider driven entry\-level candidates with the right attitude and coachability
* Comfortable making outbound calls and handling objections; not afraid of a "no"
* Strong written communication, you'll be writing cold emails and LinkedIn messages that need to land in inboxes, not spam folders
* Organised and self\-directed; agency work means managing your own pipeline across accounts without someone hovering over you
* Genuine curiosity about B2B tech (SaaS, cybersecurity, fintech, regtech, AI) — you don't need deep expertise on day one, but you should enjoy learning how different businesses sell
* Resilient and coachable — outbound is a numbers game, and the best SDRs treat every call as a chance to improve

**What You'll Get**

* \[Base salary — depending on experience]
* Commission structure tied to SALs/meetings booked
* Remote first company
* Direct coaching and mentorship from Revely's founders, this isn't a role where you're thrown in and left alone
* Real variety: exposure to multiple industries and company stages rather than one product forever
* A genuine path to progression; strong SDRs at an agency like Revely often move into Account Executive, client success, or specialist coaching roles

Pay: £24,420\.00\-£40,000\.00 per year

Benefits:

* Company events
* Work from home

Work Location: Remote

title: Infrastructure Engineer
description:
**Description**


**We** **Need You...**
======================

**Join Our Talent Community****:**
==================================

 **Leidos UK \& EUROPE** **are always on the lookout for talented individuals to join our company and would love to hear from you.**

**If you cannot see a vacancy on our careers page that matches your current requirements, please register your interest in Leidos UK \& EUROPE, by submitting an application via** **‘****Join Our Talent Community’** **on the UK careers page and we will be in touch as soon as a role matching your skill set becomes available.**

**The Role:**
-------------


Due to growth within UK programmes, we will need talented **Infrastructure Engineers** throughout the course of 2026…

**Role Overview:**


You will be to work collaboratively with colleagues and our customer in an exciting and critical LAN/WAN environment. A key requirement of this role is to deliver technical service in a dynamic ITIL environment as well as incorporating Agile change delivery.

**Your Role and Responsibilities;**

* Demonstrable experience of Windows Server based infrastructure at an enterprise level
* Demonstrable experience of RedHat Linux OS based infrastructure as well as general Linux support skills
* Experienced in the management and maintenance of VMWare based virtualised estates
* Deployment and support experience of Hyper Converged Infrastructure.
* Management and troubleshooting of storage technologies including NetApp \& Dell
* Management and troubleshooting of Active Directory within an on premise environment
* Development of a customer desktop build with a number of bespoke/legacy applications
* Packaging and deployment of applications

**Required Skills:**

* Experience of Microsoft Exchange management \& support from 2013 onwards
* Experience of MS SQL Server and SQL Database Clustering
* Experience of Veeam Backup technology
* Experience of Ivanti Device \& Application Control implementation
* Experience of patch management including analysis and deployment
* Excellent communications and organisational skills as well as the ability to work independently as well as in a team
* Experience in ITIL ICT service delivery and SAFE Agile delivery of critical infrastructure
* Experience of working under pressure to meet deadlines while handling multiple priorities
* Understanding of the importance of stakeholder management and organisational acumen
* Demonstrable ability to adapt to new technologies, skillsets and to learn quickly
* Worked in a business or safety critical environment previously

**Desirable Skills:**

* Expose or experience of working with F5 Load Balancing technology
* Experience of build, test and ongoing management of a VDI solution using VMWare Horizon

**Clearance Requirements:**

* Clearance to Start BPSS
* Clearance for Role SC
* You must be willing to undergo SC or DV clearance dependent upon the security requirements for the role

**Are you ready to make an impact? Begin your journey of a flourishing and meaningful career, share your CV with us today...**

**What we do for you:**  

At Leidos we are PASSIONATE about customer success, UNITED as a team and INSPIRED to make a difference. We offer meaningful and engaging careers, a collaborative culture, and support for your career goals, all while nurturing a healthy work\-life balance.  

We provide an employment package that attracts, develops and retains only the best in talent. Our reward scheme includes:  

* Contributory Pension Scheme
* Private Medical Insurance
* 33 days Annual Leave (including public and privilege holidays)
* Access to Flexible benefits (including life assurance, health schemes, gym memberships, annual buy and sell holidays and a cycle to work scheme)
* Flexible Working Scheme

**Commitment to Diversity:**


We welcome applications from every part of the community and are committed to a truly diverse and inclusive culture. We foster a sense of belonging, welcoming all perspectives and contributions, and providing equal access to opportunities and resources for everyone. If you have a disability or need any reasonable adjustments during the application and selection stages please let us know, and we will respond in a way that best fits your needs.

**Who We Are:**

**Leidos UK \& EUROPE** – we work to make the world safer, healthier, and more efficient through technology, engineering and science.

**Leidos** is a growing company delivering innovative technology and solutions focused on safeguarding critical capabilities and transformation in frontline services, our work in the United Kingdom includes addressing some of the most complex problems in defence, healthcare, government, safety and security, and transportation.

**What Makes Us Different:**

**Purpose:** you can use your passion and abilities at Leidos to keep the people you care about safe. We are at the forefront of machine learning, AI, cyber security and solutions. Using your skills in the technology frontline by helping to build a safer world. You can ***inspire*** change.

**Collaboration:** having ***flexibility*** to do your job is one of our core benefits, enabling you to become part of our extraordinary team. We have been empowering our people to work flexibly for years. Whether you work from home, the office or on customer sites, we will give you the digital tools and the flexibility to work smarter and align your needs and ours.


**People:** Leidos ***empowers*** people from every background to be themselves and gives you the tools to learn new skills by ***enabling growth*** ***whilst developing***. We believe that extraordinary people need opportunities to grow, to ***be inspired*** and to inspire others. At Leidos, we invest in technical academies, career rotations and a career development plans that enhance your future.


If you're looking for comfort, keep scrolling. At Leidos, we outthink, outbuild, and outpace the status quo — because the mission demands it. We're not hiring followers. We're recruiting the ones who disrupt, provoke, and refuse to fail. Step 10 is ancient history. We're already at step 30 — and moving faster than anyone else dares.

**Original Posting:**
---------------------

  

For U.S. Positions: While subject to change based on business needs, Leidos reasonably anticipates that this job requisition will remain open for at least 3 days with an anticipated close date of no earlier than 3 days after the original posting date as listed above.

**Pay Range:**
--------------


The Leidos pay range for this job level is a general guideline only and not a guarantee of compensation or salary. Additional factors considered in extending an offer include (but are not limited to) responsibilities of the job, education, experience, knowledge, skills, and abilities, as well as internal equity, alignment with market data, applicable bargaining agreement (if any), or other law.

**About Leidos**


Leidos is an industry and technology leader serving government and commercial customers with smarter, more efficient digital and mission innovations. Headquartered in Reston, Virginia, with 47,000 global employees, Leidos reported annual revenues of approximately $16\.7 billion for the fiscal year ended January 3, 2025\. For more information, visit www.Leidos.com.

**Pay and Benefits**


Pay and benefits are fundamental to any career decision. That's why we craft compensation packages that reflect the importance of the work we do for our customers. Employment benefits include competitive compensation, Health and Wellness programs, Income Protection, Paid Leave and Retirement. More details are available at www.leidos.com/careers/pay\-benefits.

**Securing Your Data**


Beware of fake employment opportunities using Leidos’ name. Leidos will never ask you to provide payment\-related information during any part of the employment application process (i.e., ask you for money), nor will Leidos ever advance money as part of the hiring process (i.e., send you a check or money order before doing any work). Further, Leidos will only communicate with you through emails that are generated by the Leidos.com automated system – never from free commercial services (e.g., Gmail, Yahoo, Hotmail) or via WhatsApp, Telegram, etc. If you received an email purporting to be from Leidos that asks for payment\-related information or any other personal information (e.g., about you or your previous employer), and you are concerned about its legitimacy, please make us aware immediately by emailing us at LeidosCareersFraud@leidos.com.


If you believe you are the victim of a scam, contact your local law enforcement and report the incident to the U.S. Federal Trade Commission.

**Commitment to Non\-Discrimination**


All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to sex, race, ethnicity, age, national origin, citizenship, religion, physical or mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, pregnancy, family structure, marital status, ancestry, domestic partner status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran or military status, or any other basis prohibited by law. Leidos will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories consistent with relevant laws.


\#Remote

description:
**Description**


**We** **Need You...**
======================

==================================

**The Role:**
-------------


Due to growth within UK programmes, we will need talented **Systems Engineers** throughout the course of 2026…


You will have a full understanding of the principles of systems engineering and have prior experience as a Systems Engineer on a major programme involving accepting and integrating deliveries from suppliers.


Using your experience in Systems Engineering, you will be responsible for working with customers and suppliers to execute Systems Engineering activities across the full lifecycle, with specific focus on Model Based Systems Engineering (MBSE).

**Key Responsibilities:**

  

* Working with operational stakeholders, technology suppliers and architects to refine system and sub\-system requirements and acceptance criteria
* Allocation of requirements to lower\-level components, conducting technical derivation analysis as required
* Modelling of functional and non\-functional requirements and scenarios using MBSE and architectural framework approaches

* High and Low Level Designs
* Interface Control Documents (ICDs) / Application Programming Interfaces (APIs)
* Compliance Reports
* Preparing for and delivering milestone technical reviews and the associated work product deliverables
* Managing the technical backlog and the content of associated releases

* Strong experience with systems modelling tools (e.g. NoMagic Cameo), Architectural Frameworks (e.g. TOGAF) and Languages (e.g. SysML)
* Strong knowledge of requirements and user scenario development in both text based and model based approaches
* Success in working within mission\-critical systems integration programmes
* Ability to work with a number of stakeholders and suppliers, working across organisational boundaries as appropriate
* Experience of developing system behavioural diagrams, modelling interfaces and developing models to encapsulate functional \& non\-functional requirements and designs
* Demonstrable successes within the System Engineering environment

We believe that extraordinary people need opportunities to grow, to ***be inspired*** and to inspire others. At Leidos, we invest in technical academies, career rotations and a career development plans that enhance your future.


If you're looking for comfort, keep scrolling. At Leidos, we outthink, outbuild, and outpace the status quo — because the mission demands it. We're not hiring followers. We're recruiting the ones who disrupt, provoke, and refuse to fail. Step 10 is ancient history. We're already at step 30 — and moving faster than anyone else dares.

**Pay Range:**
--------------


The Leidos pay range for this job level is a general guideline only and not a guarantee of compensation or salary. Additional factors considered in extending an offer include (but are not limited to) responsibilities of the job, education, experience, knowledge, skills, and abilities, as well as internal equity, alignment with market data, applicable bargaining agreement (if any), or other law.

**About Leidos**


Leidos is an industry and technology leader serving government and commercial customers with smarter, more efficient digital and mission innovations. Headquartered in Reston, Virginia, with 47,000 global employees, Leidos reported annual revenues of approximately $16\.7 billion for the fiscal year ended January 3, 2025\. For more information, visit www.Leidos.com.

**Pay and Benefits**


Pay and benefits are fundamental to any career decision. That's why we craft compensation packages that reflect the importance of the work we do for our customers. Employment benefits include competitive compensation, Health and Wellness programs, Income Protection, Paid Leave and Retirement. More details are available at www.leidos.com/careers/pay\-benefits.

**Securing Your Data**


Beware of fake employment opportunities using Leidos’ name. Leidos will never ask you to provide payment\-related information during any part of the employment application process (i.e., ask you for money), nor will Leidos ever advance money as part of the hiring process (i.e., send you a check or money order before doing any work). Further, Leidos will only communicate with you through emails that are generated by the Leidos.com automated system – never from free commercial services (e.g., Gmail, Yahoo, Hotmail) or via WhatsApp, Telegram, etc. If you received an email purporting to be from Leidos that asks for payment\-related information or any other personal information (e.g., about you or your previous employer), and you are concerned about its legitimacy, please make us aware immediately by emailing us at LeidosCareersFraud@leidos.com.


If you believe you are the victim of a scam, contact your local law enforcement and report the incident to the U.S. Federal Trade Commission.

**Commitment to Non\-Discrimination**


All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to sex, race, ethnicity, age, national origin, citizenship, religion, physical or mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, pregnancy, family structure, marital status, ancestry, domestic partner status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran or military status, or any other basis prohibited by law. Leidos will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories consistent with relevant laws.
